#Intro events

country_event = { #History
	id = russia.1
	immediate = { 
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.1" 
		hidden_effect = { country_event = russia.800 }
	}
	title = russia.1.t 
	desc = russia.1.d 
	
	picture = GFX_rus_russia_flag_event
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { tag = RUS }
	
	option = {
		name = russia.1.a
		country_event = {
			id = russia.2
			days = 1
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1.b
		trigger = {
			is_ai = no
		}
		country_event = russia.1017
		country_event = {
			id = russia.2
			days = 1
		}
	}
}

	fire_only_once = yes

	option = {
		name = russia.2017.a
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russia.3
				days = 21
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russia.5
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #reparations
	id = russia.3

	desc = russia.3.d

	option = {
		name = russia.3.a
		add_stability = -0.24
		add_timed_idea = {
			idea = rus_austerity_measures
			days = 365
		}
		GER = {
			country_event = {
				id = russia.4
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
}

#Politics
country_event = { #Kerensky
	id = russia.5
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.5" }
	title = russia.5.t
	desc = russia.5.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kerensky_assassination
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russia.5.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 99
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = {
					rule = RUS_kerensky_assasination
					option = RUS_KERENSKY_LIVE_BITCH
				}
			}
		}		
		add_ideas = RUS_political_instability
		effect_tooltip = { kill_country_leader = yes }
		add_manpower = -1
		set_country_flag = RUS_KRSKY_DEATH
		add_stability = -0.21
		hidden_effect = {
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "The Senate"
				desc = "POLITICS_SENATE_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_The_Senate.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = social_liberal_subtype
			}
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "The Senate"
				desc = "POLITICS_SENATE_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_The_Senate.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = social_democrat_subtype
			}
			random_other_country = {
				news_event = {
					id = worldnews.15
					days = 1
				}
			}
			RUS = {
				country_event = {
					id = worldtension.10
					days = 1
				}
			}
			ALO = {
				country_event = {
					id = alash.897
					days = 1
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russia.13
				days = 3
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russia.10
				days = 4
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russia.9
				days = 12
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.1
				days = 6
			}
		}
	}
	
	option = { #Lives 
		name = russia.5.b
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 1
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = {
					rule = RUS_kerensky_assasination
					option = RUS_KERENSKY_DIE
				}
			}
		}
			
		country_event = {
			id = russia.7
			days = 1
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_KRSKY_LIVES
		set_country_flag = RUS_KER
		set_country_leader_portrait = {
			portrait = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Alexander_Kerensky_I_Lived_Bitch.png"
		}
		set_country_flag = PORTRAIT_PICKER_ACTIVE
		load_base_russian_tree = yes
		mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
		set_global_flag = RUS_I_lived_bitch_flag
		add_ideas = RUS_political_instability
		hidden_effect = {
			news_event = { id = russianews.12 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Gorgulov Trial
	id = russia.10
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.10"}
	title = russia.10.t
	desc = russia.10.d
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_rus_gorguloff_trial
	is_triggered_only = yes
	option = {
		name = russia.10.a
		RUS_decrease_nrpr_pop_small = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				RUS_kerensky_in_power = yes
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_TERROR
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_political_instability
				add_idea = RUS_political_instability_1
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Pardon Gorgulov?
	id = russia.11
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.11"}
	title = russia.11.t
	desc = russia.11.d
	picture = GFX_rus_gorguloff_event
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		has_country_leader = {
			name = "Boris Savinkov"
			ruling_only = yes
		}
		NOT = { has_country_flag = Pavel_Gorgulov_dead }
		NOT = { 
			has_completed_focus = RUS_Young_Eurasianists 
			has_completed_focus = SOV_Left_SR_Chekist_Coup
		}
	}
	mean_time_to_happen = {
		days = 5
	}
	
	option = {
		name = russia.11.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 1
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russia.12
				days = 20
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.11.b
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 99
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_savinkov_successors option = RUS_SAVINKOV_SUCCESSORS_SOLIDARISTS }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_savinkov_successors option = RUS_SAVINKOV_SUCCESSORS_GORGULOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_savinkov_successors option = RUS_SAVINKOV_SUCCESSORS_ABUKUMOV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_gorgulov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_siloviki_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsnp_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_stability = 0.01
		add_political_power = -25
	}
	
}
country_event = { #Gorgulov Coups Savinkov
	id = russia.12
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.12"}
	title = russia.12.t
	desc = russia.12.d
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = { has_government = national_populist }
	picture = GFX_rus_gorguloff_army_event
	option = {
		name = russia.12.a
		effect_tooltip = { kill_country_leader = yes }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Pavel Gorgulov"
			desc = "POLITICS_GORGULOV_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Pavel_Gorgulov.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = scythianism_subtype
		}
		set_country_flag = savinkov_dead
		unlock_national_focus = RUS_The_Vozhd_Is_Dead
		end_coalition = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russia.28
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Government resigns
	id = russia.17
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.17"}
	title = russia.17.t
	desc = russia.17.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_government_resigns
	is_triggered_only = yes
	option = {
		name = russia.17.a
		clr_country_flag = RUS_psr_is_soclib
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = coalition_power
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_lkdp_will_leave_coalition
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_rkdp_will_leave_coalition
		hidden_effect = {
			set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^5 = 3 }
			set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^7 = 3 }
			remove_soclib_from_coalition = yes
			remove_marlib_from_coalition = yes
			RUS_clear_all_coalitions = yes
		}
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = social_democrat
			elections_allowed = yes	
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = social_democrat
			name = RUS_mutual_socdems_party
			long_name = RUS_mutual_socdems_party_long
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = social_liberal
				name = RUS_left_kadets_party
				long_name = RUS_left_kadets_party_long
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = market_liberal
				name = RUS_left_kadets_party
				long_name = RUS_right_kadets_party_long
			}			
			mp_support_calc = yes
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soclib = RUS.party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
			divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soclib = 2 }

			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_socdem = RUS.party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_socdem = RUS_new_soclib }

			set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_socdem }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_soclib }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_socdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

			set_popularities = {
				totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
				syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
				radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
				social_democrat = RUS_new_socdem
				social_liberal = RUS_new_soclib
				market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
				social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
				authoritarian_democrat = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat
				paternal_autocrat = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat
				national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.105
				days = 5
			}
		}
		activate_mission = RUS_form_coalition
	}
}

country_event = { #Unlock foreign policy
	id = russia.23
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.23 FROM = [From.GetName]" }
	immediate = {
		hidden_effect = {
			set_country_flag = unlock_foreign
		}
	}
	title = russia.23.t
	desc = russia.23.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_bear_expansion

	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
		RUS_kerensky_in_power = no
	}

	option = {
		name = russia.23.a
		custom_effect_tooltip = unlock_foreign_tooltip
		add_political_power = -100
		add_stability = -0.05
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			prioritize = { 219 }
			limit = {
				is_core_of = ROOT
				free_building_slots = { building = arms_factory size > 2 include_locked = yes }
				impassable = no
			}
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 3
			add_building_construction = {
				type = arms_factory
				level = 2
				instant_build = yes
			}
			add_building_construction = {
				type = industrial_complex
				level = 1
				instant_build = yes
			}
		}
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			prioritize = { 217 }
			limit = {
				is_core_of = ROOT
				free_building_slots = { building = arms_factory size > 2 include_locked = yes }
				impassable = no
			}
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 3
			add_building_construction = {
				type = arms_factory
				level = 2
				instant_build = yes
			}
			add_building_construction = {
				type = industrial_complex
				level = 1
				instant_build = yes
			}
		}		
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					custom_trigger_tooltip = {
						tooltip = nsp_in_power
						has_idea = RUS_Nikolay_I_Bukharin_hog_rso
					}
					AND = {
						has_country_flag = RUS_vi_congress_internationalists
						rsdrp_in_power = yes	
					}
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = rusdem.109
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.23.b
		custom_effect_tooltip = unlock_foreign_tooltip
		add_political_power = -50
		add_stability = 0.05
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			prioritize = { 219 }
			limit = {
				is_core_of = ROOT
				free_building_slots = { building = arms_factory size > 0 include_locked = yes }
				impassable = no
			}
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
			add_building_construction = {
				type = arms_factory
				level = 1
				instant_build = yes
			}
		}
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			prioritize = { 217 }
			limit = {
				is_core_of = ROOT
				free_building_slots = { building = arms_factory size > 0 include_locked = yes }
				impassable = no
			}
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1

				level = 1
				instant_build = yes
			}
		}

country_event = { #Russians Propose Trade Deal
	id = russia.56
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.56" }
	title = russia.56.t
	desc = russia.56.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = { #Accept
		name = russia.56.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_american_tag = yes
					is_chinese_tag = yes
					tag = JAP
				}
			}
			add_political_power = 40
			if = {
				limit = { has_dlc_aat = yes }
				add_cic = 300
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_political_power = 20
			if = {
				limit = { has_dlc_aat = yes }
				add_cic = 150
			}
		}
		add_one_random_civilian_factory = yes
		FROM = {
			country_event = russia.57
		}
	}
	option = { #Refuse
		name = russia.56.b
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
		FROM = { country_event = russia.58 }
	}
}

	is_triggered_only = yes

		custom_effect_tooltip = {
			localization_key = tooltip_modify_dynmod
			DYNMOD = RUS_state_export
		}

country_event = {
	id = russia.101
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.101"}
	title = russia.101.t
	desc = russia.101.d
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russia.101.a		
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_neostolypinist_reforms }
			swap_ideas = { 
				remove_idea = RUS_neostolypinist_reforms
				add_idea = RUS_socialization_of_land
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_national_agrarian_fund }
			swap_ideas = { 
				remove_idea = RUS_national_agrarian_fund
				add_idea = RUS_socialization_of_land
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = RUS_socialization_of_land
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_Rural_Obschinas_tooltip
		hidden_effect = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_state_category = four
						has_state_category = three
						has_state_category = two
						has_state_category = one
					}
				}
				add_state_modifier = {
					modifier = {
						local_resources_factor = 0.15
						local_supplies = 0.3
					}
				}
			}
		}
		random_list = {
			40 = {
				add_two_random_civilian_factories = yes
			}
			40 = {
				add_two_random_military_factories = yes
			}
			20 = {
				add_one_random_infrastructure = yes
				add_one_random_infrastructure = yes 
			}
		}
	}
}

			remove_ideas_with_trait = security_minister
			add_ideas = RUS_Vladimir_M_Zenzinov_hog_sde
			add_ideas = RUS_Irakliy_G_Tsereteli_sec_sde
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_KER_has_chosen_tsereteli }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
			add_ideas = RUS_Irakliy_G_Tsereteli_hog_sde
			add_ideas = RUS_Vladimir_M_Zenzinov_eco_sde
		}
		else = {
			remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
			remove_ideas_with_trait = security_minister
			add_ideas = RUS_Vladimir_M_Zenzinov_eco_sde
			add_ideas = RUS_Irakliy_G_Tsereteli_sec_sde			
		}
		complete_national_focus = RUS_Find_A_Compromise
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_KER_endurance = 15 }
		RUS_KER_change_endurance = yes
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_rev_ferment_change = -15 }
		RUS_change_rev_ferment = yes
	}

country_event = {#Elections
	id = russia.121
	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.121"
		log = "----logging: RUSSIAN DUMA ELECTIONS CONCLUDED ON [GetDateText]"
		hidden_effect = { 
			RUS_run_election = yes
			RUS_clear_all_coalitions = yes
			RUS_run_senate_election = yes
			clr_country_flag = disable_duma					
			clr_country_flag = RUS_political_crisis					
			clr_country_flag = snap_elections	
			clr_country_flag = RUS_early_elections
			set_country_flag = RUS_elections_senate_1936
			set_country_flag = rus_elections_1937_over
			clr_country_flag = RUS_senate_elections_preparations
			if = {
				limit = {
					RUS_psr_rsdrp_victory_in_elections = yes
					RUS_rrdo_victory_in_elections = yes
					RUS_psr_victory_in_elections = yes
					RUS_dembloc_victory_in_elections = yes
				}
			}
			else = {
				remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_rev_ferment_modifier }
				set_country_flag = RUS_democracy		
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { has_country_flag = unlock_military }
					}
					custom_effect_tooltip = unlock_military_tooltip
					set_country_flag = unlock_military
				}				
				set_country_flag = unlock_economy
				if = {
					limit = { has_idea = RUS_political_instability_1 }
					swap_ideas = {
						remove_idea = RUS_political_instability_1
						add_idea = RUS_political_instability_1_legacy
						days = 650
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { has_idea = RUS_political_instability }
					swap_ideas = {
						remove_idea = RUS_political_instability
						add_idea = RUS_political_instability_legacy
						days = 650
					}
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_revolutionary_ferment_dealt_with
				RUS_add_stability = yes
			}
		}
	}	
	title = russia.121.t
	desc = russia.121.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russia.121.a
		trigger = {
			RUS_rsdrp_victory_in_elections = yes
			NOT = { 
				has_country_flag = democratic_block_coalition 
				has_country_flag = RUS_psr_rsdrp_coalition 
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rsdrp_is_radsoc }
			meta_effect = {
				text = {
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = radical_socialist
						last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
						election_frequency = 60
						elections_allowed = yes
					}
				}
				CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
			}
		}
		else = {
			meta_effect = {
				text = {
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = social_democrat
						last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
						election_frequency = 60
						elections_allowed = yes
					}
				}
				CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
			}
		}
		RUS_setup_rsdrp_government = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_revolutionary_ferment_dealt_with_tt		
		country_event = russia.1210
		hidden_effect = {
			load_base_russian_tree = yes
			mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
			news_event = { id = russianews.16 days = 1 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.121.b
		trigger = {
			RUS_kdp_victory_in_elections = yes
			NOT = { 
				has_country_flag = democratic_block_coalition

			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = unlock_military }
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = unlock_military_tooltip
			set_country_flag = unlock_military
		}
		effect_tooltip = { retire_country_leader = yes }
		set_country_flag = rus_president_elections_1936_over
		RUS_increase_vns_pop_large = yes
		RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
		add_political_power = 25
		mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
		set_country_flag = unlock_military
		set_country_flag = unlock_economy
		set_country_flag = unlock_foreign

			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_LAW_IMPEACH_PRESIDENT_initialize }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_allow_socialist_parties }
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.62
				days = 15
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.500
				days = 5
			}
		}
	}

					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_SOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_DEM }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP_RIGHT }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_SOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_KDP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_NRPR }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_KDP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_LKDP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RKDP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_EP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NRPR }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NRPR_REVOLUTION }

					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_VNS }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_NRPR }
				}
			}

				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_ai_random_plsr
					has_country_flag = RUS_psr_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_mensheviks_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_lkdp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_pp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkdp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_eurasia_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nrpr_ai
				}
			}
		}
		RUS_decrease_psr_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_lkdp_pop_small = yes
		add_timed_idea = {
			idea = RUS_rural_unrest_1
			days = 365
		}
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_rev_ferment_change = -4 }
		RUS_change_rev_ferment = yes
	}

country_event = { #Workers give up
	id = rusd.11
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.11" }
	title = rusd.11.t
	desc = rusd.11.d

	trigger = {
		OR = {
			has_idea = RUS_minor_strike
			has_idea = RUS_general_strike_big
			has_idea = RUS_general_strike
		}
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusd.11.a
		RUS_decrease_plsr_pop = yes
		RUS_decrease_nsp_pop = yes
		RUS_decrease_rsdrp_pop = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_idea = RUS_general_strike_big
			}
			remove_ideas = RUS_general_strike_big
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_idea = RUS_general_strike
			}
			remove_ideas = RUS_general_strike
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_idea = RUS_minor_strike
			}
			remove_ideas = RUS_minor_strike
		}
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_rev_ferment_change = -15 }
		RUS_change_rev_ferment = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #General strike
	id = rusd.13
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.13" }
	title = rusd.13.t
	desc = rusd.13.d

	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = {
			has_idea = RUS_general_strike_big
			has_country_flag = RUS_had_general_strike_big
			has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored 
		}
	}
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_strike2

	option = {
		name = rusd.13.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_minor_strike }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_minor_strike
				add_idea = RUS_general_strike_big
				days = 365
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_general_strike_big
				days = 365
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_rev_ferment_change = 15 }
		RUS_change_rev_ferment = yes
	}
}

			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {					
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_SOV }

country_event = { #resign!
	id = rusdem.202
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.202" }
	title = rusdem.202.t 
	desc = rusdem.202.d 
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		RUS_kornilov_in_power = no
		NOT = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			has_country_flag = RUS_DPROM
			has_country_flag = RUS_political_crisis
			has_country_flag = RUS_early_elections
			has_country_flag = disable_duma
			has_country_flag = RUS_elections_duma_1941 
			has_active_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
		}
		if = {
			limit = { vns_in_power = yes }
			AND = {
				check_variable = { party_popularity@authoritarian_democrat = 0 }
				check_variable = { party_popularity@social_conservative = 0 }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 
				kdp_in_power = yes
				has_country_flag = kdp_united
			}
			AND = {
				check_variable = { party_popularity@social_liberal = 0 }
				check_variable = { party_popularity@market_liberal = 0 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			check_variable = { party_popularity@ruling_party = 0 }
		}
		has_country_flag = rus_election_1936
	}
	mean_time_to_happen = {
		days = 12
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.202.a
		add_stability = -0.10
		set_country_flag = RUS_political_crisis
		country_event = {
			id = rusdem.201
			days = 5
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #resign!
	id = rusdem.203
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.203" }
	title = rusdem.203.t 
	desc = rusdem.203.d 
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_savinkov_broke

	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		OR = {
			AND = {
				date > 1937.6.6
				RUS_savinkov_pm = no
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_savinkov_governor }
			}
			AND = {
				has_government = national_populist
				RUS_savinkov_pm = yes
				has_country_flag = RUS_Solidarist_Withdrawal
				has_country_flag = RUS_Spiridonova_Denounced_NRPR
			}
		}
		psr_in_power = no
		RUS_kornilov_in_power = no
		RUS_kerensky_in_power = no
		OR = {
			russia_is_democratic = yes
			RUS_denikin_in_power = yes
			RUS_wrangel_tree_unlocked = yes
		}
		NOT = { 			
			has_country_flag = RUS_solidarist_christian_dem 
			has_country_flag = nrpr_banned
			has_country_flag = RUS_NRPR_is_bankrupt
		}	
	}
	mean_time_to_happen = {
		days = 7
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.203.a
		trigger = {
			has_government = national_populist
			RUS_savinkov_pm = yes
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
		add_war_support = -0.1
		set_country_flag = nrpr_banned
		set_country_flag = RUS_NRPR_is_bankrupt
		clr_country_flag = savinkov_coup
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.386
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.203.b
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RUS_savinkov_pm = no
				AND = {
					RUS_savinkov_pm = yes
					NOT = { has_government = national_populist }
				}
			}
		}
		add_stability = 0.1
		set_country_flag = nrpr_banned
		set_country_flag = RUS_NRPR_is_bankrupt
		if = {
			limit = { nsnp_in_power = no }
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = national_populist
				name = RUS_solidarist_party
				long_name = RUS_solidarist_party_long
			}
		}
		RUS_Get_Lower_House_Array = yes
		RUS_Get_Senate_Elections_Array = yes
		remove_add_presidential_senators = yes
		mp_support_calc = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			get_current_government_type = yes
			set_politics = { ruling_party = national_populist }
			set_country_leader_ideology = solidarism_subtype
			restore_previous_government_type = yes
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3326
				months = 6
			}
		}
	}		
}

country_event = { #Opposition laws
	id = rusdem.2070
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.2070" }
	title = rusdem.2070.t 
	desc = rusdem.2070.d 
	is_triggered_only = yes
	hidden = yes
	
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		russia_is_democratic = yes
		NOT = {
			has_country_flag = snap_elections
			has_country_flag = RUS_elections_duma_1941
			has_country_flag = RUS_early_elections
			has_country_flag = RUS_senate_elections_preparations
		} 
		always = no #TEMP
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.2070.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { RUS_law_in_progress = 1 }
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.2070
				days = 90
				random_days = 30
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.2070
				days = 365
				random_days = 120
			}
			random_list = {
				20 = {
					modifier = {
						factor = 100
						NOT = { check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 3 } }
						NOT = { check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 4 } }
					}
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						OR = {
							psr_in_power = yes
							has_country_leader = { name = "Alexandr Kerensky" ruling_only = yes }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^3 = 1 }
							has_country_flag = psr_banned
							check_variable = { Duma_Party_Seats^4 < 30 }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 3 }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 4 }					
						}
					}
					country_event = rusdem.207
				}
				20 = {
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						OR = {
							vns_in_power = yes
							has_country_flag = vns_banned
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^41 = 3 }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^41 = 4 }
						}
					}
					country_event = rusdem.208						
				}
				20 = {
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						OR = {
							rsdrp_in_power = yes
							has_country_flag = rsdrp_banned
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^24 = 3 }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^24 = 4 }	
						}
					}
					country_event = rusdem.212						
				}
				20 = {
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						OR = {
							has_socialist_government = yes
							has_government = market_liberal
							vns_in_power = yes
							ep_in_power = yes
							RUS_russian_monarch = yes
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^5 = 3 }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^5 = 4 }
							has_completed_focus = RUS_Towards_Greatest_Aim
							has_completed_focus = RUS_Monarchy_Referendum
						}
					}
					country_event = rusdem.209						
				}
				20 = {
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						OR = {
							has_government = social_democrat
							has_government = social_liberal
							has_government = national_populist
							RUS_russian_monarch = yes
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^21 = 4 }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^28 = 3 }
							check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^28 = 4 }
							has_completed_focus = RUS_Monarchy_Referendum
						}
					}
					country_event = rusdem.210					
				}
			}	
		}
	}

	desc = rusdem.207.d 
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = {
			psr_in_power = yes
			has_country_flag = psr_banned
			has_socialist_government = yes
			check_variable = { Duma_Party_Seats^4 < 30 }
			check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 3 }
			check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 4 }
		}
	}
			
	option = {
		name = rusdem.207.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^3 = 1 } }
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_LAW_OPPOSITION_VOTES
		}
		set_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 2 }
		set_variable = { RUS_law_level = 1 }
		set_variable = { RUS_law_in_progress = 1 }
		Get_initial_RUS_LAW_PSR_SOCIALIZATION_OF_LAND = yes
		activate_mission = RUS_LAW_DUMA_LEVEL_DEADLINE
	}
}

country_event = { #Snap elections 1936
	id = rusdem.2
	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.2"
		log = "----logging: RUSSIAN DUMA ELECTIONS CONCLUDED ON [GetDateText]"
		hidden_effect = {
			RUS_run_election = yes	
			set_country_flag = rus_election_1936
			clr_country_flag = snap_elections
			RUS_run_senate_election = yes
			set_country_flag = RUS_elections_senate_1936
			clr_country_flag = RUS_senate_elections_preparations
			launch_russian_flavour = yes
			set_variable = { RUS_political_campaigns_days = 45 }
			set_variable = { RUS_political_campaigns_cost = 30 }			
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.12
				days = 20
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.60
				days = 2
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.61
				days = 3
			}	
			if = {
				limit = {
					ALO = { ALO_has_russian_influence = yes }
				}
				ALO = {
					country_event = {
						id = alash.889
						days = 2
					}
				}
			}
			launch_russian_flavour = yes
			RUS_reduce_german_influence = yes
			clr_country_flag = disable_duma
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_political_instability_1}
				remove_ideas = RUS_political_instability_1
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_political_instability}
				remove_ideas = RUS_political_instability
			}
			RUS_clear_all_coalitions = yes
		}	
	}
	title = rusdem.2.t 
	desc = rusdem.2.d 
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_ALB_Election
	
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		has_country_flag = snap_elections
		NOT = {
			OR = { 
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
				RUS_kornilov_in_power = yes
				has_country_flag = RUS_DPROM
			}	
		}
	}
	
	option = { # NSP victory
		name = rusdem.2.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = nsp_banned }
			OR = {
				RUS_popular_front_victory_in_elections = yes
				RUS_nsp_victory_in_elections = yes
				AND = {
					is_ai = yes
					OR = {
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_SOV }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_DEM }
						has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_ai
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_SOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_DEM }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP_RIGHT }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_EP }
					has_country_flag = RUS_mensheviks_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_eurasia_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				set_politics = {
					ruling_party = radical_socialist
					last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
					election_frequency = 60
					elections_allowed = yes
				}
			}
			CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
		}
		RUS_setup_nsp_government = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			load_base_russian_tree = yes
			set_country_flag = make_russia_plsr_nsp_democratic_tree_visible
			mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
			news_event = { id = russianews.17 days = 1 }
		}
		RUS_recheck_president_subideology = yes
	}
	option = { #RSDRP victory
		name = rusdem.2.c
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = rsdrp_banned }
			OR = {
				RUS_popular_front_victory_in_elections = yes
				RUS_rsdrp_victory_in_elections = yes
				AND = {
					is_ai = yes
					OR = {
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_SOV }

country_event = { #Candidate from PLSR/NSP
	id = rusdem.3
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.3"}
	title = rusdem.3.t
	desc = rusdem.3.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_lozovsky
	
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		has_country_flag = snap_elections		
		NOT = {
			has_country_flag = rsdrp_banned
			has_country_flag = rus_president_elections_1936_over 
			has_country_flag = nrpr_banned
			has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			RUS_kornilov_in_power = yes
			has_country_flag = RUS_DPROM
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.3.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = bolsheviks_allowed
			}
			set_country_flag = plsr_votes_for_socialist
			set_country_flag = nsp_votes_for_socialist
		}
		set_country_flag = lozovsky_rsdrp_candidate
		set_country_flag = Socialist_candidate_exists
	}
}

					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PP }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkdp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_pp_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = tereschenko_kdp_candidate
		set_variable = { var:RUS_lkdp_minister_eco = token:RUS_Vasiliy_Leontief_eco_mli }
		set_country_flag = Liberal_candidate_exists
		add_popularity = { ideology = social_liberal popularity = 0.02 }
		add_popularity = { ideology = market_liberal popularity = -0.02 }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.7.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_LKDP }
					has_country_flag = RUS_lkdp_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = maklakov_kdp_candidate
		set_country_flag = Liberal_candidate_exists
		add_popularity = { ideology = market_liberal popularity = 0.02 }
		add_popularity = { ideology = social_liberal popularity = -0.02 }
	}

				days = 5
			}
		}

			}

country_event = { #Senate-Duma Conflict
	id = rusdem.13
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.13"}
	title = rusdem.13.t
	desc = rusdem.13.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_senate
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.13.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					AND = {
						psr_in_power = no
						has_a_psr_president = yes
						OR = {
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_SOV }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_KDP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_NRPR }
							has_country_flag = RUS_psr_ai
						}
					}
					AND = {
						kdp_in_power = no
						has_a_kdp_president = yes
						OR = {
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_KDP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_LKDP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RKDP }
							has_country_flag = RUS_lkdp_ai
							has_country_flag = RUS_pp_ai
							has_country_flag = RUS_rkdp_ai
						}
					}
					AND = {
						vns_in_power = no
						has_a_vns_president = yes
						OR = {
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_MONARCHY }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_MONARCHY }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_REPUBLIC }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_REPUBLIC }
							has_country_flag = RUS_vns_ai
						}
					}
					OR = {
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_EP }
						has_country_flag = RUS_eurasia_ai
					}
				}
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_senate_duma_conflict_duma_side_tt
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_senate_duma_conflict
				days = 180
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_chosen_duma_side
			activate_mission = RUS_Senate_Makes_Its_Move
			RUS_setup_senate_duma_conflict_variables = yes
		}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.13.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					AND = {
						OR = {
							nsp_in_power = yes
							rsdrp_in_power = yes
						}
						has_a_rsdrp_president = no
						OR = {
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_SOV }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_DEM }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_SOV }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_DEM }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP_RIGHT }
							has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_ai
							has_country_flag = RUS_mensheviks_ai
						}
					}
					AND = {
						psr_in_power = yes
						has_a_psr_president = no
						OR = {
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_SOV }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_KDP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_NRPR }
							has_country_flag = RUS_psr_ai
						}
					}
					AND = {
						kdp_in_power = yes
						has_a_kdp_president = no
						OR = {
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_KDP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_LKDP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PP }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RKDP }
							has_country_flag = RUS_lkdp_ai
							has_country_flag = RUS_pp_ai
							has_country_flag = RUS_rkdp_ai
						}
					}
					AND = {
						vns_in_power = yes
						has_a_vns_president = no
						OR = {
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_MONARCHY }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_MONARCHY }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_REPUBLIC }
							has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_REPUBLIC }
							has_country_flag = RUS_vns_ai
						}
					}
				}
			}		
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_senate_duma_conflict_senate_side_tt
		add_timed_idea = {
			idea = RUS_senate_duma_conflict
			days = 180
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_chosen_senate_side
		activate_mission = RUS_Duma_Makes_Its_Move
		RUS_setup_senate_duma_conflict_variables = yes
	}	
}

country_event = { #Elections 1941
	id = rusdem.29
	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.29"
		log = "----logging: RUSSIAN DUMA ELECTIONS CONCLUDED ON [GetDateText]"
		hidden_effect = { 
			RUS_run_election = yes
			RUS_clear_all_coalitions = yes
			RUS_run_senate_election = yes
			clr_country_flag = disable_duma					
			clr_country_flag = RUS_political_crisis					
			clr_country_flag = RUS_early_elections					
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_elections_duma_1941 }
				set_country_flag = rus_elections_1941_over
				clr_country_flag = RUS_elections_duma_1941
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { date > 1942.1.1 }
				set_country_flag = rus_elections_1941_over
			}
			if = {
				limit = { RUS_kerensky_in_power = yes }
				set_country_flag = rus_elections_1937_over
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_elections_senate_1936
			clr_country_flag = RUS_senate_elections_preparations
			remove_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
		}
	}
	title = rusdem.2.t 
	desc = rusdem.2.d 
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		russia_is_democratic = yes
		NOT = { 
			has_country_flag = snap_elections 
			has_idea = RUS_empowered_president
		}
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = { #NSP victory
		name = rusdem.2.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = nsp_banned }
			OR = {
				RUS_popular_front_victory_in_elections = yes
				RUS_nsp_victory_in_elections = yes
				AND = {
					is_ai = yes
					OR = {
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_SOV }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_DEM }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_SOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_DEM }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP_RIGHT }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_EP }
				}
			}
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				set_politics = {
					ruling_party = radical_socialist
					last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
					election_frequency = 60
					elections_allowed = yes
				}
			}
			CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
		}
		
		RUS_setup_nsp_government = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			load_base_russian_tree = yes
			set_country_flag = make_russia_plsr_nsp_democratic_tree_visible
			mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
			news_event = { id = russianews.17 days = 1 }
		}
		RUS_recheck_president_subideology = yes
	}
	option = { #RSDRP victory
		name = rusdem.2.c
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = rsdrp_banned }
			OR = {
				RUS_popular_front_victory_in_elections = yes
				RUS_rsdrp_victory_in_elections = yes
				AND = {
					is_ai = yes
					OR = {
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_SOV }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_DEM }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP_RIGHT }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_SOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NSP_DEM }
				}
			}
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rsdrp_is_radsoc }
			meta_effect = {
				text = {
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = radical_socialist
						last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
						election_frequency = 60
						elections_allowed = yes
					}
				}
				CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
			}
		}
		else = {
			meta_effect = {
				text = {
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = social_democrat
						last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
						election_frequency = 60
						elections_allowed = yes
					}
				}
				CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
			}
		}
		RUS_setup_rsdrp_government = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			load_base_russian_tree = yes
			mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
			news_event = { id = russianews.16 days = 1 }
		}
		RUS_recheck_president_subideology = yes
	}
	option = { #PSR victory
		name = rusdem.2.e
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = psr_banned }
			OR = {
				RUS_rrdo_victory_in_elections = yes
				RUS_psr_victory_in_elections = yes
				AND = {
					is_ai = yes
					OR = {
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_SOV }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_KDP }
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PSR_NRPR }
					}	
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0

country_event = { #Elections Kornilov
	id = rusdem.30
	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.30"
		log = "----logging: RUSSIAN DUMA ELECTIONS CONCLUDED ON [GetDateText]"
		hidden_effect = { 
			RUS_run_election = yes
			RUS_run_senate_election = yes
			clr_country_flag = disable_duma					
			clr_country_flag = RUS_political_crisis					
			clr_country_flag = RUS_early_elections					
			set_country_flag = RUS_elections_senate_1936
			clr_country_flag = RUS_senate_elections_preparations
			set_country_flag = rus_election_1936
			clr_country_flag = snap_elections
			set_country_flag = RUS_elections_senate_1936
			clr_country_flag = RUS_senate_elections_preparations
			launch_russian_flavour = yes
			set_variable = { RUS_political_campaigns_days = 45 }
			set_variable = { RUS_political_campaigns_cost = 30 }		
		}
	}
	title = rusdem.2.t 
	desc = rusdem.2.d 
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		RUS_kornilov_in_power = yes
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = { #
		name = rusdem.30.a
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				set_politics = {
					ruling_party = paternal_autocrat
					last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
					election_frequency = 60
					elections_allowed = yes
				}
			}
			CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					RUS_kdp_victory_in_elections = yes
					RUS_kdp_vns_victory_in_elections = yes
					RUS_vns_victory_in_elections = yes
					AND = {
						is_ai = yes
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_VNS }
					}
				}
			}
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			add_ideas = RUS_Vasiliy_V_Shulgin_hog_sco
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
			add_authdem_to_coalition = yes			
			set_country_flag = rus_president_elections_1936_over			
			set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^8 = 1 }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_kdp_vns_coalition }
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_coalition_partner = 7 }
				RUS_add_to_coalition = yes
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				mp_support_calc = yes
				senators_support_calc = yes			
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_LAW_IMPEACH_PRESIDENT_initialize }
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_allow_socialist_parties }
				country_event = {
					id = rusd.3112
					days = 30					
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					RUS_nrpr_victory_in_elections = yes					
					AND = {
						is_ai = yes
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_NRPR }
					}
				}
			}
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			add_ideas = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_nrpr_will_join_coalition
			hidden_effect = {
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_coalition_partner = 14 }
				RUS_add_to_coalition = yes
			}
			RUS_increase_nrpr_pop = yes	
			set_country_flag = rus_president_elections_1936_over
			hidden_effect = {
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_LAW_IMPEACH_PRESIDENT_initialize }
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_allow_socialist_parties }
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3008
				days = 2
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusd.3112
					days = 30					
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

		log = "----logging: RUSSIAN DUMA ELECTIONS CONCLUDED ON [GetDateText]"
		hidden_effect = { 
			RUS_run_election = yes
			RUS_clear_all_coalitions = yes
			RUS_run_senate_election = yes
			clr_country_flag = disable_duma					
			clr_country_flag = RUS_political_crisis					
			clr_country_flag = RUS_early_elections					
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_elections_duma_1941 }
				set_country_flag = rus_elections_1941_over
				clr_country_flag = RUS_elections_duma_1941
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_elections_senate_1936
			clr_country_flag = RUS_senate_elections_preparations
			remove_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
			if = {
				limit = { RUS_kerensky_in_power = yes }
				set_country_flag = rus_elections_1937_over
			}
		}
	}
	title = rusdem.2.t 
	desc = rusdem.2.d 
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		russia_is_democratic = yes
		NOT = { 
			has_country_flag = snap_elections 
		}
		has_idea = RUS_empowered_president
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = { #
		name = rusdem.30.a
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				set_politics = {
					ruling_party = var:RUS.current_party_ideology_group
					last_election = "[CURRENT_DATE]"
					election_frequency = 60
					elections_allowed = yes
				}
			}
			CURRENT_DATE = "[?global.date.GetDateStringNoHour]"
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			mp_support_calc = yes
			senators_support_calc = yes			
		} 
	}	
}

			has_country_flag = vergun_nsnp_candidate
		}
		RUS_setup_president_vergun = yes
		clr_country_flag = nsnp_wins_president
		clr_country_flag = vergun_nsnp_candidate
		hidden_effect = { remove_add_presidential_senators = yes }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.50.w
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				rkdp_in_power = yes
				vns_in_power = yes
				nsnp_in_power = yes
			}
			has_country_flag = trushnovich_nsnp_candidate
		}
		RUS_setup_president_trushnovich = yes
		clr_country_flag = nsnp_wins_president
		clr_country_flag = trushnovich_nsnp_candidate
		hidden_effect = { remove_add_presidential_senators = yes }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.50.x
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				rkdp_in_power = yes
				vns_in_power = yes
				nsnp_in_power = yes
			}
			has_country_flag = georgievsky_nsnp_candidate
		}
		RUS_setup_president_georgievsky = yes
		clr_country_flag = nsnp_wins_president
		clr_country_flag = georgievsky_nsnp_candidate
		hidden_effect = { remove_add_presidential_senators = yes }
	}

country_event = { #KDP-VNS
	id = rusdem.104
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.104"}
	title = rusdem.104.t
	desc = rusdem.104.d
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		NOT = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			has_country_flag = RUS_DPROM
			has_country_flag = RUS_psr_kdp_coalition
			AND = {
				has_country_flag = fight_socialists
				has_country_flag = fight_nationalists
			}
		}
		#NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_1936_milyukov_not_premier }	
		NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_psr_kdp_coalition }
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.104.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_KDP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_LKDP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RKDP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_MONARCHY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_MONARCHY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_REPUBLIC }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_REPUBLIC } 
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = RUS_psr_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_mensheviks_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nrpr_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsnp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_eurasia_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_kdp_vns_coalition
		RUS_increase_pp_pop = yes
		RUS_increase_rkdp_pop = yes
		RUS_increase_vns_pop = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.104.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_KDP } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_LKDP } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_PP } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RKDP } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_MONARCHY } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_MONARCHY } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_ARISTOCRATIC_REPUBLIC } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_VNS_OLIGARCHIC_REPUBLIC } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = RUS_lkdp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_pp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkdp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_vns_ai
				}
			}
		}		
		RUS_decrease_pp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_rkdp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_vns_pop_small = yes
	}
}

		is_triggered_only = yes

		}
	}

		trigger = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }

			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_rkp_united }
			add_tot_to_coalition = yes
			add_radsoc_to_coalition = yes
		}

			has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
		}

			base = 20

					check_variable = { RUS.mp_support > 275 }
					AND = {
						is_ai = yes
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_NRPR_REFORM }
					}
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.365
				days = 3
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.366
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}	
}

country_event = { #NRPR
	id = rusdem.375
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.375"}
	title = rusdem.375.t
	desc = rusdem.375.d
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_rus_savinkoc_event
	option = {
		name = rusdem.375.a
		set_cosmetic_tag = RUS_vozhdct
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Boris Savinkov"
			desc = "POLITICS_BORIS_SAVINKOV_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Boris_Savinkov_President.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = savinkovism_subtype
			traits = { vozhd }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_coalition = yes }
			for_each_loop = {
				array = coalition_partners
				add_to_array = { original_coalitions = v }
			}
		}
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = national_populist
			elections_allowed = no
		}
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { original_coalitions^num > 0 } }
			for_each_loop = {
				array = original_coalitions
				set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var = v }
				add_to_coalition = yes
			}
			clear_array = original_coalitions
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			RUS_setup_acting_president_senate_no_nrpr = yes
			RUS_add_stability = yes
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_RRF_1 } 
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = social_democrat
					long_name = RUS_social_liberal_party_long
					name = RUS_social_liberal_party
				}
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
			set_country_flag = disable_duma
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_third_russian_revolution }
				remove_ideas = RUS_third_russian_revolution
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_senate_duma_conflict }
				remove_ideas = RUS_senate_duma_conflict
			}
			load_base_russian_tree = yes
			set_country_flag = make_savinkov_tree_visible
			mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.60
				days = 5
			}
			news_event = { id = russianews.1 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Kornilov decides fate of russia
	id = rusdem.386
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.386"}
	title = rusdem.386.t
	desc = rusdem.386.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kornilov
	trigger = {
		NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_SAVI }
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.386.a
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_third_russian_revolution }
			remove_ideas = RUS_third_russian_revolution
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_RRF }
			remove_ideas = RUS_RRF
			clr_country_flag = bolsheviks_allowed
			set_country_flag = bolsheviks_banned
			RUS_decrease_plsr_pop_large = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_RRF_1 }
			remove_ideas = RUS_RRF_1
			set_country_flag = psr_banned
			RUS_decrease_psr_pop_large = yes
		}
		set_country_leader_ideology = solidarism_subtype
		set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat } 
		RUS_clear_all_coalitions = yes
		set_country_flag = provisional_government
		set_country_flag = disable_duma
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_senate_duma_conflict }
			remove_ideas = RUS_senate_duma_conflict
		}
		set_country_flag = nrpr_banned
		clr_country_flag = NRPR_candidate_exists
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_leader = { name = "Dmitry Odinets" ruling_only = yes } }
			restore_all_presidential_candidates = yes
			RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusdem.62
					days = 110
				}
			}
		}
		RUS_Get_Lower_House_Array = yes
		RUS_Get_Senate_Elections_Array = yes
		hidden_effect = { remove_add_presidential_senators = yes }
		mp_support_calc = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
		effect_tooltip = { RUS_decrease_nrpr_pop_large = yes }
		hidden_effect = {
			RUS_decrease_nrpr_pop_large = yes
			RUS_decrease_nrpr_pop_large = yes
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = national_populist
			name = RUS_solidarist_party
			long_name = RUS_solidarist_party_long
		}
		RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_early_elections
		custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
		hidden_effect = {
			activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
		}
	}
}

			limit = { check_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^2 = 1 } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_nsp_will_leave_coalition
			hidden_effect = {
				set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^2 = 3 }
				remove_radsoc_from_coalition = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^4 = 1 } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_rsdrp_will_leave_coalition
			hidden_effect = {
				set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^4 = 3 }
				remove_socdem_from_coalition = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^5 = 1 } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_lkdp_will_leave_coalition
			hidden_effect = {
				set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^5 = 3 }
				remove_soclib_from_coalition = yes
			}
		}
		if = {

			hidden_effect = {

		}

			hidden_effect = {
				set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^7 = 3 }
				remove_marlib_from_coalition = yes
			}
		}
		RUS_increase_psr_pop_large = yes
		add_political_power = 50
		add_stability = 0.12
		RUS_decrease_nrpr_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_plsr_pop_small = yes

	}

country_event = { #PSR
	id = rusdem.429
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.429"}
	title = rusdem.429.t
	desc = rusdem.429.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.429.a
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
		every_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_trait = RUS_drozdovsky_officer }
			add_unit_leader_trait = RUS_sidelined
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = RUS_avalov_officer }
				retire = yes
			}
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = MON_rvk_member_trait }
				retire = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_completed_focus = RUS_Get_Along_With_NRPR
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 403 }
				promote_leader = yes
			}
		}
		else = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 416 }
				promote_leader = yes
			}
		}
		
		hidden_effect = {
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = RUS_avalov_officer }
				remove_unit_leader_trait = RUS_sidelined
				set_nationality = WRA
			}
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = MON_rvk_member_trait }
				remove_unit_leader_trait = RUS_sidelined
				set_nationality = WRA
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 405 }
				unit_leader_event = {
					id = rusd.3226
					days = 70
					random_days = 50
				}
			}
			TRM = { 
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = RUS decision = TRM_dvsv_ally_drozdovsky }
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = WRA decision = TRM_dvsv_ally_avalov }
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = WRA decision = TRM_dvsv_ally_rvk }
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 402 }
				unit_leader_event = {
					id = rusdem.430
					days = 100
					random = 50
					random_days = 10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.429.b
		trigger = {
			MON = {
				has_country_flag = MON_soyombo_in_power_flag
				is_subject_of = RUS
			}
		}
		every_unit_leader = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_trait = RUS_wrangel_officer
					has_trait = RUS_drozdovsky_officer
				}
			}
			set_nationality = MON
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_completed_focus = RUS_Get_Along_With_NRPR
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 403 }
				promote_leader = yes
			}
		}
		else = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 416 }
				promote_leader = yes
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 402 }
				unit_leader_event = {
					id = rusdem.430
					days = 100
					random = 50
					random_days = 10
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

		}
	}

		RUS = {
			set_country_flag = Lavr_G_Kornilov_dead
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_unit_leader = 402
				}
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 402 }
					retire = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_idea = RUS_Lavr_G_Kornilov_cos_pau
				}
				remove_ideas = RUS_Lavr_G_Kornilov_cos_pau
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Anton Denikin"
					desc = "POLITICS_ANTON_DENIKIN_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Anton_Denikin.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}
			
			}
		}		
	}

country_event = { #RSDRP
	id = rusdem.452
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.452"}
	title = rusdem.452.t
	desc = rusdem.452.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.452.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSDRP_RIGHT }
					has_country_flag = RUS_mensheviks_moderate_ai
				}
			}
		}
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Rafail_Abramovich_hog_sde
			RUS_Andrey_Vyshinsky_for_sde
			RUS_Nikolay_Sukhanov_eco_sde
			RUS_Vyacheslav_P_Volgin_sec_sde
		}
		set_country_leader_ideology = syndie_social_democrat_subtype
		custom_effect_tooltip = socdem_syndie_social_democrat_subtype_swap_tt
		set_variable = { RUS_rsdrp_minister_hog = token:RUS_Rafail_Abramovich_hog_sde }
		set_variable = { RUS_rsdrp_minister_for = token:RUS_Andrey_Vyshinsky_for_sde }
		set_variable = { RUS_rsdrp_minister_eco = token:RUS_Nikolay_Sukhanov_eco_sde }
		set_variable = { RUS_rsdrp_minister_sec = token:RUS_Vyacheslav_P_Volgin_sec_sde }
		set_country_flag = soc_dems_are_socialists
		set_country_flag = RUS_vi_congress_internationalists
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^3 = 1 } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_psr_will_leave_coalition
			hidden_effect = {
				set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^3 = 3 }
				remove_socdem_from_coalition = yes
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.452.b
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_SOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_1936_elections option = RUS_1936_ELECTIONS_RSRPI_DEM }
					has_country_flag = RUS_revolution_mensheviks_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_vi_congress_moderates
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^1 = 1 } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_plsr_will_leave_coalition
			hidden_effect = {
				remove_synd_from_coalition = yes
				set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^1 = 3 } # PLSR  (Opposition)		
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^2 = 1 } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_nsp_will_leave_coalition
			hidden_effect = {
				remove_radsoc_from_coalition = yes
				set_variable = { Duma_Party_Status^2 = 3 }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_leader = {
					name = "Solomon Lozovsky"
					ruling_only = yes
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.453
				days = 7
			}
		}
		mp_support_calc = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
	}	
}

country_event = { #RSDRP
	id = rusdem.466
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.466"}
	title = rusdem.466.t
	desc = rusdem.466.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.466.a
		set_variable = { var = senate_total value = 0 }
		for_each_loop = {
			array = Senate_Party_General_Seats
			value = seats
			index = i
			
			set_variable = { Senate_Party_General_Seats^i = 0 }
		}
		for_each_loop = {
			array = Senate_Party_Regional_Seats
			value = seats
			index = i
			
			set_variable = { Senate_Party_Regional_Seats^i = 0 }
		}
		for_each_loop = {
			array = Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats
			value = seats
			index = i
			
			set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^i = 0 }
		}		
		final_senators_recalc = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #RKDP
	id = rusdem.500
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.500"}
	title = rusdem.500.t
	desc = rusdem.500.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	trigger = {
		if = {
			limit = { 
				date < 1937.1.1
			}
			kdp_in_power = no
		}
		RUS_kornilov_in_power = no
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }		
		if = {
			limit = { RUS_kerensky_in_power = yes }
			has_country_flag = disable_duma
		}
	}
		
	option = {
		name = rusdem.500.a
		RUS_dissolve_kdp_into_three = yes
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					RUS_kornilov_in_power = yes 
					vns_in_power = yes
				}
				is_in_coalition_with_social_liberal = yes
			}
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_coalition_partner = 5 }
			RUS_remove_from_coalition = yes
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_coalition_partner = 7 }
			RUS_add_to_coalition = yes
			mp_support_calc = yes 
			senators_support_calc = yes	
		}
	} 
}

country_event = { #LKDP
	id = rusdem.502
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.502"}
	title = rusdem.502.t
	desc = rusdem.502.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.502.a
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = kdp_united }
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							has_state_category = zero
							has_state_category = one
							has_state_category = two
							has_state_category = three
							has_state_category = four
							has_state_category = five
						}
					}
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vks_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_condition_pop = 0.035 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_condition_pop = 0.035 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_condition_pop = 0.035 }
				}
			}
			else = {
				custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_increase_lkdp_pop_tt
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							has_state_category = zero
							has_state_category = one
							has_state_category = two
							has_state_category = three
							has_state_category = four
							has_state_category = five
						}
					}
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vks_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_condition_pop = -0.05 }
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_condition_pop = 0.1 }
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

				}
			}
		}
	}

country_event = { #VNS
	id = rusdem.526
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.526"}
	title = rusdem.526.t
	desc = rusdem.526.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
		
	option = {
		name = rusdem.526.a
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RUS_dmitriy_romanov_in_power = yes
				RUS_tsar_dmitriy = yes
				has_country_leader = {
					name = "Pavel II"
					ruling_only = yes
				}		
				RUS_tsar_wrangel = yes
				has_country_leader = { name = "The Senate" ruling_only = yes }
				has_country_leader = { name = "The State Council" ruling_only = yes }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = 25
		RUS_increase_vns_pop_small = yes
		set_country_flag = VNS_aristocratic
		complete_national_focus = RUS_Aristocrats_Triumphant
		if = {
			limit = { has_coalition = yes }
			for_each_loop = {
				array = coalition_partners
				add_to_array = { original_coalitions = v }
			}
		}
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat
			elections_allowed = yes
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { original_coalitions^num > 0 } }
			for_each_loop = {
				array = original_coalitions
				set_temp_variable = { coalition_partner_var = v }
				add_to_coalition = yes
			}
			clear_array = original_coalitions
		}
		add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.526.b
		trigger = {
			RUS_dmitriy_romanov_in_power = no
		}
		add_political_power = -25
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_country_leader = {
						name = "Felix Yusupov"
						ruling_only = yes
					}
				}
			}
			add_ideas = RUS_Felix_F_Yusupov_hog_sco
			set_variable = { RUS_vns_minister_hog = token:RUS_Felix_F_Yusupov_hog_sco }
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_Felix_F_Yusupov_sec_sco }
				remove_ideas = RUS_Felix_F_Yusupov_sec_sco
				add_ideas = RUS_Mikhail_Rodzyanko_sec_sco
				set_variable = { RUS_vns_minister_sec = token:RUS_Mikhail_Rodzyanko_sec_sco }
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = RUS_Georgiy_P_Ignatiev_hog_sco
			set_variable = { RUS_vns_minister_hog = token:RUS_Georgiy_P_Ignatiev_hog_sco }
		}
		RUS_increase_vns_pop_small = yes
		set_country_flag = VNS_oligarchic
		remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
		add_ideas = RUS_Aleksey_I_Putilov_eco_pau
		set_variable = { RUS_vns_minister_eco = token:RUS_Aleksey_I_Putilov_eco_pau }
		complete_national_focus = RUS_Oligarchs_Triumphant
	} 
}

country_event = { #VNS

	title = rusdem.535.t
	desc = rusdem.535.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
		
	option = {
		name = rusdem.535.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
		}		
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_LAW_DESTROY_LOCAL_PARLIAMENTS_initialize }
		set_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^33 = 1 }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.535.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 60
		}
		add_political_power = 50
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.535.c
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
		}
		set_country_flag = vns_national_conservative
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_government = social_conservative
				vns_in_power = yes
			}
			set_country_leader_ideology = national_conservative_subtype
			custom_effect_tooltip = soccon_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_government = authoritarian_democrat
				vns_in_power = yes
			}
			set_country_leader_ideology = authdem_national_conservative_subtype
			custom_effect_tooltip = authdem_authdem_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		add_ideas = RUS_russification_policies
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_belarus_resistance }
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_polish_resistance }
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_forest_brothers_resistance }
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_ukrainian_resistance }
				}
			}
			add_resistance = 35
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = {
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_belarus_resistance }
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_polish_resistance }
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_forest_brothers_resistance }
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_ukrainian_resistance }
				}
				has_resistance = yes
			}
			add_resistance = 15
		}
	}	
}

			set_variable = { RUS_state_monarchy_referendum_turnout = 0.37 }
			set_variable = { RUS_monarchy_popular_support = party_popularity@authoritarian_democrat }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_monarchy_popular_support = party_popularity@market_liberal }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_monarchy_popular_support = party_popularity@social_conservative }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_monarchy_popular_support = party_popularity@paternal_autocrat }
			clamp_variable = { var = RUS_monarchy_popular_support min = 0 max = 1 }
			RUS_calculate_expected_monarchy_referendum = yes
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen }
				RUS_launch_monarchy_referendum_events = yes
			}
			else = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						vns_in_power = yes
					}
					RUS_monarch_increase_senators = yes
				}
				else = {
					RUS_monarch_increase_vladimirovichi = yes
				}
				country_event = { id = rusdem.583 days = 5 }
			}			
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.566
				days = 46
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.567
				days = 68
			}
		}
	}

country_event = { #Monarchy Referendum
	id = rusdem.557
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.557"}
	title = rusdem.557.t
	desc = rusdem.557.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen }
	}
			
	option = {
		name = rusdem.557.a
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi > RUS_monarch_romanovs }
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi > RUS_monarch_senators }
				}
				AND = {
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_senators > RUS_monarch_romanovs }
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_senators > RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi }
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_senators < RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = Kirill_Romanov_dead }
				set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_VLA
				custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_TSAR_VLA_TT
			}
			else = {
				set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_KIR
				custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_TSAR_KIR_TT
			}
		}
		else = {			
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = Dmitri_Pavlovich_Romanov_dead }
				set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_PAVEL
				custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_TSAR_PAVEL_TT
			}
			else = {
				set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_DMI
				custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_TSAR_DMI_TT
			}

			OR = {
				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_romanovs > RUS_monarch_senators }

		set_temp_variable = { RUS_change_monarchy_popular_support = 0.10 }
		RUS_change_monarchy_referendum_support = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = rusdem.564 days = 5 }
		}
	}
	option = {

			OR = {

				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_romanovs = RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi }

						check_variable = { RUS_monarchy_popular_support < 0.5 }

				days = 2
			}
		}
		else = {
