			RUS_increase_vns_pop_large = yes
		}		
	}

country_event = { #Restoration of republic
	id = rusdem.580
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.580"}
	title = rusdem.580.t
	desc = rusdem.580.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.580.a
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = paternal_autocrat
			long_name = RUS_paternal_autocrat_party_long
			name = RUS_paternal_autocrat_party
		}
		drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
		clr_country_flag = RUS_monarchy_restored
		set_country_flag = disable_duma
		RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_early_elections
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_vns_rnsma_exists }
			clr_country_flag = RUS_vns_rnsma_exists
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = social_conservative
				name = RUS_social_conservative_party
				long_name = RUS_social_conservative_party_long
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = authoritarian_democrat
				name = RUS_social_conservative_party
				long_name = RUS_social_conservative_party_long
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = rnsma_evolves }
			clr_country_flag = rnsma_evolves
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = national_populist
				name = RUS_solidarist_party
				long_name = RUS_solidarist_party_long
			}
			hidden_effect = { remove_add_presidential_senators = yes }
			mp_support_calc = yes
			senators_support_calc = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				get_current_government_type = yes
				set_politics = { ruling_party = national_populist }
				set_country_leader_ideology = solidarism_subtype
				restore_previous_government_type = yes
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
		hidden_effect = {
			activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #Tsar flavor
	id = rusdem.581
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.581"}
	title = rusdem.581.t
	desc = {
		text = rusdem.581.d.kirillovichs
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_country_leader = {
					name = "Kirill I"
					ruling_only = yes
				}
				has_country_leader = {
					name = "Vladimir III"
					ruling_only = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusdem.581.d.others
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					has_country_leader = {
						name = "Kirill I"
						ruling_only = yes
					}
					has_country_leader = {
						name = "Vladimir III"
						ruling_only = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		RUS_russian_monarch = yes
		NOT = {
			has_country_leader = {
				name = "Pyotr IV"
				ruling_only = yes
			}
			has_country_leader = {
				name = "Anastasia I"
				ruling_only = yes
			}
		}
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_event_russia_conflict_of_romanovs
	option = {
		name = rusdem.581.a
		add_to_variable = { popular_support_monarchy = -0.075 }
		add_to_variable = { bourgeois_support_monarchy = -0.1 }
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_country_leader = {
							name = "Kirill I"
							ruling_only = yes
						}
						has_country_leader = {
							name = "Vladimir III"
							ruling_only = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_country_leader = {
							name = "Kirill I"
							ruling_only = yes
						}
						has_country_leader = {
							name = "Vladimir III"
							ruling_only = yes
						}
						has_country_leader = {
							name = "Dmitry III"
							ruling_only = yes
						}
					}
				}
				country_event = {
					id = rusdem.582
					days = 15
				}
			}			
		}
	}

country_event = { #Tsar is back
	id = rusdem.590
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.590"}
	title = rusdem.590.t
	desc = rusdem.590.d
		trigger = {
		OR = {
			tag = DKB
			tag = KUB
			tag = KLY
			tag = MON
			tag = TRM
		}
		is_ai = no
		is_subject = no
		RUS = { RUS_russian_monarch = yes }
		NOT = { has_country_flag = @ROOT_refused_tsar }
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	option = {
		name = rusdem.590.a
		trigger = {
			has_socialist_government = no
			OR = {
				AND = {
					tag = KUB
					has_government = market_liberal
				}
				AND = {
					tag = TRM
					OR = {
						TRM_Nats_in_power = yes
						TRM_do_rovs_in_power = yes
						has_government = social_conservative
						has_government = market_liberal
					}
				}
				AND = {
					tag = MON
					MON_sternberg_in_power = yes
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 99
		}	
		RUS = {
			country_event = rusdem.591
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.590.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 1
		}	
		add_political_power = 50
		set_country_flag = @ROOT_refused_tsar
	}
}

country_event = { #Tsar is back
	id = rusdem.592
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.592"}
	title = rusdem.592.t
	desc = {
		text = rusdem.592.d.const
		trigger = { has_completed_focus = RUS_A_Symbol_Of_Russian_Might }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusdem.592.d.semiconst
		trigger = { has_completed_focus = RUS_Tsar_Prussian_Constitutionalism }
	}	
	is_triggered_only = yes
		option = {
		name = rusdem.592.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 20
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_increase_total_senators_by_50
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_General_Seats^17 = 50 }
		add_to_variable = { senators_election_total = 50 }
		set_country_flag = RUS_presidential_senate_seats_removed
		for_each_loop = {
			array = Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats
			value = seats
			index = i

			set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^i = 0 }
		}
		final_senators_recalc = yes		
		RUS_Get_Senate_Elections_Array = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.592.b
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 20
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_increase_total_regional_senators_by_50
		add_to_variable = { senators_election_regional_total = 50 }
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_Regional_Seats^17 = 50 }
		set_country_flag = RUS_presidential_senate_seats_removed
		for_each_loop = {
			array = Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats
			value = seats
			index = i

			set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^i = 0 }
		}
		final_senators_recalc = yes
		RUS_Get_Senate_Elections_Array = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.592.c

			factor = 40
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_increase_total_senators_by_25
		add_to_variable = { senators_election_regional_total = 25 }
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_increase_total_regional_senators_by_25
		add_to_variable = { senators_election_total = 25 }
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_General_Seats^17 = 25 }
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_Regional_Seats^17 = 25 }
		set_country_flag = RUS_presidential_senate_seats_removed
		for_each_loop = {
			array = Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats
			value = seats
			index = i

			set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^i = 0 }
		}
		final_senators_recalc = yes
		RUS_Get_Senate_Elections_Array = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.592.f
		trigger = {
			has_completed_focus = RUS_Tsar_Prussian_Constitutionalism
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 100
		}
		for_each_loop = {
			array = Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats
			value = seats
			index = i

			set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^i = 0 }
		}
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^8 = 33 }
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^9 = 7 }
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^6 = 5 }
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^5 = 5 }
		
		final_senators_recalc = yes
		RUS_Get_Senate_Elections_Array = yes
		senators_support_calc = yes
	}

country_event = { #Tsar
	id = rusdem.593
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.593"}
	title = rusdem.593.t
	desc = rusdem.593.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusdem.593.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 65
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = psr_banned }
			}
			set_country_flag = psr_banned
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_ban_psr
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = rsdrp_banned }
			}
			set_country_flag = rsdrp_banned
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_ban_rsdrp
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = bolsheviks_allowed
			}
			clr_country_flag = bolsheviks_allowed
			set_country_flag = bolsheviks_banned
			set_country_flag = nsp_banned
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_ban_nsp
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = nrpr_banned }
			}
			set_country_flag = nrpr_banned
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_ban_nrpr
			set_country_flag = RUS_NRPR_is_bankrupt
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = national_populist
				name = RUS_solidarist_party
				long_name = RUS_solidarist_party_long
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3326
				months = 6
			}
			hidden_effect = { remove_add_presidential_senators = yes }
			mp_support_calc = yes
			senators_support_calc = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				get_current_government_type = yes
				set_politics = { ruling_party = national_populist }
				set_country_leader_ideology = solidarism_subtype
				restore_previous_government_type = yes
			}
		}
		add_stability = -0.15
		RUS_decrease_ruling_party_pop = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = rusdem.593.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 35
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_vi_congress_moderates }
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_vi_congress_moderates
				country_event = {
					id = rusdem.595
					days = 2
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusdem.594
				days = 5
			}
		}
	}	
}

			set_country_leader_portrait = {	portrait = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Pavel_Romanov_18.png." }
			set_politics = { ruling_party = paternal_autocrat }
			set_country_leader_portrait = {	portrait = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Pavel_Romanov_18.png." }
			set_politics = { ruling_party = national_populist }
			set_country_leader_portrait = {	portrait = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Pavel_Romanov_18.png." }
			restore_previous_government_type = yes
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #NSNP
	id = rusdem.604
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusdem.604"}
	title = rusdem.604.t
	desc = rusdem.604.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
		option = {
		name = rusdem.604.a
		set_country_flag = RUS_solidarist_christian_dem
		clr_country_flag = VNS_aristocratic
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat
			elections_allowed = yes
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = authoritarian_democrat
			name = RUS_rhdp_party
			long_name = RUS_rhdp_party_long
		}
		set_country_leader_ideology = autdem_christian_democracy_subtype
		custom_effect_tooltip = authdem_autdem_christian_democracy_subtype_swap_tt
		add_natpop_to_coalition = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			# give authdem to soccon first
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = party_popularity_100@social_conservative}
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat  }

			set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_soccon }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = sum } #avoid rounding errors

			set_popularities = {
				totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
				syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
				radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
				social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
				social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
				market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
				social_conservative = RUS_new_soccon
				authoritarian_democrat = 0
				paternal_autocrat = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat
				national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
			}
			# Change natpop to authdem after 
			
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_natpop = party_popularity_100@national_populist }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS_new_natpop }

			set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

			set_popularities = {
				totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
				syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
				radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
				social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
				social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
				market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
				social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
				authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
				paternal_autocrat = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat
				national_populist = 0
			}
		}
	}
}

					id = rusdem.53
					days = 7
				}

					id = rusdem.54
					days = 10
				}
				country_event = { #kdp primaries
					id = rusdem.55
					days = 14
				}
				country_event = { #rkdp primaries
					id = rusdem.5501
					days = 17
				}
				country_event = { #vns primaries
					id = rusdem.56
					days = 20
				}
				country_event = { #nsnp primaries
					id = rusdem.58
					days = 23
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				country_event = rusdem.62
			}
		}
	}

		}

				id = rusdem.52
				days = 15
			}

				id = rusdem.53
				days = 20

				id = rusdem.65
				days = 30
			}

			random_unit_leader = {

				retire = yes
			}
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 78823 }
			promote_to_marshal = yes
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = national_populist
			long_name = RUS_chernosot_party_long
			name = RUS_chernosot_party
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = paternal_autocrat
			long_name = RUS_chernosot_party_long
			name = RUS_chernosot_party
		}
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = national_populist
			elections_allowed = no
		}
		add_pataut_to_coalition = yes
		if = {
			limit = { RUS_russian_monarch = no }
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Nikolay Markov"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Nikolay_Markov.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = legionarism_subtype 
			}
		}
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Nikolay_E_Markov_hog_npo
			RUS_Aleksandr_Krupensky_for_pau 
			RUS_Nikanor_V_Savic_eco_pau
			RUS_Mikhail_Govorukho_Otrok_sec_npo
		}
		
		load_base_russian_tree = yes
		set_country_flag = make_absolute_monarchy_tree_visible
		mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.154
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Revolution
	id = rusd.29
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.29"}
	title = rusd.21.t 
	desc = rusd.21.d
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.21.a
		if = {
			limit = { rsdrp_in_power = yes }
			set_politics = {
				ruling_party = social_democrat
				elections_allowed = no
			}
			remove_all_ministers = yes
			add_ideas = {
				RUS_Rafail_Abramovich_hog_sde
				RUS_Andrey_Vyshinsky_for_sde
				RUS_Boris_I_Nikolayevsky_eco_sde
				RUS_Fyodor_I_Dan_sec_sde
			}
			set_country_flag = popular_front_coalition
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_government = syndicalist }
			set_politics = {
				ruling_party = syndicalist
				elections_allowed = no
			}
			remove_all_ministers = yes
			add_ideas = {
				RUS_Maria_A_Spiridonova_hog_syn
				RUS_Vladimir_A_Karelin_for_syn
				RUS_Isaak_Z_Shteinberg_eco_syn
				RUS_Vladimir_E_Trutovskiy_sec_syn
			}			
		}
		else = {
			set_politics = {
				ruling_party = radical_socialist
				elections_allowed = no
			}
			remove_all_ministers = yes
			add_ideas = {
				RUS_Nikolay_I_Bukharin_hog_rso
				RUS_Ivan_N_Smirnov_for_rso
				RUS_Nikolay_D_Kondratiev_eco_rso
				RUS_Aleksey_I_Rykov_sec_rso
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_NRPR_is_bankrupt } }
			add_ideas = RUS_nationalist_resistance_1
		}
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_monarchist_resistance_1
			RUS_democrat_resistance_1
		}
		set_country_flag = SOV_must_deal_with_opposition
		set_country_flag = peaceful_revolution_military_tree
		set_country_flag = SOV_revtribunals_abolished
		set_country_flag = nrpr_banned
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_ban_nrpr
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = popular_front_coalition } }
			set_country_flag = psr_banned
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_ban_psr
		}
		add_stability = 0.05
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russia.1923
				days = 7
				random_days = 7
			}
			setup_soviet_russia = yes
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.1 
				days = 6
			}
			news_event = { id = russianews.5 days = 1 }
			if = {
				limit = { 
					country_exists = ALO 
				}
				ALO = { country_event = alash.890 }
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Status of the Orthodox Church
	id = rusd.35
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.35"}
	title = rusd.35.t
	desc = rusd.35.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_orthodox
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = {
			has_idea = RUS_state_religion
			has_country_flag = RUS_is_secular_constitutionally
		}
		RUS_kornilov_in_power = no
		check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^44 = 0 }
		has_socialist_government = no
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.35.a
		trigger = {
			has_socialist_government = no
			NOT = { has_government = social_democrat }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 70
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_government = social_liberal
			}				
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_socialist_government = yes
					has_left_democratic_government = yes
				}
			}
			add_stability = -0.1
		}
		else = {
			add_stability = 0.05
		}
		if = {
			limit = { russia_is_democratic = yes }			
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_LAW_STATE_RELIGION_initialize }
			set_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^44 = 1 }
			RUS_bop_increase_monarchists = yes
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = RUS_state_religion
			RUS_increase_pp_pop = yes
			RUS_increase_rkdp_pop_small = yes
			RUS_increase_vns_pop_small = yes
			RUS_increase_ep_pop_small = yes
			RUS_bop_increase_monarchists = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusd.72
					days = 30
					random = 2160
				}
				country_event = {
					id = rusd.36
					days = 40
					random = 2160
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_idea = RUS_ties_with_church
					}
					remove_ideas = RUS_ties_with_church
				}
			}
			set_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^44 = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.35.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { 
				has_completed_focus = RUS_God_Save_the_Tsar
				has_country_flag = RUS_PUR
				has_idea = RUS_Patriarch_Sergius_hog_pau
				has_idea = RUS_Patriarch_Isaac_hog_pau
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 60
			modifier = {
				add = -60
				RUS_russian_monarch = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -60
				vns_in_power = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -60
				ep_in_power = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				RUS_russian_monarch = yes
			}
			add_stability = -0.1
		}
		else = {
			add_stability = 0.05
			RUS_bop_increase_republicans = yes
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_is_secular
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.72
				days = 30
				random = 2160
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.37
				days = 20
				random = 960
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.38
				days = 60
				random = 1440
			}
		}
	}

country_event = { #The patriarch criticises the government
	id = rusd.39
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.39" }
	title = rusd.39.t
	desc = rusd.39.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusd.39.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				RUS_russian_monarch = yes
			}
			add_stability = -0.1
		}
		else = {
			add_stability = 0.05
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_is_secular
		set_country_flag = RUS_is_secular_constitutionally
		if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { has_country_flag = nsp_banned }
			}
			RUS_increase_nsp_pop_small = yes
		}
		RUS_increase_psr_pop_small = yes
		RUS_increase_rsdrp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_increase_lkdp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_pp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_rkdp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_vns_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_ep_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_nsnp_pop_small = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.47
				days = 2
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.37
				days = 20
				random = 960
			}
		}		
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.39.b
		RUS_decrease_nsp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_psr_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_rsdrp_pop_small = yes
		RUS_decrease_lkdp_pop_small = yes
		if = {
			limit = { 
				AND = {
					check_variable = { RUS_law_level = 1 }
					check_variable = { CurrentDumaSupportForBill^5 < Duma_Party_Seats^5 }
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						check_variable = { Duma_Party_Seats^5 < 31 }
					}
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = Duma_Party_Seats^5 }
				}
				else = {
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = 30 }
				}
				add_to_variable = { CurrentDumaSupportForBill^5 = support_for_bill }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { CurrentSenateSupportForBill^5 < Senate_Party_Total_Seats^5 }
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						check_variable = { Senate_Party_Total_Seats^5 < 31 }
					}
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = Senate_Party_Total_Seats^5 }
				}
				else = {
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = 30 }
				}
				add_to_variable = { CurrentSenateSupportForBill^5 = support_for_bill }
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_LAW_GET_LKDP_DUMA_VOTES_tt
		if = {
			limit = { 
				AND = {
					check_variable = { RUS_law_level = 1 }
					check_variable = { CurrentDumaSupportForBill^14 < Duma_Party_Seats^14 }
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						check_variable = { Duma_Party_Seats^14 < 31 }
					}
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = Duma_Party_Seats^14 }
				}
				else = {
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = 30 }
				}
				add_to_variable = { CurrentDumaSupportForBill^14 = support_for_bill }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { CurrentSenateSupportForBill^14 < Senate_Party_Total_Seats^14 }
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						check_variable = { Senate_Party_Total_Seats^14 < 31 }
					}
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = Senate_Party_Total_Seats^14 }
				}
				else = {
					set_temp_variable = { support_for_bill = 30 }
				}
				add_to_variable = { CurrentSenateSupportForBill^14 = support_for_bill }
			}
		}
		count_votes_for_bill_sum = yes			
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_LAW_GET_NRPR_DUMA_VOTES_tt			
	}
}

country_event = { #Reorg of Cossack Hosts
	id = rusd.48
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.48" }
	title = rusd.48.t
	desc = {
		trigger = { 
			OR = {
				psr_in_power = yes
				has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo
				RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
			}
		}
		text = rusd.48.d.srs
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { 
			OR = {
				has_right_democratic_government = yes
				has_authoritarian_government = yes
			}
			NOT = {
				has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo
				RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
			}
		}
		text = rusd.48.d.rovs
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = {
			psr_in_power = no
			has_right_democratic_government = no
			has_authoritarian_government = no
			NOT = { has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo }
			RUS_savinkov_in_power = no
		}
		text = rusd.48.d.dem
	}
	trigger = {
		has_country_flag = RUS_cossack_hosts_dissolved
		RUS_kornilov_in_power = no
		RUS_denikin_in_power = no
	}
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_cossacks_1
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes	

	option = { #More funds to the Hosts!
		name = rusd.48.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_socialist_government = yes
					psr_in_power = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				OR = {
					rsdrp_in_power = yes
					RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
					has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { russia_is_democratic = yes }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_LAW_COSSACK_HOSTS_initialize }
			set_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^45 = 1 }
		}
		else = {
			RUS_can_into_cossack_hosts = yes
		}
	}
	option = { #Fine as they are
		name = rusd.48.b
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 100 
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					RUS_russian_monarch = yes
					has_government = paternal_autocrat
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				OR = {
					rsdrp_in_power = yes
					RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
					has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo
				}
			}
		}
		add_stability = 0.05		
	}
}

country_event = { #Motherland mass
	id = rusd.72
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.72"}
	title = rusd.72.t

	desc = {
		text = rusd.72.d.secular
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_is_secular
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.72.d.orthodox
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_is_secular }
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.72"
		hidden_effect = {
			random_list = {
				75 = {
					if = {
						limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_is_secular }
						country_event = {
							id = rusd.72
							days = 555
							random = 2880
						}
					}
					else = {
						country_event = {
							id = rusd.72
							days = 555
							random = 1440
						}
					}
				}
				25 = {
					if = {
						limit = { RUS_russian_monarch = yes }
						country_event = {
							id = rusd.74
							days = 555
							random = 1440
						}
					}
					else = {
						country_event = {
							id = rusd.74
							days = 555
							random = 2880
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.72.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_is_secular
		}
		add_political_power = 25
	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.72.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_is_secular }
		}
		add_political_power = 25
	}
}

country_event = { #Kornilov's Death
	id = rusd.55
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.55"}
	title = rusd.55.t
	desc = {
		text = rusd.55.d
		trigger = { has_idea = RUS_Vasiliy_V_Shulgin_hog_sco }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.55.d2
		trigger = { has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.55.d3
		trigger = { 
			NOT = {
				has_idea = RUS_Vasiliy_V_Shulgin_hog_sco 
				has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo 
			}
		}
	}
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_death_kornilov
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		RUS_kornilov_in_power = yes
		NOT = { has_country_flag = Lavr_G_Kornilov_dead }		
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.55.a
		effect_tooltip = { kill_country_leader = yes }
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 402 }
			retire = yes
		}
		set_country_flag = Lavr_G_Kornilov_dead
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Lavr_G_Kornilov_hog_pau }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Lavr_G_Kornilov_cos_pau }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = chief_of_staff
		}
		RUS_decrease_rovs_pop_large = yes
		add_stability = -0.2
		hidden_effect = {
			#RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes			
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Abram Dragomirov"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Abram_Dragomirov.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = junta_subtype
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					is_power_balance_in_range = {
						id = RUS_rovs_balance
						range = RUS_rovs_republican_side_1
					}
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_rovs_status_quo
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { 
					is_power_balance_in_range = {
						id = RUS_rovs_balance
						range > RUS_rovs_republican_side_1
					}
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_rovs_monarchist
			}
			else = {
				set_country_flag = RUS_rovs_republican
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = rusdem.500 days = 9 }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_revolutionary_ferment_dealt_with } }
			### General Kutepov's Coup ###
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3039
				days = 2
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_idea = RUS_Vasiliy_V_Shulgin_hog_sco 
						has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo 
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { 
						is_power_balance_in_range = {
							id = RUS_rovs_balance
							range > RUS_rovs_republican_side_1
						}
					}
					### General Wrangel Assumes Power ###
					country_event = {
						id = rusd.3037
						days = 2
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = { 
						is_power_balance_in_range = {
							id = RUS_rovs_balance
							range < RUS_rovs_monarchist_side_1
						}
					}
					### General Denikin Assumes Power ###
					country_event = {
						id = rusd.3038
						days = 2
					}
				} 
				else = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusd.3039
						days = 2
					}
					# Levitov currently removed
				}
			}
			else = {
				clr_country_flag = RUS_revolutionary_ferment_minigame
				if = {
					limit = { has_idea = RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo }		
					### Boris Savinkov ###
					country_event = {
						id = rusd.3041
						days = 2
					}
				}
				else = {
					### Vasily Shulgin ###
					country_event = {
						id = rusd.3042
						days = 2
					}
				}
			}
		}		
	}
}

country_event = { #Boris Romanov dies
	id = rusd.94
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		has_country_leader = {
			ruling_only = yes
			name = "Boris II"
		}
	}
	title = {
		text = rusd.94.t
		trigger = { 
			NOT = {
				has_country_leader = {
					ruling_only = yes
					name = "Boris II"
				}
			}
		}
	}
	title = {
		text = rusd.95.t.tsar
		trigger = { 
			has_country_leader = {
				ruling_only = yes
				name = "Boris II"
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.94.d.has_heir
		trigger = {
			has_country_leader = {
				ruling_only = yes
				name = "Boris II"
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.94.d
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_leader = {
					ruling_only = yes
					name = "Boris II"
				}
			}
		}
	}

	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.94"
		set_country_flag = Boris_Romanov_dead
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_BORIS }
			clr_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_BORIS
			set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_VLA
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = GRU_boris_romanov }
			if = {
				limit = { 
					RUS_russian_monarch = yes
					NOT = { has_country_leader = { name = "Roman I" ruling_only = yes } }					
				}
				set_country_flag = DDR_roman_romanov
				GRU = {
					set_country_flag = wilhelm_iv
					country_event = part.23
				}
			}
			else = {
				GRU = { drop_cosmetic_tag = yes }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = DDR_boris_romanov }
			if = {
				limit = { 
					RUS_russian_monarch = yes
					NOT = { has_country_leader = { name = "Roman I" ruling_only = yes } }					
				}
				set_country_flag = DDR_roman_romanov
				DDR = {
					set_country_flag = wilhelm_iv
					country_event = part.23
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_authoritarian_government = yes
						has_country_leader = { name = "Roman I" ruling_only = yes }
					}
					has_unit_leader = 78823
				}
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 78823 }
					set_nationality = DDR
				}
				DDR = {
					set_cosmetic_tag = DDR_russian_puppet
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = paternal_autocrat
						name = DDR_russian_party
						long_name = DDR_russian_party
					}
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = paternal_autocrat
						elections_allowed = no
					}
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Pavel Bermondt-Avalov"
						desc = "POLITICS_PAVEL_BERMONDT_AVALOV_DESC"
						picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Pavel_Bermondt_Avalov.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = junta_subtype
					}
					add_stability = -0.04
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_authoritarian_government = yes
						has_country_leader = { name = "Roman I" ruling_only = yes }
					}
					has_unit_leader = 413				
				}
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 413 }
					set_nationality = DDR
				}
				DDR = {
					set_cosmetic_tag = DDR_russian_puppet
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = paternal_autocrat
						name = DDR_russian_party
						long_name = DDR_russian_party
					}
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = paternal_autocrat
						elections_allowed = no
					}
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Vladimir Manshteyn"
						picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Vladimir_von_Manstein.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = junta_subtype
					}
					add_stability = -0.04
				}
			}
			else = {
				DDR = { drop_cosmetic_tag = yes }
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.94.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_leader = {
				ruling_only = yes
				name = "Boris II"
			}
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = RUS_God_Save_the_Tsar }
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			kill_country_leader = yes
		}

country_event = { #Denikin's Death
	id = rusd.96
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.96" }
	title = rusd.96.t
	desc = {
		text = rusd.96.d.supreme
		trigger = { RUS_denikin_supreme_ruler = yes }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.96.d.hos
		trigger = { RUS_denikin_in_power = yes }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.96.d
		trigger = { RUS_denikin_in_power = no }
	}

	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.96.a
		trigger = {
			RUS_denikin_supreme_ruler = yes
		}
		set_country_flag = Anton_I_Denikin_dead
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 401 }
			retire = yes
		}
		remove_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Mikhail Levitov"
			desc = "POLITICS_MIKHAIL_LEVITOV_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Mikhail_Levitov.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = junta_subtype
			traits = { RUS_supreme_ruler }
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 412 }
			add_unit_leader_trait = politically_connected
			promote_to_marshal = yes
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Anton_I_Denikin_hog_pau }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			add_ideas = RUS_Mikhail_Levitov_hog_pau
		}	
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.96.b
		trigger = {
			RUS_denikin_in_power = no
		}
		set_country_flag = Anton_I_Denikin_dead
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 401 }
			retire = yes
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					RUS_denikin_in_power = no
					RUS_wrangel_tree_unlocked = no
					RUS_levitov_in_power = no
					RUS_drozdovites_in_power = no
					RUS_boldyrev_in_power = no
					RUS_arkhangelsky_in_power = no
					RUS_savinkov_in_power = no
					NOT = { has_government = paternal_autocrat }
				}
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Aleksey Arkhangelsky"
					desc = "POLITICS_ALEKSEY_ARKHANGELSKY_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Aleksey_Arkhangelsky_military.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.96.c
		trigger = {
			RUS_denikin_in_power = yes
			NOT = { has_country_leader_with_trait = RUS_supreme_ruler }
		}
		set_country_flag = Anton_I_Denikin_dead
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 412 }
			add_unit_leader_trait = politically_connected
			promote_to_marshal = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Anton_I_Denikin_hog_pau }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		}	
		RUS_remove_democratic_opposition = yes
		RUS_remove_kornilov_legacy = yes
		clr_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved		
		set_country_flag = RUS_early_elections
		RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_vvsr_presidency }
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_six_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 125 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				set_country_flag = RUS_president_elections_campaign
				RUS_calculate_polling_presidential_averages = yes
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_president_mission
				country_event = { #rsdrp primaries
					id = rusdem.53
					days = 7
				}
				country_event = { #psr primaries
					id = rusdem.54
					days = 10
				}
				country_event = { #kdp primaries
					id = rusdem.55
					days = 14
				}
				country_event = { #rkdp primaries
					id = rusdem.5501
					days = 17
				}
				country_event = { #vns primaries
					id = rusdem.56
					days = 20
				}
				country_event = { #nsnp primaries
					id = rusdem.58
					days = 23
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
			RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 401 }
				remove_unit_leader_trait = politically_connected
			}
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				country_event = rusdem.62
			}
		}	
	}
}

		}
	}
	title = {
		text = rusd.103.t.not_tsar
		trigger = {
			RUS_tsar_dmitriy = no
		}
	}

	desc = {
		text = rusd.103.d.tsar
		trigger = {
			RUS_tsar_dmitriy = yes
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.103.d.not_tsar
		trigger = {
			RUS_tsar_dmitriy = no
		}
	}

	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
	}
	
	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.103"
		set_country_flag = Dmitri_Pavlovich_Romanov_dead
		clr_country_flag = romanov_vns_candidate
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_DMI }
				set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_PAVEL
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_idea = RUS_Dmitri_Pavlovich_Romanov_eco_sco
				}
				remove_ideas = RUS_Dmitri_Pavlovich_Romanov_eco_sco
				add_ideas = RUS_Sergey_Bulgakov_eco_sco
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					NOT = { has_country_flag = VNS_oligarchic }
				}
				set_variable = { RUS_vns_minister_eco = token:RUS_Sergey_Bulgakov_eco_sco }
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.103.a
		trigger = {
			RUS_tsar_dmitriy = yes
		}
		effect_tooltip = { kill_country_leader = yes }
		RUS_setup_tsar_pavel = yes

	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.100.c
		trigger = {
			RUS_dmitriy_romanov_in_power = yes
		}
		add_stability = -0.02
		hidden_effect = {
			RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusd.103.c
		trigger = {
			RUS_tsar_dmitriy = no
			RUS_dmitriy_romanov_in_power = no
		}
	}

		clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev
		set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 3 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = -0.05 
			tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor = -0.05 
			tooltip = production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_speed_arms_factory_factor = 0.05
			tooltip = arms_factory_construction_speed_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_industrial_capacity_factory = 0.10
			tooltip = industrial_capacity_factory_tooltip
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.137.e
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
				}
			}
		}
		trigger = { 
			SOV_any_bolshevik_in_power = yes
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev
				has_idea = RUS_Valerian_Kuybyshev_eco_tot
			}
			NOT = { has_country_flag = rsrpi_banned }
		}
		clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev
		hidden_effect = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Valerian_Kuybyshev_eco_tot }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
			if = {
				limit = { SOV_kaganovich_in_power = yes }
				add_ideas = RUS_Mikhail_M_Kaganovich_eco_tot
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { 
					SOV_molotov_in_power = no
					SOV_zinoviev_in_power = no
				}
				add_ideas = RUS_Nikolay_Voznesensky_eco_rso
			}
			else = {
				add_ideas = RUS_Lazar_Kaganovich_eco_tot
			}
		}
		}
		set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_speed_buildings_factor = -0.05 
			tooltip = construction_speed_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = 0.05 
			tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor = -0.05 
			tooltip = production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.10
			tooltip = production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_research_speed_factor = 0.03
			tooltip = research_speed_factor_tooltip
		}
	}
}

	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.174.d.failure_2
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure_2
		}
	}

		}
	}

				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_research
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_research_bonus
			}
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.174.d.military_research_failure
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_industry_research
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_industry_research_bonus
			}
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure
		}
	}

	### Effects

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {
		hidden_effect = { RUS_pick_zemstvo_states = yes }
	}

	#SOCIAL
	option = { #new hospitals
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_hospital
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		RUS_calculate_zemstva_variables = yes
		multiply_temp_variable = { RUS_zemstvo_base_value = 0.001 }
		add_stability = RUS_zemstvo_base_value
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #new schools
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_schools
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		RUS_calculate_zemstva_variables = yes
		add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_zemstvo_base_value = 25 }
		add_political_power = RUS_zemstvo_base_value
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #housing programme
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_housing
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		RUS_calculate_zemstva_variables = yes
		multiply_temp_variable = { RUS_zemstvo_base_value = 0.001 }
		add_war_support = RUS_zemstvo_base_value
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #failed civil investments
		name = rusd.174.b
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_hospital
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_housing
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_schools
			}
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure
		}
		RUS_calculate_zemstva_variables = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_hospital }
			multiply_temp_variable = { RUS_zemstvo_base_value = -0.001 }
			add_stability = RUS_zemstvo_base_value
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_housing }
			multiply_temp_variable = { RUS_zemstvo_base_value = -0.001 }
			add_war_support = RUS_zemstvo_base_value
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_schools }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_zemstvo_base_value = 25 }
			multiply_temp_variable = { RUS_zemstvo_base_value = -1 }
			add_political_power = RUS_zemstvo_base_value
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	#INDUSTRY
	option = { #industrial expansion
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_civilian_industry
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_1 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_civilian_factory = yes }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment
					has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment
				}
			}
			event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_2 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_civilian_factory = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_3 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_civilian_factory = yes }
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #production increase
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_industry
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_1 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_military_factory = yes }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment
					has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment
				}
			}
			event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_2 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_military_factory = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_3 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_military_factory = yes }
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #infrastructure expansion
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_infrastructure
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_1 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_infrastructure = yes }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment
					has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment
				}

		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_3 = { RUS_zemstvo_add_infrastructure = yes }
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #agricultural development
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_agriculture
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_1 = { add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment
					has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment
				}
			}
			event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_2 = { add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_3 = { add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1 }
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #refinery built
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_synthetics
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		event_target:RUS_zemstvo_state_1 = {
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
			add_building_construction = {
				type = synthetic_refinery
				level = 1
				instant_build = yes
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #failed industrial investment
		name = rusd.174.b
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_civilian_industry
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_industry
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_infrastructure
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_agriculture
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_synthetics
			}
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_bad_investment
				days = 180
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_bad_investment
				days = 120
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_bad_investment
				days = 60
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	#RESEARCH 

	option = { #industrial research advance
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_industry_research
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		clr_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_industry_research
		if = { # big investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			add_tech_bonus = {
				name = RUS_zemsvto_research
				bonus = 0.6
				uses = 1
				category = industry
				category = electronics
			}
		}
		else_if = { # medium investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment }
			add_tech_bonus = {
				name = RUS_zemsvto_research
				bonus = 0.4
				uses = 1
				category = industry
				category = electronics
			}
		}
		else = { # small investment
			add_tech_bonus = {
				name = RUS_zemsvto_research
				bonus = 0.2
				uses = 1
				category = industry
				category = electronics
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #industrial research breakthrough
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_industry_research_bonus
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		if = { # big investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_civil_research_positive
				days = 270
			}
		}
		else_if = { # medium investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_civil_research_positive
				days = 180
			}
		}
		else = { # small investment
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_civil_research_positive
				days = 90
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #industrial research setback
		name = rusd.174.b
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_industry_research
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_industry_research_bonus
			}
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure
		}
		if = { # big investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_civil_research_negative
				days = 270
			}
		}
		else_if = { # medium investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment }
			remove_ideas = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_civil_research_negative
				days = 180
			}
		}
		else = { # small investment
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_civil_research_negative
				days = 90
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #military research advance
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_research
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		if = { # big investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			remove_ideas = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment
			add_tech_bonus = {
				name = RUS_zemsvto_research
				bonus = 0.6
				uses = 1
				category = armor
				category = air_equipment
				category = artillery
				category = infantry_tech
			}
		}
		else_if = { # medium investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment }
			remove_ideas = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment
			add_tech_bonus = {
				name = RUS_zemsvto_research
				bonus = 0.4
				uses = 1
				category = armor
				category = air_equipment
				category = artillery
				category = infantry_tech
			}
		}
		else = { # small investment
			add_tech_bonus = {
				name = RUS_zemsvto_research
				bonus = 0.2
				uses = 1
				category = armor
				category = air_equipment
				category = artillery
				category = infantry_tech
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #military research breakthrough
		name = rusd.174.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_research_bonus
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure }
		}
		if = { # big investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_military_research_positive
				days = 270
			}
		}
		else_if = { # medium investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_military_research_positive
				days = 180
			}
		}
		else = { # small investment
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_military_research_positive
				days = 90
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

	option = { #military research setback
		name = rusd.174.b
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_research
				has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_military_research_bonus
			}
			has_country_flag = RUS_zemstvo_failure
		}
		if = { # big investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_large_zemstvo_investment }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_military_research_negative
				days = 270
			}
		}
		else_if = { # medium investment
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment }
			remove_ideas = RUS_increased_zemstvo_investment
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_military_research_negative
				days = 180
			}
		}
		else = { # small investment
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = RUS_zemstva_military_research_negative
				days = 90
			}
		}
		RUS_clear_zemstvo_data = yes
	}

country_event = { #Anniversary
	id = rusd.180
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.180"}
	picture = GFX_rus_day_after
	title = rusd.180.t
	desc = rusd.180.d
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		RUS = {
			RUS_is_democracy = yes
			RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = no
		}
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.180.a
		if = {
			limit = { 
				RUS_russian_monarch = yes
				RUS_tsar_kirill = no
				RUS_tsar_vladimir = no
			}
			add_political_power = 15
			add_stability = -0.01
		}
		else = {
			add_political_power = 25
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.180
				days = 365
			}
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #Rakhaminov
	id = rusd.181
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.181" }
	title = rusd.181.t
	desc = rusd.181.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_rakhmaninov
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
		american_civil_war = yes
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.181.a
		add_political_power = 15
	}
}

country_event = { #Bunin
	id = rusd.190
	immediate = { 
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.190" 
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					OR = {
						has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_avoided_flag
						has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_over_flag
					}
				}
				random_other_country = {
					limit = { 
						is_american_tag = yes
						has_socialist_government = no
						has_dictatorship_government = no
					}
					save_event_target_as = target 
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { 
					country_exists = CAN
					CAN = { 
						has_socialist_government = no
						has_dictatorship_government = no
						is_valid_peace_target = yes
					}
				}
				CAN = { save_event_target_as = target }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { 
					country_exists = SWE
					SWE = { 
						has_socialist_government = no
						has_dictatorship_government = no
						is_valid_peace_target = yes
						has_war = no
					}
				}
				SWE = { save_event_target_as = target }
			}
			else = {
				random_other_country = {
					limit = { 
						has_socialist_government = no
						has_dictatorship_government = no
						is_valid_peace_target = yes
						has_war = no
						is_actual_major = yes
						OR = {
							is_in_americas = yes
							is_in_australia = yes
						}
					}
					save_event_target_as = target
				}
			}
		}
	}
	title = rusd.190.t
	desc = rusd.190.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_bunin
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = { 
		OR = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			nsp_in_power = yes
			rsdrp_in_power = yes
			lpsr_in_power = yes
		}
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.190.a
		add_political_power = -10
	}
}
country_event = { #Bunin
	id = rusd.191
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.191" }
	title = rusd.191.t
	desc = rusd.191.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_bunin

			lpsr_in_power = yes
		}
	}

	}

country_event = { #Unlock political decisions
	id = russoc.1
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.1"}
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_revolution
	title = russoc.1.t
	desc = russoc.1.d
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {#Popular Front decision
		name = russoc.1.a
		add_stability = 0.05
		custom_effect_tooltip = unlock_congress_tt
		set_country_flag = unlock_congress_sov
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = rus_brest_litovsk }
			remove_ideas = rus_brest_litovsk
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = rus_brest_litovsk_1 }
			remove_ideas = rus_brest_litovsk_1
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_idea = RUS_Vladimir_K_Volsky_hog_rso }
				}
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = radical_socialist
					name = RUS_radical_socialist_party
					long_name = RUS_radical_socialist_party_long
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.2
				days = 4
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.141
				days = 288
				random_days = 600
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.156
				days = 88
				random_days = 250
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.108
				days = 110
				random_days = 40
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.109
				days = 180
				random_days = 30
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.109
				days = 590
				random_days = 120
			}
		}
	}	
}

country_event = { #Nationalization of Banks?
	id = russoc.4
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.4"}
	title = russoc.4.t
	desc = russoc.4.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.4.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_NSP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PSR }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_MENSHEVIKS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_revolution_psr_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_revolution_mensheviks_ai
				}
			}
		}
		SOV_soviet_congress_increase_rkp = yes
		SOV_soviet_congress_increase_plsr = yes
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_old_guard = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_constitution_modifier
		add_to_variable = {
			SOV_soviet_constitution_political_power_factor = 0.05
			tooltip = pp_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			SOV_soviet_constitution_consumer_goods_factor = 0.15
			tooltip = consumer_goods_factor_tooltip
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.5 days = 2 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.4.b
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR }

		}

		SOV_soviet_congress_increase_nsp = yes
		SOV_soviet_congress_increase_rsdrp = yes
		SOV_soviet_congress_increase_nrpr = yes

		}

			SOV_soviet_constitution_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor = -0.05
			tooltip = production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			SOV_soviet_constitution_consumer_goods_factor = 0.10
			tooltip = consumer_goods_factor_tooltip
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.8.c
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 35
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_NSP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PSR }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR_CHEKA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR_LEGALIST }
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_revolution_psr_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_revolution_left_sr_ai
				}
			}
		}
		SOV_soviet_congress_increase_rsdrp = yes		
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_constitution_modifier
		add_to_variable = {
			SOV_soviet_constitution_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor = 0.10
			tooltip = production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			SOV_soviet_constitution_consumer_goods_factor = 0.05
			tooltip = consumer_goods_factor_tooltip
		}

country_event = {#Foreign Policy
	id = russoc.9
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.9"}
	title = russoc.9.t
	desc = russoc.9.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_internationale_question
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.9.b
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { country_exists = INT } }
			save_global_event_target_as = KR_internationale_leader
			set_global_flag = FRA_created_phalanstere
			FRA_add_to_phalanstere = yes
			if = {
				limit = { is_faction_leader = no }
				create_faction_from_template = { 
					template = faction_template_internationale_successor   
					name = Third_International
					icon = GFX_faction_third_internationale
				}
				else = {
					set_faction_name = Third_International
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { is_faction_leader = no }
				create_faction_from_template = { 
					template = faction_template_internationale              
					name = fourth_internationale
					icon = GFX_faction_fourth_internationale
				}
				else = {
					set_faction_name = fourth_internationale
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_global_flag = FRA_created_phalanstere }
				FRA_add_to_phalanstere = yes
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			INT = {
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = non_aggression_pact
				}
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			every_other_country = {
				limit = {
					is_subject = no
					is_in_faction_with = INT
					NOT = {
						tag = INT
						tag = FIN
						tag = EST
						tag = LAT
						tag = LIT
						tag = WHR
						tag = UKR
						tag = POL
					}
				}
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = non_aggression_pact
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					INT = {
						any_allied_country = {
							OR = {
								tag = FIN
								tag = EST
								tag = LAT
								tag = LIT
								tag = WHR
								tag = UKR
								tag = POL
								tag = GEO
								tag = BUL
								tag = ARM
								tag = ABK
								tag = PER
							}
							is_subject = no
						}
					}
				}
				custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
				every_other_country = {
					limit = {
						is_subject = no
						is_in_faction_with = INT
						OR = {
							tag = FIN
							tag = EST
							tag = LAT
							tag = LIT
							tag = WHR
							tag = UKR
							tag = POL
							tag = GEO
							tag = BUL
							tag = ARM
							tag = ABK
							tag = PER
						}
					}
					country_event = russoc.114
				}
			}
		}
	}

		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.12
				days = 60
			}
		}
	}

			remove_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_boost_psr }

			remove_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_boost_rsdrp }

	}

		name = russoc.12.a

					check_variable = { SOV_plsr_votes > SOV_psr_votes } 
					check_variable = { SOV_plsr_votes > SOV_rsdrp_votes }

					is_ai = yes

				id = russoc.154
				days = 180
				random_days = 60
			}			
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.12.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = psr_banned }
			OR = {
				AND = {					
					check_variable = { SOV_psr_votes > SOV_nsp_votes } 
					check_variable = { SOV_psr_votes > SOV_plsr_votes } 
					check_variable = { SOV_psr_votes > SOV_rsdrp_votes } 
				}
				AND = {

						has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PSR }

			name = RUS_social_liberal_party

				days = 180

			}

				days = 60
				random_days = 20
			}	
		}

country_event = { #Famine
	id = russoc.23
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.23"}
	title = russoc.23.t
	desc = russoc.23.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.23.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				has_state_category = one
				has_state_category = two 
				has_state_category = three
				has_state_category = four
				has_state_category = five
			}
			add_state_modifier = {
				modifier = {
					local_resources = 0.15
					local_supplies = 0.15
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.23.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
		add_political_power = -50
	}	
}

	title = russoc.24.t
	desc = russoc.24.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.24.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
		}
		for_each_scope_loop = {
			array = RUS.RUS_starting_states_array
			add_state_modifier = {
				modifier = {
					local_manpower = 0.3
					local_resources = 0.15
				}
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { has_resistance = yes }
			add_compliance = 5
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_completed_focus = RUS_Alliance_With_Left_SRs
			}
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_Eurasian_Bolsheviks_1
				add_idea = RUS_Eurasian_Bolsheviks_2
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.23.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
		add_stability = 0.1
		add_political_power = 100
		increase_ruling_party_popularity_by_3 = yes
	}

			set_variable = { RUS_profintern_political_power = 0 }
			set_variable = { RUS_profintern_max_efficiency = 0 }
			set_variable = { RUS_profintern_construction_speed = 0 }
			set_variable = { RUS_profintern_factory_output = 0 }
			set_variable = { RUS_profintern_factories = 0 }
			set_variable = { RUS_profintern_socdem_bonus = 0 }
		}
	}
	title = russoc.25.t
	desc = russoc.25.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_profintern
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.25.a
		add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_profintern_leader_modifier }
		hidden_effect = { add_ideas = SOV_profintern_leader }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_profintern_political_power = 0.01 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_profintern_max_efficiency = 0.01 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_profintern_construction_speed = 0.01 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_profintern_factory_output = 0.01 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_profintern_factories = 1 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_profintern_socdem_bonus = 0.02 }
		every_other_country = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_socialist_government = yes
					has_government = social_democrat
				}
				NOT = { 
					is_in_faction_with = ENT 
					tag = AUS
					is_subject_of = AUS
					is_in_faction_with = AUS
					is_in_faction_with = GER
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.26
				days = 3
				random_days = 12
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Chekist
	id = russoc.37
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.37"}
	title = russoc.37.t
	desc = russoc.37.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_sr_coup
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.37.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR_LEGALIST }					
			}
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
		add_ideas = RUS_Iosif_M_Ostrovsky_eco_syn
		SOV_increase_chekist = yes
		SOV_decrease_legalist = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_syn = RUS.party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_tot = RUS.party_popularity_100@totalist }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_totalist = RUS_new_syn }
			if = {
				limit = {
					check_variable = { RUS_new_syn > 25 }
				}
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_syn = -25 }
			}
			else = {
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_syn = 0 }
			}

			set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_tot }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_syn }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_tot = sum } #avoid rounding errors

			set_popularities = {
				totalist = RUS_new_tot
				syndicalist = RUS_new_syn
				radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
				social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
				social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
				market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
				social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
				authoritarian_democrat = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat
				paternal_autocrat = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat
				national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
			}
		}
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = totalist
			elections_allowed = no
		}
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Yakov Fishman"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_SOV_Yakov_Fishman.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = socialist_security_state_subtype
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = totalist
			name = RUS_fishman_party
			long_name = RUS_fishman_party_long
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 430 }
			retire = yes
		}
		add_ideas = SOV_fishman_councils
		hidden_effect = {
            remove_ideas ={
				RUS_councils
				peasant_councils
				SOV_decentralized_syndicates
			}
		}		
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.37.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 90
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR_CHEKA }
			}
		}
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Maria_A_Spiridonova_hog_syn
			RUS_Vladimir_A_Karelin_for_syn
			RUS_Isaak_Z_Shteinberg_eco_syn
			RUS_Vladimir_E_Trutovskiy_sec_syn
		}
		SOV_decrease_chekist = yes
		hidden_effect = { SOV_decrease_chekist = yes }
		SOV_increase_legalist = yes		
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Vladimir Trutovsky"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_SOV_Vladimir_Trutovsky.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = anarcho_syndicalist_subtype
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 430 }
			if = {
				limit = { is_field_marshal = no }
				promote_leader = yes
			}
		}
		unlock_national_focus = SOV_Left_SR_Countercoup
	}	
}

country_event = { #Dissolution
	id = russoc.43
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.43"}
	title = russoc.43.t
	desc = russoc.43.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.43.a
		add_stability = -0.25
	}
}
country_event = { #Dissolution
	id = russoc.44
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.44"}
	title = russoc.44.t
	desc = russoc.44.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.44.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 90
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					state = 792
					state = 201
					state = 199
					state = 1228
					state = 198
				}
			}
			remove_core_of = ROOT
			add_claim_by = ROOT
			add_to_array = { global.RUS_integration_state_array = PREV }
			add_core_of = UKR
			transfer_state_to = UKR
		}
		UKR = {
			set_politics = {
				ruling_party = totalist
				elections_allowed = no
			}
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Oleksander Shumsky"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/UKR/Portrait_UKR_Oleksander_Shumsky.png" 
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = national_communism_subtype
			}
			set_political_party = {
				ideology = totalist
				popularity = 30
			}
			clear_all_relations = yes
		}
		declare_war_on = {
			target = UKR
			type = annex_everything
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.44.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = no
				OR = {
					is_core_of = UKR
					is_core_of = WSU
					is_core_of = GAL
					is_east_galicia = yes
				}
			}
			remove_core_of = ROOT
			add_core_of = UKR
			transfer_state_to = UKR
		}
		UKR = {
			set_politics = {
				ruling_party = totalist
				elections_allowed = no
			}
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Oleksander Shumsky"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/UKR/Portrait_UKR_Oleksander_Shumsky.png" 
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = national_communism_subtype
			}
			set_political_party = {
				ideology = totalist
				popularity = 30
			}
			clear_all_relations = yes
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.48
				days = 2
			}
		}		
	}	
}

					popularity = 30
				}

					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_TUKHA }

			has_unit_leader = 1954
			has_unit_leader = 1955
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.63.d2
		trigger = {
			NOT = { 
				has_unit_leader = 1954
				has_unit_leader = 1955
			}
		}
	}

		name = russoc.63.a

						has_unit_leader_flag = SOV_british_clique
					}
				}
				retire = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_thermidor_no_kirov }
			set_politics = { ruling_party = syndicalist }
			add_popularity = { ideology = syndicalist popularity = 0.10 }
			set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_dissolved
			remove_all_ministers = yes
