				RUS_Maria_A_Spiridonova_hog_syn
				RUS_Vladimir_A_Karelin_for_syn
				RUS_Isaak_Z_Shteinberg_eco_syn
				RUS_Vladimir_E_Trutovskiy_sec_syn
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Premier_Spiridonova } }
				complete_national_focus = SOV_Premier_Spiridonova
			}
			set_country_flag = nsp_banned
		}
		else = {
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Sergey Kirov"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Sergey_Kirov.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = radsoc_communism_subtype 
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Down_With_Nep }
				}
				set_country_leader_ideology = bukharinist_subtype
				custom_effect_tooltip = radsoc_bukharinist_subtype_swap_tt
			}
			set_politics = { ruling_party = radical_socialist elections_allowed = yes }
			add_popularity = { ideology = syndicalist popularity = 0.10 }
			add_popularity = { ideology = social_democrat popularity = 0.10 }
			add_synd_to_coalition = yes
			add_socdem_to_coalition = yes
			remove_all_ministers = yes
			add_ideas = {
				RUS_Sergey_M_Kirov_hog_rso
				RUS_Aleksandra_M_Kollontai_for_syn
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_sokolnikov_is_bukharinist }
				add_ideas = {
					RUS_Aleksandr_Shlyapnikov_eco_syn
					RUS_Vladimir_E_Trutovskiy_sec_syn
				}
			}
			else = {
				add_ideas = {
					RUS_Grigory_Sokolnikov_eco_rso
					RUS_Vladimir_E_Trutovskiy_sec_syn
				}
			}
			complete_national_focus = SOV_Victory_Of_Old_Bolsheviks
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = {
					id = russoc.25
					days = 14
					random_days = 50
				}
				country_event = {
					id = russoc.73
					days = 50
					random_days = 150
				}
				country_event = {
					id = russoc.143
					days = 120
					random_days = 200
				}
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			set_variable = { SOV_plsr_votes = SOV_plsr_votes_old }
			set_variable = { SOV_psr_votes = SOV_psr_votes_old }
			set_variable = { SOV_nsp_votes = SOV_nsp_votes_old }
			set_variable = { SOV_rsdrp_votes = SOV_rsdrp_votes_old }
			set_variable = { SOV_total_votes = SOV_plsr_votes }			
			add_to_variable = { SOV_total_votes = SOV_psr_votes }			
			add_to_variable = { SOV_total_votes = SOV_rsdrp_votes }			
			add_to_variable = { SOV_total_votes = SOV_nsp_votes }			
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_unit_leader_flag = SOV_french_clique
						has_unit_leader_flag = SOV_british_clique
					}
				}
				set_nationality = XXA
			}
		}
	}

			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = radsoc_red_junta_subtype
		}

			limit = {

			}

			ideology = radical_socialist

				days = 2
			}
		}
		else = {			
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.69
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}	
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.70
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.70"}
	title = russoc.70.t
	desc = russoc.70.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.70.a		
		add_ideas = RUS_Left_SR_Arrogance
		add_stability = -0.1
		add_timed_idea = {
			idea = rus_minor_strike
			days = 90
		}
		set_politics = { ruling_party = syndicalist elections_allowed = no }		
		RUS_decrease_nsp_pop_large = yes
		RUS_decrease_rsdrp_pop_large = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		hidden_effect = {
			set_variable = { SOV_nsp_votes = 0 } 
			set_variable = { SOV_rsdrp_votes = 0 } 
			add_to_variable = { SOV_plsr_votes = SOV_psr_votes }
			set_variable = { SOV_psr_votes = 0 }
			set_variable = { SOV_nrpr_votes = 0 }
			set_variable = { SOV_total_votes = SOV_plsr_votes } 
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.65
				days = 7
			}
		}
	}	
}

				long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long

			set_party_name = {

				name = RUS_radical_socialist_party
				long_name = SOV_lozovsky_kirov_party_long
			}

	}

			RUS_Mikhail_Tukhachevskiy_hog_tot
			RUS_Iona_Yakir_for_tot
			RUS_Ieronim_Uborevich_eco_tot
			RUS_Vitaliy_Primakov_sec_tot
		}
		set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_tukhachevsky
		set_country_flag = tukhachevsky_power
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = totalist
			long_name = SOV_tukh_party_long
			name = SOV_tukh_party
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = zinoviev_supported_tukha
			}
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			add_ideas = RUS_Grigoriy_Y_Zinoviev_hog_tot
		}
		clr_country_flag = SOV_Troika_power_struggle
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = totalist
			elections_allowed = no
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.159
				days = 180
				random_days = 600
			}
		} 
		
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.85.c
		trigger = {
			has_unit_leader = 1955
		}			
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_TUKHA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_ZHUKOV }
				}
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = { retire_country_leader = yes }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Mikhail Frunze"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Mikhail_Frunze.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = red_junta_subtype
		}
		set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_tukhachevsky
		set_country_flag = tukhachevsky_power
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = totalist
			long_name = SOV_frunze_party_long
			name = SOV_frunze_party
		}
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Mikhail_V_Frunze_hog_tot
			RUS_Robert_P_Eydeman_for_tot
			RUS_Avgust_I_Kork_eco_tot
			RUS_Vladimir_Antonov_Ovseyenko_sec_tot
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = zinoviev_supported_frunze
			}
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			add_ideas = RUS_Grigoriy_Y_Zinoviev_hog_tot
		}
		clr_country_flag = SOV_Troika_power_struggle
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.159
				days = 180
				random_days = 600
			}
		} 
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = totalist
			elections_allowed = no
		}
	}
}

	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.100" }
	title = russoc.100.t
	desc = russoc.100.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_diplomacy3

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = russoc.100.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
		every_other_country = {
			limit = { 
				is_in_faction_with = FROM
				NOT = { is_subject_of = FROM }
			}
			INT = { add_to_faction = PREV }
		}
		add_to_faction = FROM
		FROM = { add_ideas = SOV_INT_industrialisation }
	}

	option = {
		name = russoc.100.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 50
				POL = { has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_POL }
				FROM = { has_idea = SOV_polrevkom }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 10				
				FROM = {
					has_government = totalist
					NOT = { 
						has_idea = RUS_Karl_Radek_for_tot 
						has_idea = RUS_Osip_A_Piatnitsky_for_tot 
					}
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.101
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
}

			NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = FROM }
		}
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_Young_Pioneers

		FROM = { is_in_faction = yes }
	}

				factor = 0
				has_government = totalist
				FROM = {

						is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = { is_faction_leader = yes }
			}
			FROM = { add_to_faction = ROOT }
		}
		else = {
			var:FROM.faction_leader = { country_event = russoc.116 }
		}
	}

	option = {

				has_government = totalist
			}

				}
			}
		}

	id = russoc.1153
	title = russoc.116.t

	desc = {
		text = russoc.116.d.guaranteed
		trigger = {
			FROM = { is_guaranteed_by = RUS }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.116.d.invited
		trigger = {
			FROM = { NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = RUS } }
		}
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_Young_Pioneers

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event russoc.1153 option russoc.116.a"
		name = russoc.116.a #Welcome, comrades
		add_to_faction = FROM
		hidden_effect = {
			RUS = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = { is_claim_or_core_of_FROM = yes }
					transfer_state_to = FROM
				}
			}
			FROM = {
				every_owned_state = {
					if = {
						limit = { is_claimed_by = RUS }
						remove_claim_by = RUS
					}
					if = {
						limit = { is_core_of = RUS }
						remove_core_of = RUS
					}
				}
				country_event = russoc.1180
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event russoc.1153 option russoc.116.b"
		name = russoc.116.b #No, we don't need them
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
		FROM = { country_event = russoc.118 }
	}
}

	desc = russoc.119.d

	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.119.a #Accept
		trigger = {
			has_socialist_government = no
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_country_flag = GEO_end_treaty
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = POL
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = DKB
				don_is_pro_german = no
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = KUB
				KUB_has_chernomortsy = no
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = FIN
				NOT = { has_government = paternal_autocrat }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = KLY
				has_socialist_government = yes
			}
		}
		GER = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.120
				days = 1
				random = 24
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					tag = DKB
				}
				every_other_country = {
					limit = {
						tag = KLY
						has_war = no
						is_subject = no
						is_in_faction = no

						id = russoc.119
						days = 2

				}

						tag = AZE
						has_war = no
						is_subject = no
						is_in_faction = no

				has_dictatorship_government = yes
			}

				factor = 4
				tag = MTR
				NOT = { has_government = paternal_autocrat }
			}
		}

country_event = { #Kirov Humanism
	id = russoc.144
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.144"}
	title = russoc.144.t
	desc = russoc.144.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kirovchad
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.144.a
		add_stability = 0.05
		add_popularity = {
			ideology = radical_socialist
			popularity = 0.06
		}
		add_popularity = {
			ideology = social_democrat
			popularity = 0.06
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					has_country_flag = RUS_vi_congress_internationalists 
					has_country_flag = SOV_nsp_union_with_rsdrp 
				}
				set_politics = {
					ruling_party = social_democrat
					elections_allowed = yes
				}
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Sergey Kirov"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Sergey_Kirov_gigachad.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = socdem_democratic_socialism_subtype
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_rkp_united }
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = radical_socialist
						name = SOV_kamenev_party
						long_name = SOV_kamenev_party_long
					}
				}
				else = {
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = social_democrat
						name = SOV_rnsp_socdem_party
						long_name = SOV_rnsp_socdem_party_long
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Down_With_Nep }
					}
					set_country_leader_ideology = socdem_humanistic_capitalism_subtype
					custom_effect_tooltip = socdem_socdem_humanistic_capitalism_subtype_swap_tt
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Down_With_Nep }
					has_government = radical_socialist
				}
				set_country_leader_ideology = radsoc_humanistic_capitalism_subtype
				custom_effect_tooltip = radsoc_radsoc_humanistic_capitalism_subtype_swap_tt
			}
		}
	}
}

	id = russoc.160
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.160"}
	title = russoc.160.t
	desc = russoc.160.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_New_Economic_Policy_modifier} }
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_price_control
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.160.a
		RUS_nep_increase_market = yes
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_production_speed_buildings_factor = -0.1
			tooltip = construction_speed_tooltip
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.162
				days = 170
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.160.b
		set_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^19 = 3 }
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_nep_increase_state
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_nep_increase_worker
		add_to_variable = { RUS_nep_market = -1 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_nep_state = 1 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_nep_peasant = -1 }
		add_to_variable = { RUS_nep_worker = 1 }
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_modify_nep	
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_consumer_goods_factor = 0.08
			tooltip = consumer_goods_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_monthly_population = -0.03
			tooltip = monthly_population_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_local_resources_factor = -0.02
			tooltip = local_resources_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_line_change_production_efficiency_factor = 0.01
			tooltip = line_change_production_efficiency_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_industrial_capacity_factory = 0.04
			tooltip = industrial_capacity_factory_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor = 0.03
			tooltip = production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = {
			RUS_NEP_production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.06

		}		
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.161
				days = 170
			}
		}
	}

		RUS_decrease_rsdrp_pop_large = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		hidden_effect = {
			set_variable = { SOV_plsr_votes_old = SOV_plsr_votes }
			set_variable = { SOV_psr_votes_old = SOV_psr_votes }
			set_variable = { SOV_rsdrp_votes_old = SOV_rsdrp_votes }
			set_variable = { SOV_nsp_votes_old = SOV_nsp_votes }
			set_variable = { SOV_nrpr_votes_old = SOV_nrpr_votes }
			set_variable = { SOV_plsr_votes = 0 } 
			set_variable = { SOV_psr_votes = 0 } 
			set_variable = { SOV_nrpr_votes = 0 }
			set_variable = { SOV_rsdrp_votes = 0 } 
			set_variable = { SOV_total_votes = SOV_nsp_votes }
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.60
				days = 7
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.71
				days = 12
			}
			SOV_calculate_politburo_factions = yes 
		}
	}	
}

			SOV_change_politburo_workers_opposition = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Bukharin_Faction }

			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = radsoc_syndicalist_subtype
			traits = { trade_union_boss }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 3 }
		SOV_change_politburo_workers_opposition = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.185.b
		trigger = { has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_workers_opposition_tomsky }
		clr_country_flag = SOV_congress_elections_after_nep
		clr_country_flag = SOV_congress_elections_after_nep_success
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Mikhail_Tomskiy_hog_rso
			RUS_Georgiy_M_Malenkov_for_rso
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_decided_to_go_down_with_nep }
			add_ideas = { RUS_Nikolay_Voznesensky_eco_rso }
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_voznesensky }
				}
				clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
				clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin
				clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich
				clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev
				clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_smilga
				clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_preobrazhensky
				clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_krzhizhanovsky
				set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_voznesensky
				custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
				add_to_variable = { 
					SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = 0.05
					tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
				}
				add_to_variable = { 
					SOV_gosplan_local_resources_factor = 0.05 
					tooltip = local_resources_factor_tooltip
				}
				add_to_variable = { 
					SOV_gosplan_production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05 
					tooltip = production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor_tooltip
				}
				add_to_variable = { 
					SOV_gosplan_political_power_factor = 0.05
					tooltip = pp_factor_tooltip
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = { RUS_Nikolay_D_Kondratiev_eco_rso }
		}
		add_ideas = { RUS_Nikolay_Uglanov_sec_rso }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Mikhail Tomsky"
			desc = "POLITICS_MIKHAIL_TOMSKY_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Mikhail_Tomsky.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = radsoc_communism_subtype
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Down_With_Nep }
			}
			set_country_leader_ideology = bukharinist_subtype
			custom_effect_tooltip = radsoc_bukharinist_subtype_swap_tt
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 3 }
		SOV_change_politburo_workers_opposition = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
	}
}

					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_NSP_KUZNETSOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_GASTEV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_kuznetsov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_gastev_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_dissolved
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Aleksandra Kollontai"
			desc = "POLITICS_ALEXANDRA_KOLLONTAI_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Aleksandra_Kollontai.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = feminist_syndicalist_subtype 
			female = yes
		}
		SOV_turn_nsp_into_syndicalist = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Negotiate_With_New_Life }
			add_socdem_to_coalition = yes
		}
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.193
			days = 4
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.192.c
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_NSP_SHLYAPNIKOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_GASTEV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_workers_opposition_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_gastev_ai
				}
			}
		}
		trigger = { has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_kuznetsov_petrograd }
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_dissolved		
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Aleksey Kuznetsov"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Aleksey_Kuznetsov.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = syn_natsynd_subtype
		}
		SOV_turn_nsp_into_syndicalist = yes
		set_country_flag = natsynd_victorous
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		add_ideas = RUS_Aleksey_Kuznetsov_hog_rso 
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Negotiate_With_New_Life }
			add_socdem_to_coalition = yes
		}
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.193
			days = 4
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.192.e
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_NSP_SHLYAPNIKOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_NSP_KUZNETSOV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_kuznetsov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_workers_opposition_ai
				}
			}
		}
		trigger = { has_idea = SOV_proletkult_gastev }
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_dissolved		
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Aleksei Gastev"
			desc = "POLITICS_ALEKSEI_GASTEV_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_SOV_Aleksei_Gastev.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = centralized_syndicalism_subtype
		}
		SOV_turn_nsp_into_syndicalist = yes
		set_country_flag = natsynd_victorous
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		add_ideas = RUS_Aleksei_Gastev_hog_syn
		complete_national_focus = SOV_Chairman_Gastev
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Negotiate_With_New_Life }
			add_socdem_to_coalition = yes
		}
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.193
			days = 4
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.193
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.193"}
	title = russoc.193.t
	desc = russoc.193.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.193.a	
		set_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_psp
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Isaak Shteinberg"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Isaak_Steinberg.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = radsoc_anarcho_syndicalist_subtype
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = radical_socialist
			name = RUS_syndicalist_party
			long_name = RUS_syndicalist_party_long
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.193.b
		set_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_psp
		if = {
			limit = { 
				SOV_kuznetsov_in_power = yes
				has_country_flag = SOV_ryutin_is_in_politburo
			}
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Martemyan Ryutin"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Martemyan_Ryutin.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = market_leninism_subtype 
				traits = { SOV_peasant_propagandist }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					TRM = { has_country_leader = { name = "Martemyan Ryutin" ruling_only = yes } }
				}
				TRM = {
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Aleksandr Krasnoshchyekov"
						desc = "POLITICS_KRASNOSHCHYEKOV_DESC"
						picture = "gfx/leaders/TRM/Portrait_TRM_Alexander_Krasnoshchyokov.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = bukharinist_subtype
					}
					remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
					add_ideas = TRM_Alexander_Krasnoshchyokov_hog_rso
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { has_country_flag = Aleksey_Rykov_dead }
			}
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Aleksey Rykov"
				desc = "POLITICS_ALEKSEY_RYKOV_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Aleksey_Rykov.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = radsoc_communism_subtype 
				traits = { SOV_partisan_of_nep }
			}
		}
		else = {			
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Lev Kamenev"
				desc = "POLITICS_LEV_KAMENEV_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_SOV_Lev_Kamenev.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = radsoc_communism_subtype
			}
		}		
	}
}

	id = russoc.194
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.194"}
	title = russoc.194.t
	desc = russoc.194.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { 
		OR = {
			has_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka 
			has_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka_lar
		}
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_vchk
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.194.a
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka_lar }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka_lar
				add_idea = SOV_gpu_nkvd_lar
			}
		}
		else = {
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka
				add_idea = SOV_gpu_nkvd
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.194.b
		add_stability = 0.05
		add_political_power = -25
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes		
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka_lar }
			remove_ideas = RUS_Restored_Cheka_lar
		}
		else = {
			remove_ideas = RUS_Restored_Cheka
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.226
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.226"}
	title = russoc.226.t
	desc = russoc.226.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.226.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_2 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_2
				add_idea = SOV_subdued_unions
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_1 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_1
				add_idea = SOV_subdued_unions
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = SOV_subdued_unions
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.227
				days = 5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.226.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_ZINOVIEV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_zinoviev_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_2 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_2
				add_idea = SOV_centralised_unions
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_1 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_1
				add_idea = SOV_centralised_unions
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = SOV_centralised_unions
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_integrate_trade_unions_into_labor }
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.227
				days = 5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.226.c
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_ZINOVIEV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_zinoviev_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_2 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_disgruntled_trade_unions_2
				add_idea = SOV_militarized_unions
			}
		}
		else_if = {

				add_idea = SOV_militarized_unions
			}

		}

				days = 5
			}
		}
	}

	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_cheka
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.230.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 15
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_revtribunals_abolished }
			add_to_variable = { SOV_molotovite_influence_cheka = 1 }
			hidden_effect = { 
				country_event = { 
					id = russoc.2300
					days = 90
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.230.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 85
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_ZINOVIEV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_zinoviev_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka_lar }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka_lar
				add_idea = SOV_gpu_nkvd_lar
			}
		}
		else = {
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_Restored_Cheka
				add_idea = SOV_gpu_nkvd
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = { 
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_revtribunals_abolished }				
				add_to_variable = { SOV_molotovite_influence_cheka = 1 }
				country_event = { 
					id = russoc.2300
					days = 90
				}
				country_event = { 
					id = russoc.237
					days = 180
					random_days = 100
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

	trigger = { SOV_zinoviev_in_power = yes }
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.239.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 70
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_central_asia = yes 
				has_resistance = yes
				OR = { 
					state = 589
					state = 588
					state = 583
				}
			}
			add_resistance = 10
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				has_resistance = yes
				OR = { 
					state = 589
					state = 588
					state = 583
				}
			}
			add_compliance = 5
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.239.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_ZINOVIEV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_zinoviev_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_central_asia = yes 
				has_resistance = yes
				NOT = { 
					state = 589
					state = 588
					state = 583
				}
			}
			add_resistance = 10
		}

				OR = {

		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.245.d2
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction > Politburo_Centre_Faction }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction = Politburo_Centre_Faction }
			}
		}
	}

		NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_molotov }

		add_to_variable = { SOV_molotovite_influence_cheka = 2 }

		}

		clamp_variable = { var = SOV_molotovite_influence_cheka min = 0 }
		remove_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_influence_cheka }
	}

				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction > Politburo_Centre_Faction }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction = Politburo_Centre_Faction }

			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		}

		}

			OR = {
				POL = { has_socialist_government = no }
				NOT = { country_exists = POL }
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = POL decision = SOV_establish_polrevkom }
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.266
	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.266"
		hidden_effect = {
			SOV_remove_vtsik_ideas = yes
		}
	}
	title = russoc.266.t
	desc = {
		text = russoc.266.d2
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
			check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > 0.65 }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display = 0.65 }
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.266.d3
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display = Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
			}
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }			
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display = Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }			
			}
			check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display < 0.65 }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.266.d4
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
			check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > 0.65 }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display = 0.65 }
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.266.d5
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display = Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
			}
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }			
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display = Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }			
			}
			check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display < 0.65 }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.266.d6
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display > Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display > Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }			
			}
		}
	}
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.266.a	
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }
				OR = {
					check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > 0.65 }
					check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display = 0.65 }
				}
				check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display < 0.8 }
				NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_secretary_zinovievite }
			}
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_zalutsky
			if = {
				limit = { SOV_zinoviev_in_power = no }
				add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_resistance
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
					check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display = Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
				}
				OR = {
					check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display > Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }			
					check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display = Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }			
				}
				OR = {
					check_variable = { Politburo_Centre_Faction_display < 0.65 }
					has_country_flag = SOV_secretary_zinovievite 
				}
			}
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
			if = {
				limit = { SOV_zinoviev_in_power = no }
				add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_resistance
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
				check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }
				OR = {
					check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > 0.65 }
					check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display = 0.65 }
				}
			}
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
			if = {
				limit = { SOV_zinoviev_in_power = yes }
				add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_resistance
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
					check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display = Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display }
				}
				OR = {
					check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display > Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }			
					check_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display = Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }			
				}

			}

			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes	
			add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
			if = {
				limit = { SOV_zinoviev_in_power = yes }
				add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_resistance
			}
		}
		else = {

			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes	
			add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_smirnov
			add_ideas = SOV_vtsik_resistance
		}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.268
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.268"}
	title = russoc.268.t
	desc = russoc.268.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		SOV_zinoviev_in_power = yes
		OR = {
			AND = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
				NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_molotov }
				OR = {
					has_idea = RUS_Aleksey_Merekalov_for_tot
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev 
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich 
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
					has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_potemkin 
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_mayakovsky
				}
			}
			AND = {
				NOT = { 
					has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned
					has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
					has_country_flag = SOV_kamenev_bridge_builder
					has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_bukharin
				}
			}
			AND = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_workers_opposition_exist
				NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_workers_opp }
			}
		}
	}
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.268.a	
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
			NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_molotov }
			OR = {
				has_idea = RUS_Aleksey_Merekalov_for_tot
				has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev 
				has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich 
				has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
				has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
				has_idea = SOV_proletkult_potemkin 
				has_idea = SOV_proletkult_mayakovsky
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Aleksey_Merekalov_for_tot }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_forpol }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev 
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich 
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_gosplan }
		}
		else = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_cleanse_gosplan_completed
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1 }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_sto }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_potemkin 
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_mayakovsky
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_proletkult }
		}
		set_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_molotov
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.268.b	
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { 
				has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned
				has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
				has_country_flag = SOV_kamenev_bridge_builder
				has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_bukharin
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes	
		set_variable = { SOV_kamenev_bb = -10 }	
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_krzhizhanovsky
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_gosplan }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_bogdanov
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_pletnev
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_gastev
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_proletkult }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_zagorsky } }
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = 219 decision = SOV_smash_bukharinist_opposition_in_moscow }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_case_of_bukharinists }
		}
		set_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_bukharin
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.268.c
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_workers_opposition_exist
			NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_workers_opp }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_workers_opposition = yes
		if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = {
					has_idea = SOV_subdued_unions
					has_idea = SOV_militarized_unions
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_integrate_trade_unions_into_labor }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_proletkult_gastev }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_proletkult }
		}		
		hidden_effect = {
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_case_of_workers_opposition }
		}
		set_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_workers_opp
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.268.e
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_rykovites_exist
			NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_rykov }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_rykov = yes
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_case_of_rykovites }
		set_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_rykov
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.270
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.270"}
	title = {
		text = russoc.270.t
		trigger = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov }
	}
	title = {
		text = russoc.270.t2
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.270.d
		trigger = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.270.d2
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov }
		}
	}
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_smirnov
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.270.a	
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists }
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_ZinBukh_Faction }
			multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -0.25 }
			SOV_change_politburo_zinbukh = yes
		}
		else = {
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Bukharin_Faction }
			multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -0.25 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov
					AND = {
						has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
						OR = {
							has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
							has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
						}
						has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
					}
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_initiate_zinoviev_resignation }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.270.b
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists }
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_ZinBukh_Faction }
			multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -0.25 }
			SOV_change_politburo_zinbukh = yes
		}
		else = {
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Bukharin_Faction }
			multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -0.25 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov
					AND = {
						has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
						OR = {
							has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
							has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
						}
						has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
					}
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_initiate_zinoviev_resignation }
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.271
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.271"}
	title = russoc.271.t	
	desc = {
		text = russoc.271.d
		trigger = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_krzhizhanovsky }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.271.d2
		trigger = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.271.d3
		trigger = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.271.d4
		trigger = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.271.d5
		trigger = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin }
	}
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.271.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_krzhizhanovsky }
			clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_krzhizhanovsky
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists }
				set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
				SOV_change_politburo_zinbukh = yes
			}
			else = {
				set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
				SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_speed_buildings_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = construction_speed_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = 0.05 
				tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_line_change_production_efficiency_factor = 0.05 
				tooltip = line_change_production_efficiency_factor_tooltip
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev }
			clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes			
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_speed_buildings_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = construction_speed_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = 0.05 
				tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_tooltip
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk }
			clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_local_resources_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = local_resources_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor = 0.05 
				tooltip = production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_tooltip
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich }
			clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_speed_buildings_factor = -0.05
				tooltip = construction_speed_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_speed_arms_factory_factor = -0.05
				tooltip = arms_factory_construction_speed_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_industrial_capacity_factory = -0.10
				tooltip = industrial_capacity_factory_tooltip
			}
		}
		else = {
			clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = -0.10
				tooltip = production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_research_speed_factor = -0.03
				tooltip = research_speed_factor_tooltip
			}
		}		
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_smilga_gosplan }
			set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_smilga
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_supply_consumption_factor = -0.05
				tooltip = supply_consumption_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor = 0.05
				tooltip = production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_tooltip
			}
		}
		else = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_preobrazhensky
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_political_power_factor = 0.05
				tooltip = pp_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor = 0.05
				tooltip = production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_party_popularity_stability_factor = 0.1
				tooltip = party_popularity_stability_factor_tooltip
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_Evgeniy_A_Preobrazhenskiy_eco_tot }
				remove_ideas = RUS_Evgeniy_A_Preobrazhenskiy_eco_tot
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_secretary_zinovievite }
					add_ideas = RUS_Ivar_Smilga_eco_tot
				}
				else = {
					add_ideas = RUS_Nikolay_N_Krestinskiy_eco_syn
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.271.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich
				has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin
			}
		}
		add_political_power = 25
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
	}
}

		multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -0.5 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change2 = 0.5 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = politburo_change2}
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = russoc_279_c
		add_timed_idea = { idea = SOV_purge_mo days = 100 }
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_secretary_molotovite }
			clr_country_flag = SOV_secretary_molotovite
			set_country_flag = SOV_secretary_zinovievite
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.290
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.290" }
	title = russoc.290.t	
	desc = russoc.290.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_zinoviev6
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.290.a
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_dissolved
		set_country_flag = RUS_rkp_is_rkrp
		SOV_remove_vtsik_ideas = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_resistance }
			remove_ideas = SOV_vtsik_resistance
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_democratic_centralism_4 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_democratic_centralism_4
				add_idea = SOV_zinoviev_constitution_1
			}
		}
		else = {
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_democratic_centralism_3
				add_idea = SOV_zinoviev_constitution_1_2
			}
		}
		swap_ideas = {
			remove_idea = SOV_proletarian_hegemony_2
			add_idea = SOV_proletarian_hegemony_3
		}
		add_country_leader_trait = SOV_vozhd_of_proletarian_revolution
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.294
			days = 2
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalist
				name = SOV_zinoviev_party
				long_name = SOV_zinoviev_party_long
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = radical_socialist
				name = SOV_zinoviev_party
				long_name = SOV_zinoviev_party_long
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rsrpi_united_with_rkp }
				set_party_name = { 
					ideology = social_democrat 
					name = SOV_zinoviev_party
					long_name = SOV_lozovsky_kirov_party_rkpr_long
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_repressed_left_srs }
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_workers_opposition_exist }
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = syndicalist 
						name = SOV_zinoviev_party
						long_name = SOV_rkp_worker_opposition_party_long2
					}
				}
				else = {
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = syndicalist 
						name = SOV_zinoviev_party
						long_name = SOV_rkp_worker_group_party_long2
					}
					add_synd_to_coalition = yes
				}
			}
			LAT = {
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = totalist
					name = SOV_zinoviev_party_LAT
					long_name = SOV_zinoviev_party_LAT_long
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					USR = { is_ally_of_ROOT = yes }
				}
				USR = {
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = totalist
						name = SOV_zinoviev_party_UKR
						long_name = SOV_zinoviev_party_UKR_long
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					UKR = { is_ally_of_ROOT = yes }
				}
				UKR = {
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = totalist
						name = SOV_zinoviev_party_UKR
						long_name = SOV_zinoviev_party_UKR_long
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					WHR = { 
						is_ally_of_ROOT = yes 
						WHR_bra_in_power = yes
					}
				}
				WHR = {
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = totalist
						name = SOV_zinoviev_party_WHR
						long_name = SOV_zinoviev_party_WHR_long
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					GEO = { 
						is_ally_of_ROOT = yes 
						WHR_bra_in_power = yes
					}
				}
				WHR = {
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = totalist
						name = SOV_zinoviev_party_WHR
						long_name = SOV_zinoviev_party_WHR_long
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.296"}
	title = russoc.296.t	
	desc = russoc.296.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_zinoviev6
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.296.a
		add_political_power = -35
		add_popularity = { ideology = totalist popularity = 0.02 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.297
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.297"}
	title = russoc.297.t	
	desc = {
		text = russoc.297.d
		trigger = { SOV_molotov_in_power = no }
	}	
	desc = {
		text = russoc.297.d2
		trigger = { SOV_molotov_in_power = yes }
	}
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_lenin_map
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.297.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_idea = SOV_cult_of_lenin }
			}
			add_ideas = SOV_cult_of_lenin
		}
		else = {
			increase_ruling_party_popularity_by_3 = yes
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.298
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.298"}
	title = russoc.298.t	
	desc = russoc.298.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_news_event_FRA_lenin
	
	trigger = {
		has_idea = SOV_cult_of_lenin
		SOV_zinoviev_in_power = yes
	}
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.298.a
		add_stability = 0.01
		add_political_power = 10
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.298.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned
				has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
			}
			check_variable = { Politburo_Bukharin_Faction > 0 }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.300
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.300"}
	title = russoc.300.t	
	desc = russoc.300.d
		
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_molotov
	
	trigger = {
		has_country_flag = SOV_secretary_molotovite
		has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
		russian_civil_war = no
		has_country_flag = SOV_revtribunals_abolished
		SOV_zinoviev_constitution_adopted = no
		has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
		SOV_molotov_in_power = no
		OR = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_zalutsky
		}
	}
	mean_time_to_happen = { months = 2 }
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.300.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 65
		}
		add_political_power = -30
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.306
			days = 2
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.300.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		trigger = {
			SOV_left_communists_more_50 = yes
		}
		add_political_power = -20
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.307
			days = 2
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.300.c
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -10
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.308
			days = 2
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.300.e
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -40
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.301
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.301"}
	title = russoc.301.t	
	desc = russoc.301.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_chutskayev
	
	trigger = {
		has_country_flag = SOV_secretary_molotovite
		has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
		SOV_zinoviev_constitution_adopted = no
	}
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.301.a
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_secretariat }
		activate_mission = SOV_secretariat_gains_power
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.306
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.306"}
	title = russoc.306.t
	desc = {
		text = russoc.306.d
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_zalutsky
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.306.d2
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_idea = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
				has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.306.d3
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.306.d4
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
		}
	}
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.306.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky }
			add_stability = -0.05
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_initiate_zinoviev_resignation }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov }
			add_stability = -0.03
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
				}
			}
			add_stability = -0.02
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin }				
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_initiate_zinoviev_resignation }
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_political_power = 25
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			
			remove_ideas = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.307
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.307"}
	title = russoc.306.t
	desc = {
		text = russoc.307.d
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_zalutsky
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.307.d2
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_idea = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
				has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.307.d3
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.307.d4
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
		}
	}
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.306.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky }
			add_stability = -0.08
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_initiate_zinoviev_resignation }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov }
			add_political_power = -25
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -3 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
				}
			}
			add_stability = -0.02
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			remove_ideas = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = {
					id = russoc.309
					days = 280
					random_days = 80
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_political_power = 50
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 3 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -3 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			
			remove_ideas = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.308
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.308"}
	title = russoc.306.t
	desc = {
		text = russoc.308.d
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_zalutsky
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.308.d3
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_idea = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
				has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.308.d4
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.308.d5
		trigger = {
			has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
		}
	}
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.306.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky }
			add_stability = -0.10
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_initiate_zinoviev_resignation }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_smirnov }
			add_political_power = -15
			add_stability = 0.05
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
				add_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1_weak
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_serebryakov
					has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
				}
			}
			add_stability = 0.01
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
				add_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1_weak
			}
		}
		else = {			
			add_political_power = -25
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
			
			remove_ideas = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.309
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.309"}
	title = russoc.309.t
	desc = {
		text = russoc.309.d
		trigger = {
			SOV_left_communists_more_50 = yes
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.309.d2
		trigger = {
			SOV_left_communists_more_50 = no
			SOV_hardliners_more_50 = no
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.309.d3
		trigger = {
			SOV_hardliners_more_50 = yes
		}
	}
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.309.a
		if = {
			limit = { SOV_left_communists_more_50 = yes }
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { SOV_hardliners_more_50 = yes }
			remove_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky }
				add_ideas = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
				set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 3 }
				SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_initiate_zinoviev_resignation }
			}
			else = {
				add_ideas = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1_weak
			}			
		}
		else = {
			remove_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { 
						has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_rykovites_exist 
						has_country_flag = Aleksey_Rykov_dead
					}
					OR = {
						AND = {
							check_variable = { Politburo_ZinBukh_Faction_display > Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }
							has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
						}
						AND = {
							check_variable = { Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display > Politburo_Hardliner_Faction_display }
							check_variable = { Politburo_Bukharin_Faction_display > Politburo_Centre_Faction_display }
						}
					}
				}
				add_ideas = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1_rykov
				set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
				SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
				set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.321
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.321"}
	title = russoc.321.t
	desc = russoc.321.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_zinoviev5
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.321.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Aleksandr_Beloborodov_sec_tot }
			remove_ideas = RUS_Aleksandr_Beloborodov_sec_tot
			add_ideas = RUS_Georgy_Blagonravov_sec_tot
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Aleksey_Merekalov_for_tot }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_forpol }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kuybyshev 
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_kaganovich 
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_gosplan }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1
				add_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_1_weak
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_potemkin 
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_mayakovsky
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_proletkult }
		}
		set_country_flag = SOV_zinoviev_fighting_molotov
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Hardliner_Faction }
		multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		clr_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		SOV_new_vtsik_election = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_secretary_molotovite }
			clr_country_flag = SOV_secretary_molotovite
			set_country_flag = SOV_secretary_zinovievite
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Tolerate_Platformism }
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			uncomplete_national_focus = {
				focus = SOV_Tolerate_Platformism
				uncomplete_children = no
				refund_political_power = yes
			}
			unlock_national_focus = SOV_Purify_The_Revolution

		}

			add_to_variable = { SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = 0.05 }

				SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = -0.05 
				tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor = 0.05 
				tooltip = production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_speed_arms_factory_factor = -0.05
				tooltip = arms_factory_construction_speed_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_industrial_capacity_factory = -0.10
				tooltip = industrial_capacity_factory_tooltip
			}			
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_speed_buildings_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = construction_speed_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_local_resources_factor = 0.05 
				tooltip = local_resources_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor_tooltip
			}
		}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.330
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.330"}
	title = russoc.330.t
	desc = russoc.330.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_molotov
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.330.a	
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_democratic_centralism_4 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_democratic_centralism_4
				add_idea = SOV_bureaucratic_centralism_1
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_democratic_centralism_3 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_democratic_centralism_3
				add_idea = SOV_bureaucratic_centralism_1
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = SOV_bureaucratic_centralism_1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp }
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalist
				name = RUS_totalist_party
				long_name = SOV_molotov_party_long
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_country_flag = SOV_tskk_andreyev
						has_country_flag = SOV_tskk_rudzutak
					}
				}
				country_event = { id = russoc.350 days = 4 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_tskk_shvernik } }
				country_event = { id = russoc.272 days = 4 }
			}
		}
	}		
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.333
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.333"}
	title = russoc.333.t
	desc = russoc.333.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_bukharin_budenovka
	
	trigger = {
		NOT = { 
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned 
			has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
		}
	}
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.333.a	
		ai_chance = {
			base = 70
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
				}
			}
		}
		country_event = { id = russoc.334 days = 7 random_days = 7 }
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.3380 days = 80 random_days = 14 }
			if = {
				limit = { 
					219 = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_kamenev } }
				}
				country_event = {
					id = russoc.336
					days = 25
					random_days = 15
				}
			}
		}
	}	
	option = {
		name = russoc.333.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_popularity = { ideology = totalist popularity = -0.05 }
		add_popularity = { ideology = radical_socialist popularity = -0.05 }
		if = {
			limit = { 219 = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_kamenev } } }
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { SOV_kamenev_bb > 1 } }
				country_event = { id = russoc.339 days = 10 }
			}
			else = {
				country_event = { id = russoc.340 days = 10 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.340 days = 10 }
		}
	}		
}

					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai

			}
