country_event = { #
	id = russoc.3380
	immediate = {
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.3380"
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rykov_molotovite }
			add_to_variable = { SOV_bukh_mol = -1 }
		}
	}
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { 
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned 
			has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
		}
	}
		
	option = {
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { SOV_bukh_mol > 6 } }
			country_event = russoc.338
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 219 = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_kamenev } } }
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { SOV_kamenev_bb > 1 } }
				country_event = russoc.339
			}
			else = {
				country_event = russoc.340
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = russoc.340
		}
	}		
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.338
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.338"}
	title = russoc.338.t
	desc = russoc.338.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { 
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned 
			has_country_flag = SOV_zinovievite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
		}
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_bukharin_speech
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.338.a
		SOV_politburo_molbukh_bloc = yes
		remove_mission = SOV_moscow_rallies_opposition	
		add_to_variable = { SOV_bolshevik_party_congress_number = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_molotov_bukharin_unions }
			if = {
				limit = { 
					has_idea = SOV_militarized_unions
				}
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_militarized_unions
					add_idea = SOV_centralised_unions
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { 
					has_idea = SOV_subdued_unions
				}
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_subdued_unions
					add_idea = SOV_centralised_unions
				}
			}
			else = {
				add_ideas = SOV_centralised_unions
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_molotov_bukharin_tomsky }
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_repressed_left_srs }
					add_synd_to_coalition = yes
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = syndicalist
						name = SOV_rtssps_party
						long_name = SOV_rtssps_party_long
					}			
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Mikhail Tomsky"
						desc = POLITICS_MIKHAIL_TOMSKY_DESC
						picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Mikhail_Tomsky.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = syn_broad_communism_subtype 
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_molotov_bukharin_gosplan }
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_industrial_capacity_factory = -0.05
				tooltip = industrial_capacity_factory_tooltip
			}			
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_molotov_bukharin_gosplan2 }			
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = -0.05
				tooltip = production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				SOV_gosplan_supply_consumption_factor = 0.05
				tooltip = supply_consumption_factor_tooltip
			}			
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_molotov_bukharin_narkompros }
			SOV_remove_proletkult = yes
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = Aleksandr_Bogdanov_dead }
				add_ideas = SOV_proletkult_pletnev
				custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_proletkult_explain_pletnev
			}
			else = {
				add_ideas = SOV_proletkult_bogdanov
				custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_proletkult_explain_bogdanov
			}			
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 219 = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_kamenev } } }
			set_country_flag = SOV_kamenev_scapegoat
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = 219 decision = SOV_smash_bukharinist_opposition_in_moscow }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha }
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha
				add_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz
			}
			clr_country_flag = SOV_mass_collectivization_done
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 150 random_days = 100 }
			}
		}		
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization }
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization
				add_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz
			}
			clr_country_flag = SOV_mass_collectivization_done
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 150 random_days = 100 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.355 days = 7 random_days = 5 }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.285 days = 7 }
		}
	}		
}

		clr_country_flag = SOV_molotov_bukharin_narkompros

		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes		
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes		
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -3 }
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		SOV_politburo_zinbukh_bloc = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_smash_bukharinist_opposition_in_moscow_var = 50 }
		if = {
			limit = { 
				219 = {
					OR = {
						has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_kamenev } 
						has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_uglanov } 
					}
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = 219 decision = SOV_smash_bukharinist_opposition_in_moscow }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_krzhizhanovsky
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_strumilin
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_gosplan }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_bogdanov
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_pletnev
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_gastev
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_proletkult }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.355 days = 7 random_days = 5 }
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization }
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 150 random_days = 100 }
			}
		}
	}

		}
	}

		name = russoc.349.b	
		custom_effect_tooltip = russoc_349_b

		add_war_support = -0.05
		clr_country_flag = SOV_rkp_in_politburo
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Centre_Faction }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change2 = Politburo_Centre_Faction }
		multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -0.5 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change2 = 0.5 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = politburo_change2}
		SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		add_timed_idea = { idea = SOV_purge_lc days = 100 }
		hidden_effect = {		
			country_event = { id = russoc.363 days = 45 random_days = 30 }
			country_event = { id = nkvd.24 days = 120 random_days = 30 }
		}
	}

		name = russoc.349.c	
		custom_effect_tooltip = russoc_349_c
		set_country_flag = Grigory_Zinoviev_dead
		set_country_flag = Lev_Kamenev_dead
		effect_tooltip = { kill_ideology_leader = radical_socialist }
		set_country_flag = Georgy_Blagonravov_dead
		add_stability = -0.10
		add_popularity = { ideology = totalist popularity = -0.05 }
		clr_country_flag = SOV_rkp_in_politburo
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Centre_Faction }
		multiply_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		add_timed_idea = { idea = SOV_purge_lc days = 700 }	
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = Nikolay_Bukharin_dead }
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = Aleksey_Rykov_dead }
					add_radsoc_to_coalition = yes
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Andrey Zhdanov"
						picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Andrei_Zhdanov.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = radsoc_communism_subtype
					}
				}
				else = {
					if = {
						limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rykov_molotovite }
						add_radsoc_to_coalition = yes				
					}
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Aleksey Rykov"
						picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Aleksey_Rykov.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = bukharinist_subtype 
						traits = { SOV_partisan_of_nep }
					}
				}
			}
			else = {				
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Nikolay Bukharin"
					desc = POLITICS_NIKOLAI_BUKHARIN_DESC
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Nikolay_Bukharin.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = bukharinist_subtype
					traits = { RUS_ex_bolshevik  }
				}

					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_molotovite_bukharinist_bloc_exists }
					add_radsoc_to_coalition = yes
				}
			}
			country_event = { id = russoc.363 days = 45 random_days = 30 }
		}
	}		
}

		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_smilga 
					has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_preobrazhensky 
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_gosplan }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_lunacharsky
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_bubnov
					has_idea = SOV_proletkult_krupskaya
				}
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = SOV_cleanse_proletkult }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = 219 decision = SOV_smash_bukharinist_opposition_in_moscow }
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					OR = {
						has_country_flag = SOV_molotovite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
						has_country_flag = SOV_smash_bukharinist_opposition_in_moscow_completed
					}
					has_country_flag = SOV_lashevich_siberia
				}
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = 570 decision = SOV_cleanse_sibrevkom }
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = 570 decision = SOV_cleanse_sibrevkom }
			country_event = { id = russoc.354 days = 4 }
			country_event = { id = russoc.355 days = 7 random_days = 5 }

				limit = { has_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization }
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 150 random_days = 100 }
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.1891
				days = 90
			}
		}
	}		
}

		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.355.d2
		trigger = {

		}
	}

		text = russoc.355.d3
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_molotovite_bukharinist_bloc_exists
		}
	}

			has_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization 
			has_country_flag = SOV_mass_collectivization_done
		}
	}
		
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.355.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha
				add_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization
			}
			clr_country_flag = SOV_mass_collectivization_done
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 150 random_days = 100 }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz
				add_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization
			}
			clr_country_flag = SOV_mass_collectivization_done
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 150 random_days = 100 }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_molotovite_bukharinist_bloc_exists }
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz
				days = 900
			}	
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes	
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 450 random_days = 200 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = SOV_mass_collectivization
				days = 900
			}	
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = russoc.371 days = 450 random_days = 200 }
			}
		}
	}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.378
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.378" }
	title = russoc.378.t
	desc = russoc.378.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { 
		NOT = { has_idea = RUS_Lazar_Kaganovich_hog_tot }
		SOV_molotov_in_power = yes
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_kaganovich
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.378.a	
		ai_chance = {
			base = 60
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_zhdanov = yes	
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_factor = 0.10
			tooltip = consumer_goods_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.05
			tooltip = production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor_tooltip
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.378.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 40
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 3 }
		SOV_change_politburo_zhdanov = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_speed_buildings_factor = 0.03
			tooltip = construction_speed_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_local_resources_factor = 0.05
			tooltip = local_resources_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_industrial_capacity_factory = -0.10
			tooltip = industrial_capacity_factory_tooltip
		}
		hidden_effect = { 
			country_event = { id = russoc.379 days = 120 random_days = 50 } 
		}		
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_kaga_acts
		add_to_variable = { SOV_kaga_acts = 2 }
		SOV_kaganovich_coup = yes
	}
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.379
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.379" }
	title = russoc.379.t
	desc = russoc.379.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { 
		NOT = { has_idea = RUS_Lazar_Kaganovich_hog_tot }
		SOV_molotov_in_power = yes
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_voznesensky
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.379.a	
		ai_chance = {
			base = 70
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
				}
			}
		}	
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 3 }
		SOV_change_politburo_zhdanov = yes
		clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
		set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_voznesensky
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = 0.05
			tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_local_resources_factor = 0.05 
			tooltip = local_resources_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05 
			tooltip = production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_political_power_factor = 0.05
			tooltip = pp_factor_tooltip
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
		add_ideas = RUS_Nikolay_Voznesensky_eco_rso
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_kaga_acts
		add_to_variable = { SOV_kaga_acts = 3 }
		SOV_kaganovich_coup = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.379.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_zhdanov = yes
		clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
		set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_voznesensky
		custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = 0.05
			tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_local_resources_factor = 0.05 
			tooltip = local_resources_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05 
			tooltip = production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { 
			SOV_gosplan_political_power_factor = 0.05
			tooltip = pp_factor_tooltip
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_kaga_acts = -2 }
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.380
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.380" }
	title = russoc.380.t
	desc = russoc.380.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { 
		SOV_molotov_in_power = yes
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_kaganovich2
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.380.a	
		kill_country_leader = yes
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Lazar Kaganovich"
			desc = "POLITICS_LAZAR_KAGANOVICH_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_SOV_Lazar_Kaganovich.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = hardliner_bolshevism_subtype
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_2 }
			}
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto_2
		}
		else = {
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Lazar_Kaganovich_hog_tot }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			add_ideas = RUS_Georgy_Malenkov_hog_tot
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Lazar_Kaganovich_eco_tot }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
			add_ideas = RUS_Mikhail_M_Kaganovich_eco_tot
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.382 days = 5 }
			country_event = { id = nkvd.24 days = 2 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.381
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.381" }
	title = russoc.381.t
	desc = russoc.381.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { 
		SOV_kaganovich_in_power = yes
	}
	picture = GFX_event_russia_zhdanov
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.381.a	
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Nikolay_Voznesensky_eco_rso }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
			add_ideas = RUS_Mikhail_M_Kaganovich_eco_tot
		}
		clr_country_flag = SOV_politburo_zhdanovites_exist
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_voznesensky }
			clr_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_voznesensky
			set_country_flag = SOV_gosplan_mezhlauk
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_modify_gosplan
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_consumer_goods_expected_value = -0.05
				tooltip = consumer_goods_expected_value_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor = 0.10
				tooltip = production_lack_of_resource_penalty_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_political_power_factor = -0.05
				tooltip = pp_factor_tooltip
			}
			add_to_variable = { 
				SOV_gosplan_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor = -0.05 
				tooltip = production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_tooltip
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.383
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.383" }
	title = russoc.383.t
	desc = russoc.383.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { 
		SOV_kaganovich_in_power = yes
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_yagoda
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.383.a	
		kill_country_leader = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky }
			remove_ideas = SOV_vtsik_vladimirsky
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_vtsik_kalinin }
			remove_ideas = SOV_vtsik_kalinin
		}
		clr_country_flag = SOV_secretary_molotovite
		219 = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_zagorsky }
				}
				remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_mossoviet_zagorsky }
			}
		}
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Genrikh Yagoda"
			desc = "POLITICS_GENRIKH_YAGODA_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_SOV_Genrikh_Yagoda.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = socialist_security_state_subtype 
		}	
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		country_event = { id = russoc.384 days = 2 }
	}
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.384
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.384" }
	title = russoc.384.t
	desc = russoc.384.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_yagoda
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.384.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 65
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}	
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		add_ideas = RUS_Georgy_Malenkov_hog_tot
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Mikhail_M_Kaganovich_eco_tot }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
			add_ideas = RUS_Nikolay_Voznesensky_eco_rso
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = security_minister
		add_ideas = RUS_Yakov_S_Agranov_sec_tot
		complete_national_focus = SOV_Shadow_Government
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_2 }
			}
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto_2
		}
		else = {
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp }
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalist
				name = RUS_totalist_party
				long_name = SOV_yagoda_party_long
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			random_other_country = { news_event = russoc.2003 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.384.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 35
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_mayakovsky_path }
			country_event = { id = russoc.397 days = 2 }
		}
		else = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.385 days = 2 }
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #
	id = russoc.385
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.385" }
	title = russoc.385.t
	desc = russoc.385.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
		
	option = {
		name = russoc.385.a
		effect_tooltip = { retire_country_leader = yes }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Karl Radek"
			desc = "POLITICS_KARL_RADEK_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Karl_Radek.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = internationalism_subtype
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_2 }
			}
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto_2
		}
		else = {
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
		}
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Nikolay_Krestinsky_hog_tot
			RUS_Osip_A_Piatnitsky_for_tot
			RUS_Evgeniy_A_Preobrazhenskiy_eco_tot
			RUS_Genrikh_Yagoda_sec_tot
		}
		complete_national_focus = SOV_Internationalists_In_Power
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned
		clr_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_zhdanovites_exist
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Hardliner_Faction }
		SOV_change_politburo_zhdanov = yes
		set_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction = 0 }
		SOV_change_vtsik_to_serebryakov = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp }
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalist
				name = RUS_totalist_party
				long_name = SOV_internationalist_party_long
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			random_other_country = { news_event = russoc.2004 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.385.b
		effect_tooltip = { retire_country_leader = yes }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Osip Pyatnitsky"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Osip_Pyatnitsky.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = internationalism_subtype
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_idea = SOV_council_of_labor_and_defense_2 }
			}
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto_2
		}
		else = {
			add_country_leader_trait = SOV_chairman_of_sto
		}
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Nikolay_Krestinsky_hog_tot
			RUS_Karl_Radek_for_tot
			RUS_Evgeniy_A_Preobrazhenskiy_eco_tot
			RUS_Genrikh_Yagoda_sec_tot
		}
		complete_national_focus = SOV_Internationalists_In_Power
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_bukharin_banned
		clr_country_flag = SOV_politburo_hardliners_exist
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_zhdanovites_exist
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = Politburo_Hardliner_Faction }
		SOV_change_politburo_zhdanov = yes
		set_variable = { Politburo_Hardliner_Faction = 0 }
		SOV_change_vtsik_to_serebryakov = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp }
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalist
				name = RUS_totalist_party
				long_name = SOV_internationalist_party_long
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			random_other_country = { news_event = russoc.2004 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.386
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.383" }
	title = russoc.386.t
	desc = russoc.386.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = { 
		SOV_kaganovich_in_power = yes
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_kaganovich
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.386.a	
		complete_national_focus = SOV_Chairman_Kaganovich
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp }
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalist
				name = RUS_totalist_party
				long_name = SOV_kaganovich_party_long
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = russoc.346 days = 7 random_days = 2 }
			country_event = { id = russoc.381 days = 14 random_days = 7 }
			random_other_country = { news_event = russoc.2002 }
		}
	}
}


country_event = {
	id = russoc.387
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.387" }
	title = russoc.387.t
	desc = russoc.387.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.387.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 65
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.387.b
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 35
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
				}
			}
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = security_minister
		add_ideas = RUS_Nikolay_Yezhov_sec_tot
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.388
				days = 50

			}
		}
	}

country_event = {
	id = russoc.388
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.388" }
	title = russoc.388.t
	desc = russoc.388.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_yezhov
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.388.a
		set_country_flag = Genrikh_Yagoda_dead
		effect_tooltip = { kill_country_leader = yes }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Nikolay Yezhov"
			desc = "POLITICS_NIKOLAY_YEZHOV_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_SOV_Nikolai_Yezhov.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = socialist_security_state_subtype
			traits = { SOV_chairman_of_sto }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_yagodas_state_lar }
			remove_ideas = SOV_yagodas_state_lar
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_yagodas_state }
			remove_ideas = SOV_yagodas_state
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_NKVD_State_5 }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_NKVD_State_5
				add_idea = SOV_NKVD_State_4
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp }
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalist
				name = RUS_totalist_party
				long_name = SOV_yezhov_party_long
			}
		}
		mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.400
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.400" }
	title = russoc.400.t
	desc = russoc.400.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_petrograd_soviet
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.400.a	
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_rkp_in_politburo
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_united_opposition_exist
				has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_old_guard_exists
			}
			OR = {
				SOV_bukharin_in_power = yes
				SOV_sokolnikov_in_power = yes
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_lc = 2 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		SOV_decrease_zinoviev_resistance = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		SOV_workers_opposition_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_bukharinists_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_rykovites_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_kirovites_will_hate_this = yes		
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.400.b
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_workers_opposition_exist	
			NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_workers_opposition_tomsky }
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_wo = 2 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_workers_opposition = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		SOV_old_bolsheviks_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_zinovievites_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_rykovites_will_hate_this = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.400.c
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_kirovites_exist
			SOV_kirov_in_power = no
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_ki = 2 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_kirov = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		SOV_workers_opposition_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_zinovievites_will_hate_this = yes

		}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.405
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.405" }
	title = russoc.405.t
	desc = russoc.405.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_Collectivization
	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.405.a
		add_political_power = -50
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_voluntary_collectivization }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_voluntary_collectivization
				add_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_dekulakization }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_dekulakization
				add_idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = SOV_mass_collectivization_skha_tsoz
				days = 900
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_lc = 1 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_ob = 1 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_old_guard = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_wo = 1 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_workers_opposition = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_bu = 1 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_ry = 2 }
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_rykov = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.405.b
		add_stability = -0.1
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_dekulakization }
			modify_timed_idea = {
				idea = SOV_dekulakization
				days = -300
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = SOV_voluntary_collectivization }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_voluntary_collectivization
				add_idea = SOV_dekulakization
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				has_country_flag = SOV_politburo_united_opposition_exist 
				SOV_kamenev_in_power = no
				SOV_sokolnikov_in_power = no
			}
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_united_opposition = yes
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_lc = 2 }
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
			add_to_variable = { SOV_unity_ob = 2 }
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_old_guard = yes
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		SOV_bukharinists_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_rykovites_will_hate_this = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.405.c
		SOV_zinovievites_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_old_bolsheviks_will_hate_this = yes
		SOV_workers_opposition_will_hate_this = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = russoc.408
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.408" }
	title = russoc.408.t
	desc = russoc.408.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes	
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.408.a
		custom_effect_tooltip = russoc_408_a
		set_country_flag = SOV_politburo_dissolved
		add_stability = -0.1
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_20 = yes
		if = {
			limit = { 
				has_completed_focus = SOV_Party_Of_The_New_Type 
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_rkp } }
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = totalist
					name = RUS_radical_socialist_party
					long_name = RUS_radical_socialist_party_long
				}
			}
			set_politics = { ruling_party = totalist }
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Nikolay Bukharin"
				desc = "POLITICS_NIKOLAI_BUKHARIN_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Nikolay_Bukharin.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = tot_bukharinist_subtype 
				traits = { RUS_ex_bolshevik }
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_tot = party_popularity_100@totalist }
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_radsoc = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
				divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_radsoc = 2 }
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_tot = RUS_new_radsoc }

				set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_tot }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_radsoc }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }
				
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_tot = sum } #avoid rounding errors

				set_popularities = {
					totalist = RUS_new_tot
					syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
					radical_socialist = RUS_new_radsoc
					social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
					social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
					market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
					social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
					authoritarian_democrat = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat
					paternal_autocrat = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat
					national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rsrpi_united_with_rkp }
				add_socdem_to_coalition = yes
			}
			add_radsoc_to_coalition = yes		
		}
	}
}

	desc = russoc.203.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.203.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FROM = { ic_ratio = { tag = ROOT ratio > 0.4 } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_socialist_government = yes
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.204
				days = 2
				random_days = 5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.203.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 75			
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_authoritarian_government = yes
					has_government = social_conservative
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.25
				has_government = market_liberal
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.15
				OR = {
					has_government = social_democrat
					has_government = social_liberal
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FROM = { ic_ratio = { tag = ROOT ratio < 0.4 } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					is_owner_neighbor_of = FROM
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = FROM }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				is_faction_leader = no
				is_in_faction = yes
				faction_leader = { 
					OR = {
						is_embargoing = FROM
						has_country_flag = embargoed_@FROM
					}
				}
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			clear_embargo_FROM = yes
			for_each_scope_loop = {
				array = ROOT.faction_members
				clear_embargo_FROM = yes
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.205
				days = 2
				random_days = 5
			}
		}
	}
}

##########################
### PUPPET INTEGRATION ###

country_event = { #FROM requests our integration
	id = russoc.500
	title = russoc.500.t

	desc = {
		text = russoc.500.d.integration_level_1
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic }
			NOT = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.500.d.integration_level_2
		trigger = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.500.d.integration_final
		trigger = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event russoc.500 option russoc.500.a"
		name = russoc.500.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				FROM = { ROOT = { set_temp_variable = { acceptance = mtth:SOV_integration_acceptance_chance } } }
				always = yes
				add = var:acceptance
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				OR = {
					AND = {
						tag = UKR
						has_game_rule = { rule = UKR_foreign_policy option = UKR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = LAT
						has_game_rule = { rule = LAT_forpol option = LAT_FORPOL_ALLIANCE }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = WHR
						has_game_rule = { rule = WHR_foreign_policy option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = KHI
						has_game_rule = { rule = KHI_foreign option = KHI_FOREIGN_SOV }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = MON
						has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_DIES_MAN_RADICALS_BOL }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = AFG
						has_game_rule = { rule = AFG_forpol option = AFG_FORPOL_SOV }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = ALO
						has_game_rule = { rule = ALO_status option = ALO_STATUS_ANNEXATION }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = TRK
						has_game_rule = { rule = TRK_foreign option = TRK_FOREIGN_RUS }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = { activate_mission = SOV_subject_integration_timer }
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event russoc.500 option russoc.500.b"
		name = russoc.500.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				FROM = { ROOT = { set_temp_variable = { refusal = mtth:SOV_integration_refusal_chance } } }
				always = yes
				add = var:refusal
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					AND = {
						tag = UKR
						has_game_rule = { rule = UKR_foreign_policy option = UKR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = LAT
						has_game_rule = { rule = LAT_forpol option = LAT_FORPOL_ALLIANCE }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = WHR
						has_game_rule = { rule = WHR_foreign_policy option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = KHI
						has_game_rule = { rule = KHI_foreign option = KHI_FOREIGN_SOV }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = MON
						has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_DIES_MAN_RADICALS_BOL }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = AFG
						has_game_rule = { rule = AFG_forpol option = AFG_FORPOL_SOV }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = ALO
						has_game_rule = { rule = ALO_status option = ALO_STATUS_ANNEXATION }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = TRK
						has_game_rule = { rule = TRK_foreign option = TRK_FOREIGN_RUS }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = { remove_mission = SOV_subject_integration_timer }
		set_country_flag = @FROM_revolted_against_SOV
		create_wargoal = {
			target = FROM
			type = topple_government
		}
		SOV_break_puppet_effect = yes
		FROM = {
			effect_tooltip = {
				create_wargoal = {
					target = ROOT
					type = annex_everything
				}
			}
			country_event = { id = russoc.503 hours = 8 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Overlord increases integration
	id = russoc.501
	title = russoc.501.t
	
	desc = {
		text = russoc.501.d.integration_level_1
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic }
			NOT = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.501.d.integration_level_2
		trigger = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.501.d.integration_final
		trigger = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		OR = { 
			has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic
			has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal
			has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_equal
			has_autonomy_state = kr_labour_commune
		}
	}

	immediate = {
		save_event_target_as = target
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event russoc.501 option russoc.501.a"
		name = russoc.501.a
		hidden_effect = { overlord = { country_event = russoc.502 } }
		effect_tooltip = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic }
				overlord = {
					add_collaboration = { target = ROOT value = 0.05 }
					SOV_integrate_TARGET_effect = yes
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_equal }
				overlord = {
					add_collaboration = { target = ROOT value = 0.05 }
					set_autonomy = {
						target = event_target:target
						autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic
						end_wars = no
					}
				}
			}
			else = {
				overlord = {
					add_collaboration = { target = ROOT value = 0.05 }
					set_autonomy = {
						target = event_target:target
						autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_equal
						end_wars = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Increased Integration of FROM
	id = russoc.502
	title = russoc.502.t

	desc = {
		text = russoc.502.d.integration_level_1
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic }
			NOT = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.502.d.integration_level_2
		trigger = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal }
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.502.d.integration_final
		trigger = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {
		FROM = { save_event_target_as = target }
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event russoc.502 option russoc.502.a"
		name = russoc.502.a
		add_collaboration = { target = FROM value = 0.05 }
		if = {
			limit = { FROM = { has_autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic } }
			SOV_integrate_TARGET_effect = yes
		}
		else = {
			FROM = { get_current_government_type = yes }
			if = {
				limit = { FROM = { has_autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal } }
				set_autonomy = {
					target = FROM
					autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic
					end_wars = no
				}
			}
			else = {
				set_autonomy = {
					target = FROM
					autonomy_state = kr_soviet_republic_not_equal
					end_wars = no
				}
			}
			FROM = { restore_previous_government_type = yes }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Red Latvia
	id = russoc.507
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.507"}
	title = russoc.507.t
	desc = russoc.507.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		880 = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_latvian_autonomy } }
		has_war_with = BAT
	}

	option = {
		name = russoc.507.a #
		set_temp_variable = { target = LAT }
		880 = { transfer_state_during_war = yes }
		LAT = { get_current_government_type = yes }
		set_autonomy = {
			target = LAT
			autonomy_state = kr_autonomous_soviet_republic
			end_wars = no
		}
		LAT = {
			restore_previous_government_type = yes
			load_focus_tree = LAT_socialist_focus
			complete_national_focus = LAT_the_second_iskolat
			division_template = {
				name = "Sarkanā Gvarde"
				division_names_group = LAT_MIL_01

				regiments = {
					militia = { x = 0 y = 0 }
					militia = { x = 0 y = 1 }
					militia = { x = 0 y = 2 }
					militia = { x = 1 y = 0 }
					militia = { x = 1 y = 1 }
					militia = { x = 1 y = 2 }
				}
			}
			random_owned_controlled_state = {
				prioritize = { 880 }
				### calculate number of units to spawn
				set_temp_variable = { total_units_to_spawn = LAT.red_guards_formed }
				### failsafe so at least one unit is always spawned
				clamp_temp_variable = { var = total_units_to_spawn min = 1 }

				### spawn normal militias
				set_temp_variable = { counter = 1 }
				if = {
					limit = {
						check_variable = { var = total_units_to_spawn value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
					}
					for_loop_effect = {
						start = 1
						end = total_units_to_spawn
						compare = less_than_or_equals

						meta_effect = {
							text = {
								create_unit = {
									division = "division_template = \"Sarkanā Gvarde\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
									allow_spawning_on_enemy_provs = yes
									owner = LAT
								}
							}
						}
						add_to_temp_variable = { counter = 1 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_unshlikht
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.513.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_ZINOVIEV }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_zinoviev_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -2 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = { has_government = totalist }
			}
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		}
		else = {
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 2 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		}		
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.513.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MOLOTOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_KAGANOVICH }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_MAYAKOVSKY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YAGODA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_YEZHOV }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_politburo_struggle option = SOV_PATH_INTERNATIONALISTS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_molotov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_mayakovsky_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_kaganovich_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yagoda_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_yezhov_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_internationalists_ai
				}
			}
		}
		add_stability = -0.05
		set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = -1 }
		SOV_change_politburo_left_communists = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = { has_government = totalist }
			}
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_hardliners = yes
		}
		else = {
			set_temp_variable = { politburo_change = 1 }
			SOV_change_politburo_bukharin = yes
		}		
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = POL decision = SOV_establish_polrevkom }
	}
}

country_event = { #Unshlikht
	id = russoc.517
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.517"}
	title = russoc.517.t	
	desc = {
		text = russoc.517.d
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_POL
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.517.d2
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_compromise
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = russoc.517.d3
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_POL
				has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_compromise
			}
		}
	}
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_event_unshlikht
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.517.a	
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_POL
		}
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = KR_close_allies }
		if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { is_in_faction_with = FROM }
			}
			FROM = { give_guarantee = ROOT }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.512.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_compromise
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = POL_the_great_debate option = POL_THE_GREAT_DEBATE_SYNDIE_RADSOC }
					has_game_rule = { rule = POL_the_great_debate option = POL_THE_GREAT_DEBATE_SYNDIE_SYN }
					has_game_rule = { rule = POL_the_great_debate option = POL_THE_GREAT_DEBATE_SYNDIE_TOTAL }
				}
			}
		}
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = KR_disapproves_of_govt }
		set_politics = { ruling_party = totalist }
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Józef Unszlicht"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/POL/Portrait_POL_Jozef_Unszlicht.png"
			expire = "1965.1.1"
			ideology = zinovievism_subtype
		}
		effect_tooltip = { SOV_puppet_ROOT_effect = yes }
		RUS = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.514
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.512.b
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_compromise
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 70
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				has_government = syndicalist
			}
		}
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = KR_disapproves_of_govt }
		increase_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
		RUS = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.515
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.517.b	
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_POL
				has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_compromise
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
		}
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = KR_displeased }
		RUS = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.513
				days = 7
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.511.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_POL
				has_country_flag = SOV_FRA_supported_compromise
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 3
				has_government = totalist
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 1.5
				has_government = radical_socialist
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				OR = {
					RUS = { is_owner_neighbor_of = ROOT }
					RUS = {
						any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = ROOT }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = POL_the_great_debate option = POL_THE_GREAT_DEBATE_SYNDIE_RADSOC }
					has_game_rule = { rule = POL_the_great_debate option = POL_THE_GREAT_DEBATE_SYNDIE_SYN }
					has_game_rule = { rule = POL_the_great_debate option = POL_THE_GREAT_DEBATE_SYNDIE_TOTAL }
				}
			}
		}
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = KR_displeased }
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
		country_event = {
			id = russoc.512
			days = 7
		}

country_event = { #'Protecting' the Baltics
	id = russoc.520
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.520"}
	title = russoc.520.t	
	desc = russoc.520.d	
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = russoc.520.a		
		ai_chance = {
			base = 75
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = EST
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = EST_forpol option = EST_FORPOL_GERMANY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = EST_forpol option = EST_FORPOL_SCANDI }
					has_game_rule = { rule = EST_forpol option = EST_FORPOL_UKRAINE }
					has_game_rule = { rule = EST_forpol option = EST_FORPOL_NEUTRALITY }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = LAT
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = LAT_forpol option = LAT_FORPOL_UKRAINE }
					has_game_rule = { rule = LAT_forpol option = LAT_FORPOL_NEUTRALITY }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 50
				OR = {
					LAT = { has_idea = SOV_baltic_neutrality }
					EST = { has_idea = SOV_baltic_neutrality }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -50
				has_government = social_liberal
			}
		}
		add_popularity = { ideology = var:FROM.current_party_ideology_group popularity = 0.03 }
		add_ideas = SOV_baltic_neutrality
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.522
				days = 3
				random_days = 2
			}
			hidden_effect = {				
				country_event = {
					id = russoc.523
					days = 120
					random_days = 200
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russoc.520.b	
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				add = 50
				has_country_flag = RUS_alliance_refused_@FROM
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 50
				has_government = social_liberal
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -150
				tag = EST
				has_elected_government = yes
				FIN = {
					has_democratic_government = yes
					NOT = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
				}
				OR = {
					SWE = {
						has_completed_focus = SCANDINAVIA_nordic_council
					}
					country_exists = SCA
				}
				SWE = {
					has_elected_government = yes

				}
				DEN = { has_elected_government = yes }
				OR = {
					NOR = {
						has_elected_government = yes
						NOT = { has_completed_focus = NOR_DEM_armed_neutrality }
						NOT = { has_completed_focus = NOR_DEM_canadian_relations }
					}
					AND = {
						NOT = {
							country_exists = NOR
						}
						110 = {
							is_owned_by = SWE
						}
					}
				}
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = EST_forpol option = EST_FORPOL_GERMANY } }
			}
		}
		add_popularity = { ideology = var:FROM.current_party_ideology_group popularity = -0.03 }
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = russoc.521
				days = 3
				random_days = 2
			}
		}
	}
}

	id = russoc.531
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.531"}
	title = russoc.531.t
	desc = russoc.531.d
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #Yes
		name = russoc.531.a
		if = {
			limit = { 
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored 
				FROM = { is_possible_autonomous_soviet_republic_tag = yes }
			}
			SOV_puppet_FROM_effect = yes
		}
		add_to_faction = FROM
	}
}

			type = annex_everything
			target = FROM
		}
	}

country_event = { #BUL revolution
	id = russoc.534
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.534"}
	title = russoc.534.t
	desc = russoc.534.d
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #
		name = russoc.534.a
		clr_country_flag = BUL_liberal_government
		if = {
			limit = { is_subject = yes }
			overlord = {
				set_autonomy = {
					target = BUL
					autonomy_state = autonomy_free
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { is_in_faction = yes }
			leave_faction = yes
		}
		every_enemy_country = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = OTT_war_for_thrace }
			}
			white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
		}
		add_political_power = -125
		add_stability = -0.1
		add_popularity = {
			ideology = syndicalist
			popularity = 0.2
		}
		set_country_flag = BUL_syndicalist_government
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			BUL_Avram_Gachev_hog_syn
			BUL_Traicho_Kostov_for_syn
			BUL_Ivan_Stefanov_eco_syn
			BUL_Georgi_Damyanov_sec_syn
		}
		set_politics = {
			ruling_party = syndicalist
			elections_allowed = no
		}
		remove_ideas = BUL_asserting_the_tsars_power_idea
		add_ideas = BUL_restructuring_the_state_idea
		if = {
			limit = { has_unit_leader = 76891 }
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 76891 }
				remove_unit_leader = yes
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = {
				id = bulgaria.36
				days = 3
			}
			news_event = {
				id = worldnews.144
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
}

	option = { #

			NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_soviet_federation }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_NSP }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PSR }

					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR_CHEKA }
					has_game_rule = { rule = SOV_path option = RULE_OPTION_SOV_PATH_PLSR_LEGALIST }

	id = russoc.537
	immediate = {

					has_cosmetic_tag = SOV_psr
				}
				set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_union_psr
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_cosmetic_tag = SOV_labor_republic
				}
				set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_union_labor_republic
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					SOV_yezhov_in_power = yes
				}
				set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_union_yezhov

			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_cosmetic_tag = SOV_zhdanov }
				}
				set_cosmetic_tag = SOV_union
			}
		}
	}
	title = russoc.537.t
	desc = russoc.537.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes

	option = { #
		name = russoc.537.a
		add_political_power = 100
		increase_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes

			limit = { 
				has_resistance = yes
				OR = {

					is_core_of = WHR
					is_core_of = GEO
					is_core_of = AZE
					is_core_of = ARM
					is_core_of = EST
					is_core_of = LAT
					is_core_of = LIT
					is_core_of = BAT
					is_core_of = UZB
					is_core_of = KHI
					is_core_of = MON
					is_core_of = ABK
					is_core_of = FIN
					is_core_of = POL
					is_core_of = EPR
				}
			}
			add_compliance = 5
		}

		}
	}

country_event = { #Union formation
	id = russoc.539
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russoc.539" }
	title = russoc.539.t
	desc = russoc.539.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = { #
		name = russoc.539.a
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				has_resistance = yes
				OR = {
					is_core_of = UKR
					is_core_of = WHR
					is_core_of = GEO
					is_core_of = AZE
					is_core_of = ARM
					is_core_of = EST
					is_core_of = LAT
					is_core_of = LIT
					is_core_of = BAT
					is_core_of = UZB
					is_core_of = KHI
					is_core_of = MON
					is_core_of = ABK
					is_core_of = FIN
					is_core_of = POL
					is_core_of = EPR
				}
			}
			add_resistance = 5
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		# Totalist Bolsheviks
		if = {
			limit = {
				SOV_any_bolshevik_in_power = yes
				has_government = totalist
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rkp_is_rkrp }
				set_party_name = { 
					ideology = totalist 
					name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party
					long_name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party_long
				}
				set_party_name = { 
					ideology = radical_socialist 
					name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party
					long_name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party_long
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_repressed_left_srs }
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = syndicalist 
						name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party
						long_name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party_long
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rsrpi_united_with_rkp }
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = social_democrat 
						name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party
						long_name = SOV_zinoviev_union_party_long
					}
				}
			}
			else = {
				set_party_name = { 
					ideology = totalist 
					name = SOV_vkp_rso_party
					long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long
				}
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = radical_socialist
					name = SOV_vkp_rso_party
					long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_repressed_left_srs }
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = syndicalist 
						name = SOV_vkp_rso_party
						long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rsrpi_united_with_rkp }
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = social_democrat 
						name = SOV_vkp_rso_party
						long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long
					}
				}
			}
		}
		# Radsoc Bolsheviks
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				SOV_any_bolshevik_in_power = yes
				has_government = radical_socialist
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_rkp }
				set_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vkp
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = radical_socialist
					name = SOV_vkp_rso_party
					long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Rapprochement_Bolsheviks }
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = totalist
						name = SOV_vkp_rso_party
						long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rsrpi_united_with_rkp }
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = social_democrat 
						name = SOV_vkp_rso_party
						long_name = SOV_vkp_union_party_long
					}
				}
			}
			else = {
				set_country_flag = RUS_nsp_is_vsp
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = radical_socialist
					name = SOV_vsp_rso_party
					long_name = SOV_vsp_union_party_long
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_Rapprochement_Bolsheviks }
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = totalist
						name = SOV_vsp_rso_party
						long_name = SOV_vsp_union_party_long
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_rsrpi_united_with_rkp }
					set_party_name = { 
						ideology = social_democrat 
						name = SOV_vsp_rso_party
						long_name = SOV_vsp_union_party_long
					}
				}
			}
		}
		# Socdems
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_government = social_democrat
				has_country_flag = RUS_rsrpi_exists
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_rsrpi_is_vsrpi
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = social_democrat
				name = SOV_ssdrp_party
				long_name = SOV_ssdrp_party_long
			}
		}
		
	}
	option = { #
		name = russoc.539.b
		trigger = { NOT = { has_idea = SOV_union_centralized_federation } }
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				has_resistance = yes
				OR = {
					is_core_of = UKR
					is_core_of = WHR
					is_core_of = GEO
					is_core_of = AZE
					is_core_of = ARM
					is_core_of = EST
					is_core_of = LAT
					is_core_of = LIT
					is_core_of = BAT
					is_core_of = UZB
					is_core_of = KHI
					is_core_of = MON
					is_core_of = ABK
					is_core_of = FIN
					is_core_of = POL
					is_core_of = EPR
				}
			}
			add_compliance = 2
		}
	}
	option = { #
		name = russoc.539.c
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				has_resistance = yes
				OR = {
					is_core_of = UKR
					is_core_of = WHR
					is_core_of = GEO
					is_core_of = AZE
					is_core_of = ARM
					is_core_of = EST
					is_core_of = LAT
					is_core_of = LIT
					is_core_of = BAT
					is_core_of = UZB
					is_core_of = KHI
					is_core_of = MON
					is_core_of = ABK
					is_core_of = FIN
					is_core_of = POL
					is_core_of = EPR
				}
			}
			add_resistance = 10
		}
	}
}

			}
			clear_relations_with_PREV = yes
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1004 days = 2 random = 48 }
		}
		hidden_effect = { 
			if = {
				limit = { UKR = { is_in_faction_with = GER } }
				KUB = {
					UKR = { clear_relations_with_PREV = yes }
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.129
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #
		name = rusfor.128.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
		if = {
			limit = {  
				country_exists = DKB
				DKB = { 
					is_subject = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					don_is_pro_german = yes
					don_is_pro_russian = no
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			DKB = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {  
				OR = { #for landlocked countries
					is_owner_neighbor_of = MTR
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = MTR }
				}
				country_exists = KLY
				KLY = {
					is_subject = no
					is_in_faction = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					NOT = { has_government = social_democrat }
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			KLY = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
			set_global_flag = GER_invited_KLY
		}
		if = {
			limit = {  
				country_exists = KUB
				KUB = {
					is_subject = no
					KUB_has_bolsheviks = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					kuban_is_pro_german = yes
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			KUB = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = { #for landlocked countries
					is_owner_neighbor_of = MTR
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = MTR }
				}
				country_exists = MTR
				MTR = {
					is_subject = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			MTR = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
			set_global_flag = GER_invited_MTR
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = { #for landlocked countries
					is_owner_neighbor_of = DAG
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = DAG }
				}
				country_exists = DAG
				DAG = {
					is_subject = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			DAG = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
			set_global_flag = GER_invited_DAG
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.131
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Kerensky Germany
	id = rusfor.140
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.140"}
	title = rusfor.140.t
	desc = rusfor.140.d
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #
		name = rusfor.140.a
		if = {
			limit = { 
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_KER_eastern_europe_full }
			}
			every_other_country = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						original_tag = WHR
						original_tag = UKR
						original_tag = CRM
						original_tag = MOL
					}
					OR = {
						is_ally_of_ROOT = yes
						is_guaranteed_by = ROOT
					}
				}
				country_event = { id = rusfor.138 days = 2 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			every_other_country = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_ally_of_ROOT = yes
						is_guaranteed_by = ROOT
					}
					any_owned_state = {
						OR = {
							state = 1087
							state = 1294
							is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = yes
						}
					}
				}
				country_event = { id = rusfor.139 days = 2 }
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Zemgor
	id = rusfor.152
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.152"}
	title = rusfor.152.t
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.152.d
		trigger = { 
			OR = {
				AND = {
					OR = {
						has_conservative_government = yes
						has_authoritarian_government = yes
					}
					has_country_flag = RUS_zemgor_trubetskoy
				}
				AND = {
					NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemgor_trubetskoy }
					has_conservative_government = no
					has_authoritarian_government = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.152.d2
		trigger = { 
			OR = {
				AND = {
					OR = {
						has_conservative_government = yes
						has_authoritarian_government = yes
					}
					NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemgor_trubetskoy }
				}
				AND = {
					has_country_flag = RUS_zemgor_trubetskoy
					has_conservative_government = no
					has_authoritarian_government = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	fire_only_once = yes	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	trigger = {
		original_tag = RUS
		has_war_with = GER
		OR = {
			russia_is_democratic = yes
			has_completed_focus = RUS_Civil_Administration_Reform
			has_completed_focus = RUS_Strength_Through_Order
			has_completed_focus = RUS_Purify_The_Bureacracy
		}
		NOT = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_nationalized_defence
			has_idea = RUS_zemgor_supplies
			has_idea = RUS_zemgor_supplies_bad
			has_idea = RUS_central_vpk
			has_country_flag = RUS_dissolved_zemgor
		}
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_zemgor
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.152.a
		trigger = { 
			OR = {
				AND = {
					OR = {
						has_conservative_government = yes
						has_authoritarian_government = yes
					}
					NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_zemgor_trubetskoy }
				}
				AND = {
					has_country_flag = RUS_zemgor_trubetskoy
					has_conservative_government = no
					has_authoritarian_government = no
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_nationalized_defence
		add_ideas = rus_better_infantry_production_focus
		add_two_random_military_factories = yes
		add_two_random_military_factories = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		if = {
			limit = { has_dlc_aat = yes }
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			mio:RUS_avtomobilnoe_moskovskoe_organisation = {
				add_mio_funds_gain_factor = 0.05
				add_mio_research_bonus = -0.05
			}
			mio:RUS_nizhegorodsky_avtomobilny_organisation = {
				add_mio_funds_gain_factor = 0.05
				add_mio_research_bonus = -0.05
			}
			mio:RUS_sormovo_organisation = {
				add_mio_funds_gain_factor = 0.05
				add_mio_research_bonus = -0.05
			}
			mio:RUS_putilovets_organisation = {
				add_mio_funds_gain_factor = 0.05
				add_mio_research_bonus = -0.05
			}
			mio:RUS_yakovlev_organisation = {

country_event = { #Zemgor
	id = rusfor.153
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.153"}
	title = rusfor.152.t
	desc = rusfor.153.d
	
	
	fire_only_once = yes	
	
	trigger = {
		original_tag = RUS
		has_war_with = GER
		OR = {
			russia_is_democratic = no
			has_country_flag = RUS_dissolved_zemgor
		}
		NOT = { 
			has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored 
			has_idea = RUS_zemgor_supplies
			has_idea = RUS_zemgor_supplies_bad
			has_idea = RUS_central_vpk
			has_idea = rus_better_infantry_production_focus
			has_country_flag = RUS_nationalized_defence
		}
		OR = {
			stockpile_ratio = {
				archetype = infantry_equipment
				ratio < 0.5
			}
			stockpile_ratio = {
				archetype = support_equipment
				ratio < 0.5
			}
			stockpile_ratio = {
				archetype = artillery_equipment
				ratio < 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	mean_time_to_happen = {
		months = 7
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_zemgor

	option = {
		name = rusfor.152.a
		set_country_flag = RUS_nationalized_defence
		add_ideas = rus_better_infantry_production_focus
		add_two_random_military_factories = yes

			limit = { has_dlc_aat = yes }
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			mio:RUS_avtomobilnoe_moskovskoe_organisation = {

		name = rusfor.167.a

			is_actual_major = yes
			has_socialist_government = no
			NOT = { 
				is_in_faction_with = RUS 
				is_in_faction_with = EGY
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.167.b
		trigger = { 
			has_socialist_government = yes 
			NOT = { 
				is_in_faction_with = RUS  
				is_in_faction_with = EGY
			}
		}
	}	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.167.c
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				is_actual_major = no
				is_in_faction_with = RUS
				is_in_faction_with = EGY
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Anti Internationale Pact Event
	id = rusfor.202
	title = rusfor.202.t
	desc = rusfor.202.d

	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_lenin_map

	option = { #We shall join the crusade against the reds
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.202 option rusfor.202.a"
		name = rusfor.202.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				has_opinion = { target = FROM value > 20 }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 6
				is_ally_with = ENT
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 4
				has_authoritarian_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				has_right_democratic_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				has_left_democratic_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					tag = SCA
					tag = SWI
					AND = {
						tag = IRE
						has_guarantor = yes
						NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = FROM }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = IRE
				has_game_rule = { rule = IRE_forpol option = IRE_FORPOL_NEUTRAL }
				has_war = no
			}
		}
		add_ideas = RUS_anti_internationale_pact
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = FROM } }
			FROM = { give_guarantee = ROOT }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			FRA = { country_event = rusfor.203 }
			FROM = { country_event = rusfor.203 }
		}
	}
	option = { #None of our business
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.202 option rusfor.202.b"
		name = rusfor.202.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 4
				has_opinion = { target = INT value > 20 }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				is_subject_of = FROM
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				is_ally_with = FROM
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				has_left_democratic_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				FROM = { has_authoritarian_government = yes }
				has_democratic_government = yes
				NOT = {
					is_ally_with = ENT
					is_ally_with = FROM
				}
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			FROM = { country_event = { id = rusfor.75 hours = 8 } }
		}
	}
}
