country_event = { #Tilsit Conference Demands
	id = rusfor.207
	title = rusfor.207.t
	desc = rusfor.207.desc

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #Demand mutual guarantees to remaining neutral countries in Europe (clause a)
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.207 option rusfor.207.a"
		name = rusfor.207.a
		trigger = {
			RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_a_agreed } }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 5
				has_authoritarian_government = no
				NOT = { has_government = totalist }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_conference option = RUS_CONFERENCE_SUCCESS }
				RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_b_agreed } }
				tag = RUS
				ENT = { is_faction_leader = yes }
				OR = {
					has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_over_flag
					has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_avoided_flag
					AND = {
						NOT = { CSA = { is_ally_with = INT } }
						NOT = { USA = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { COR = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { NEE = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { TEX = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { CAL = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { tag = RUS }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ENG = { is_ai = no }
					INT = {
						tag = FRA
						is_ai = yes
					}
				}
				ENG = { country_event = { id = rusfor.208 days = 1 } }
			}
			else = {
				INT = { country_event = { id = rusfor.208 days = 1 } }
			}
			add_faction_power_projection = -50
		}
		else = {
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.208 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
	option = { #Demand White Peace with Entente (clause b)
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.207 option rusfor.207.b"
		name = rusfor.207.b
		trigger = {
			RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_b_agreed } }
			tag = RUS
			ENT = { is_faction_leader = yes }
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_over_flag
				has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_avoided_flag
				AND = {
					NOT = { CSA = { is_ally_with = INT } }
					NOT = { USA = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
					NOT = { COR = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
					NOT = { NEE = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
					NOT = { TEX = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
					NOT = { CAL = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 3
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				OR = {
					RUS_russian_monarch = yes
					RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { tag = RUS }
			custom_effect_tooltip = rusfor.207.b.tt
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			if = {
				limit = {
					ENG = { is_ai = no }
					INT = {
						tag = FRA
						is_ai = yes
					}
				}
				ENG = { country_event = { id = rusfor.211 days = 1 } }
			}
			else = {
				INT = { country_event = { id = rusfor.211 days = 1 } }
			}
			add_faction_power_projection = -50
		}
		else = {
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.211 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
	option = { #Demand Mutual Army Limits (clause c)
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.207 option rusfor.207.c"
		name = rusfor.207.c
		trigger = {
			RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_agreed } }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes	
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 4
				OR = {
					has_government = syndicalist
					has_government = radical_socialist
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_conference option = RUS_CONFERENCE_SUCCESS }
				RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_b_agreed } }
				tag = RUS
				ENT = { is_faction_leader = yes }
				OR = {
					has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_over_flag
					has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_avoided_flag
					AND = {
						NOT = { CSA = { is_ally_with = INT } }
						NOT = { USA = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { COR = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { NEE = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { TEX = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
						NOT = { CAL = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		show_ideas_tooltip = RUS_army_limits
		if = {
			limit = { tag = RUS }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ENG = { is_ai = no }
					INT = {
						tag = FRA
						is_ai = yes
					}
				}
				ENG = { country_event = { id = rusfor.212 days = 1 } }
			}
			else = {
				INT = { country_event = { id = rusfor.212 days = 1 } }
			}
			add_faction_power_projection = -50
		}
		else = {
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.212 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
	option = { #Demand Embargo of Entente (clause d)
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.207 option rusfor.207.d"
		name = rusfor.207.d
		trigger = {
			RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_d_agreed } }
			is_ally_with = INT
			ENT = { is_faction_leader = yes }
		}
		ai_chance = { base = 10 }
		RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.213 days = 1 } }
	}
	option = { #That's all for now
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.207 option rusfor.207.e"
		name = rusfor.207.e
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_b_agreed } }
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_conference option = RUS_CONFERENCE_SUCCESS }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_a_agreed }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_b_agreed }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_agreed }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_d_agreed }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { tag = RUS }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ENG = { is_ai = no }
					INT = {
						tag = FRA
						is_ai = yes
					}
				}
				ENG = { country_event = { id = rusfor.207 days = 1 } }
			}
			else = {
				INT = { country_event = { id = rusfor.207 days = 1 } }
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.214 days = 1 }
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.214 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
}

					lkdp_in_power = yes
					pp_in_power = yes
					rkdp_in_power = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 5
				has_socialist_government = yes
				ENG = { has_government = radical_socialist }
			}
		}
		RUS = { set_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_agreed }
		RUS = { set_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_agreed_response }
		hidden_effect = {
			FROM = { country_event = { id = rusfor.209 days = 1 } }
		}
		show_ideas_tooltip = RUS_army_limits
	}
	option = { #Nope we're out
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.212 option rusfor.212.b"
		name = rusfor.212.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_conference option = RUS_CONFERENCE_SUCCESS }
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			FROM = { country_event = { id = rusfor.210 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Tilsit Succeeds
	id = rusfor.214
	title = rusfor.214.t
	desc = rusfor.214.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.214 option rusfor.214.a"
		name = rusfor.214.a
		if = {
			limit = { tag = RUS }
			every_other_country = {
				limit = { is_ally_with = INT }
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = PREV
					relation = non_aggression_pact
				}
			}
			add_faction_power_projection = 50
			hidden_effect = { news_event = { id = russia_news_events.26 days = 1 } }
		}
		if = { #Executes clause a
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_a_agreed } }
			if = {
				limit = { tag = RUS }
				every_other_country = {
					limit = {
						is_in_europe = yes
						NOT = { has_war_with = INT }
						NOT = { has_war_with = RUS }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = INT }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = ENT }
						NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = RUS }
					}
					add_to_array = { RUS.RUS_guarantee_countries = THIS }
					for_each_loop = {
						array = RUS.RUS_guarantee_countries
						value = v
						RUS = { give_guarantee = v }
					}
				}
				RUS = { set_country_flag = clause_a_done_3I }
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						tag = ENG
						tag = FRA
					}
				}
				every_other_country = {
					limit = {
						is_in_europe = yes
						NOT = { has_war_with = INT }
						NOT = { has_war_with = RUS }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = INT }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = ENT }
						NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = ENG }
					}
					add_to_array = { ENG.ENG_guarantee_countries = THIS }
					for_each_loop = {
						array = ENG.ENG_guarantee_countries
						value = v
						ENG = { give_guarantee = v }
					}
				}
				every_other_country = {
					limit = {
						is_in_europe = yes
						NOT = { has_war_with = INT }
						NOT = { has_war_with = RUS }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = INT }
						NOT = { is_ally_with = ENT }
						NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = FRA }
					}
					add_to_array = { FRA.FRA_guarantee_countries = THIS }
					for_each_loop = {
						array = FRA.FRA_guarantee_countries
						value = v
						FRA = { give_guarantee = v }
					}
				}
				RUS = { set_country_flag = RUS_clause_a_done }
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_a_done }
					RUS = { has_country_flag = clause_a_done_3I }
				}
				RUS = { clr_country_flag = RUS_clause_a_agreed }
				RUS = { clr_country_flag = RUS_clause_a_done }
				RUS = { clr_country_flag = clause_a_done_3I }
			}
		}
		if = { #Executes clause b
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_b_agreed } }
			every_country = {
				limit = {
					is_ally_with = ENT
					has_war_with = INT
					OR = {
						AND = {
							has_capitulated = yes
							any_owned_state = {
								OR = {
									controller = { is_ally_with = INT }
									any_neighbor_state = { controller = { is_ally_with = INT } }
								}
								impassable = no
							}
						}
						AND = {
							has_civil_war = yes
							any_enemy_country = {
								civilwar_target = PREV
								is_ally_with = INT
							}
						}
						AND = {
							any_home_area_neighbor_country = {
								is_ally_with = INT
								has_war_with = PREV
								same_continent_as_PREV = yes
								has_capitulated = no
							}
						}
						AND = {
							any_home_area_neighbor_country = {
								is_ally_with = INT
								has_war_with = PREV
								has_capitulated = no
							}
							meta_trigger = {
								text = {
									[ORIGINAL_CAPITAL] = { controller = { is_ally_with = INT } }
								}
								ORIGINAL_CAPITAL = "[THIS.OriginalCapital.GetId]"
							}
						}
					}
				}
				leave_faction = yes
				peace_out_non_neighbours_after_leaving_faction = yes
			}
			every_country = {
				limit = {
					is_ally_with = INT
					has_war_with = ENT
					OR = {
						AND = {
							has_capitulated = yes
							any_owned_state = {
								OR = {
									controller = { is_ally_with = ENT }
									any_neighbor_state = { controller = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
								}
								impassable = no
							}
						}
						AND = {
							has_civil_war = yes
							any_enemy_country = {
								civilwar_target = PREV
								is_ally_with = ENT
							}
						}
						AND = {
							any_home_area_neighbor_country = {
								is_ally_with = ENT
								has_war_with = PREV
								same_continent_as_PREV = yes
								has_capitulated = no
							}
						}
						AND = {
							any_home_area_neighbor_country = {
								is_ally_with = INT
								has_war_with = PREV
								has_capitulated = no
							}
							meta_trigger = {
								text = {
									[ORIGINAL_CAPITAL] = { controller = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
								}
								ORIGINAL_CAPITAL = "[THIS.OriginalCapital.GetId]"
							}
						}
					}
				}
				leave_faction = yes
				peace_out_non_neighbours_after_leaving_faction = yes
			}
			INT = {
				ENT = { white_peace_with_PREV = yes }
				if = {
					limit = { NFA = { is_ally_with = ENT } }
					NFA = { white_peace_with_PREV = yes }
				}
				for_each_scope_loop = {
					array = faction_members
					for_each_scope_loop = {
						array = ENT.faction_members
						diplomatic_relation = {
							country = PREV
							relation = non_aggression_pact
						}
						set_truce = { target = PREV days = 365 }
					}
				}
			}
			RUS = { clr_country_flag = RUS_clause_b_agreed }
			set_global_flag = tilsit_peace_success
		}
		if = { #Executes clause c
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_agreed } }
			if = {
				limit = { tag = RUS }
				RUS = { add_ideas = RUS_army_limits }
				RUS = { set_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_done }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { is_ally_with = INT }
				ENG = { add_ideas = RUS_army_limits }
				FRA = { add_ideas = RUS_army_limits }
				RUS = { set_country_flag = clause_c_done_3I }
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_done }
					RUS = { has_country_flag = clause_c_done_3I }
				}
				RUS = { clr_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_agreed }
				RUS = { clr_country_flag = RUS_clause_c_done }
				RUS = { clr_country_flag = clause_c_done_3I }
			}
		}
		if = { #Executes clause d
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_clause_d_agreed } }
			if = {
				limit = { tag = RUS }
				effect_tooltip = {
					every_other_country = {
						limit = { is_ally_with = ENT }
						embargo_PREV = yes
					}
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					for_each_scope_loop = {
						array = ENT.faction_members
						for_each_scope_loop = {
							array = RUS.faction_members
							embargo_PREV = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
			RUS = { clr_country_flag = RUS_clause_d_agreed }
		}
	}
}


country_event = { #Cossacks
	id = rusfor.300
	title = rusfor.300.t
	desc = rusfor.300.d

	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_cossack_hosts_dissolved }
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.300 option rusfor.300.a"
		name = rusfor.300.a
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { is_core_of = KUB }
			add_resistance = 5
		}
	}
	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.300 option rusfor.300.b"
		name = rusfor.300.b
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { is_core_of = KUB }
			add_compliance = 5
		}
		KUB = {
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = RUS_lineytsy_cossack }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_template = "Kazachya Diviziya" }
			}
			division_template = {
				name = "Kazachya Diviziya"	# Cossack Division
				division_names_group = COS_CAV_01
				regiments = {
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 0 y = 0 }
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 0 y = 1 }
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 0 y = 2 }
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 1 y = 0 }
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 1 y = 1 }
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 1 y = 2 }
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 2 y = 0 }
					irregular_cavalry = { x = 2 y = 1 }
				}
				support = {
					recon = { x = 0 y = 0 }
					artillery = { x = 0 y = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		create_unit = {
			division = "name = \"1-ya Kubanskaya kazachya diviziya\" division_template = \"Kazachya Diviziya\" start_experience_factor = 0.7"
			owner = ROOT
		}
	}
}

			owner = ROOT
		}
	}
}




### FOREIGN POLICY ###
country_event = { #alliance name
	id = rusfor.1
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1" }
	title = rusfor.1.t
	desc = rusfor.1.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1.a
		trigger = { has_democratic_government = yes }
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 40
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				OR = {
					ep_in_power = yes
					check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { is_faction_leader = yes }
			set_faction_name = russian_cis
		}
		else = {
			create_faction_from_template = { 
				template = faction_template_moscow_accord   
				name = russian_cis
				icon = GFX_faction_icon_cis
			}			

		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1.b
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 40
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				OR = {
					ep_in_power = yes
					check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
				ep_in_power = yes
				check_variable = { Duma_Bill_Status^9 = 1 }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { is_faction_leader = yes }
			set_faction_name = eurasian_bloc
		}
		else = {
			create_faction_from_template = { 
				template = faction_template_moscow_accord   
				name = eurasian_bloc
				icon = GFX_faction_eurasian_bloc
			}	
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1.c
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 60
		}
		if = {
			limit = { is_faction_leader = yes }
			set_faction_name = moscow_accord
		}
		else = {
			create_faction_from_template = { 
				template = faction_template_moscow_accord   
				name = moscow_accord
				icon = GFX_faction_russian_alliance
			}		

		}		
	}
}
	
	
country_event = { #Security of the Eastern border OTT
	id = rusfor.2
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.2" }
	title = rusfor.2.t
	desc = rusfor.2.d

	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = TUR
		is_subject = no
		has_war = no
		RUS = { is_subject = no }
		OR = {
			231 = {
				owner = {
					OR = {
						tag = RUS
						is_subject_of = RUS
					}
				}
			}
			has_country_flag = rus_negotiations
		}	
		country_exists = EGY
		NOT = {
			is_in_faction_with = EGY
			has_subject = EGY
		}
	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {
		months = 1
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.2.a #Send the Prince!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 70
		}
		add_political_power = -20
		RUS = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.3
				days = 2
				random = 48
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.2.b #No deals with the Russians!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 30
		}
		add_political_power = 20
	}
}

country_event = { #Join Rostorg?
	id = rusfor.7
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.7" }
	title = rusfor.7.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.7.d.independent
		trigger = { is_subject = no }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.7.d.subject
		trigger = { is_subject = yes }
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_read_write

	trigger = {
		is_in_faction_with = FROM
		RUS_is_in_rostorg = no
		NOT = {
			any_enemy_country = { is_ally_with = FROM }
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { # Yes
		name = rusfor.7.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 80
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = UKR
				is_subject = no
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -10
				FROM = { has_idea = RUS_moscow_accord_leader_expansionist }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -25
		RUS_add_to_rostorg = yes
		if = {
			limit = { is_subject = no }
			FROM = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.8 days = 1 }
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			every_subject_country = { country_event = rusfor.7 }
		}
	}

	option = { # No
		name = rusfor.7.b
		trigger = { is_subject = no }
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				ic_ratio = { tag = FROM ratio < 0.1 }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = 25
		FROM = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.9 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

			name = "Cuerpo de Voluntarios Ruso"

				cavalry = { x = 0 y = 3 }
				cavalry = { x = 1 y = 0 }
				cavalry = { x = 1 y = 1 }
				cavalry = { x = 1 y = 2 }
				cavalry = { x = 1 y = 3 }
			}
			support = {
				assault_battalion = { x = 0 y = 0 }
				artillery = { x = 0 y = 1 }
				engineer = { x = 0 y = 2 }
			}
		}
		add_manpower = 55000
		if = {
			limit = { RUS = { has_government = national_populist } }

				type = infantry_equipment

			}

				create_unit = {
					division = "name = \"Cuerpo de Voluntarios Ruso\" division_template = \"Cuerpo de Voluntarios Ruso\" start_experience_factor = 0.7"
					owner = ROOT
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			capital_scope = {
				create_unit = {
					division = "name = \"Cuerpo de Voluntarios Ruso\" division_template = \"Cuerpo de Voluntarios Ruso\" start_experience_factor = 0.5"
					owner = ROOT
				}
			}
		}

						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = AZE_FOREIGN_RUS } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = ARM
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = ARM_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = ARM_forpol option = ARM_FORPOL_RUS } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = AFG
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AFG_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AFG_forpol option = AFG_FORPOL_RUS } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = KOR
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = KOR_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = KOR_forpol option = KOR_FORPOL_RUSSIA } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = KOR
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = BRG_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = BRG_forpol option = BRG_FORPOL_RUSSIA } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = ITA
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = ITA_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = ITA_forpol option = ITA_FORPOL_RUSSIA } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = SPR
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = SPR_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = SPR_forpol option = SPR_FORPOL_RUSSIA } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = GEO
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GEO_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GEO_forpol option = GEO_FOREIGN_RUS } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = TUR
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = TUR_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = TUR_forpol option = TUR_FORPOL_RUS } }
						NOT = {
							AND = {
								has_game_rule = { rule = TUR_forpol option = TUR_FORPOL_SER }
								SER = { is_in_faction_with = RUS }
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		GER = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = ROOT }
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = non_aggression_pact
					active = no
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_guaranteed = ROOT }
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = guarantee
					active = no
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { gives_military_access_to = ROOT }
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = military_access
					active = no
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { gives_military_access_to = GER }
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = GER
				relation = military_access
				active = no
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { tag = BPL }
			FROM = { save_event_target_as = future_serbian_ally }
			if = {
				limit = { is_in_faction_with = BPL }
				save_event_target_as = former_pact_leader
				every_other_country = {
					limit = {
						is_in_faction_with = PREV
						is_subject = no
						has_capitulated = no

							tag = ITA
						}
					}

				}

			}
			set_global_flag = BPL_joined_MA
		}
		if = { #
			limit = {
				RUS = {
					OR = {
						has_socialist_government = yes
						nsp_in_power = yes
						rsdrp_in_power = yes

						lpsr_in_power = yes
					}
				}
				ROOT = { has_socialist_government = no }
			}
			add_ideas = RUS_diplo_socialist_influence
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			GER_remove_from_mitteleuropa = yes
			MIE_remove_from_intermarium = yes
			remove_from_all_tech_sharing_groups = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
			effect_tooltip = { FROM = { SOV_puppet_ROOT_effect = yes } }
		}
		hidden_effect = { 
		FROM = {
			set_country_flag = RUS_allied_@ROOT
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.53
				hours = 8
			}
		}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.52.b
		trigger = {
			FROM = {
				any_owned_state = { is_core_of = ROOT }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = BPL
				has_game_rule = { rule = SER_forpol option = SER_FORPOL_BELGRADE_PACT }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = TUR
				OTT_ottomans_have_post_defeat_content = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				num_divisions < 25
			}
		}
		FROM = { country_event = { id = rusfor.58 hours = 8 } }
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
			custom_effect_tooltip = if_FROM_agrees
			effect_tooltip = { FROM = { SOV_puppet_ROOT_effect = yes } }
		}
		if = { #Used for Right-VST faction
			limit = {
				RUS = {
					OR = {
						has_socialist_government = yes
						nsp_in_power = yes
						rsdrp_in_power = yes
						plsr_in_power = yes
						lpsr_in_power = yes
					}
				}
				ROOT = { has_socialist_government = no }
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = if_FROM_agrees
			effect_tooltip = { add_ideas = RUS_diplo_socialist_influence }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.52.c
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				tag = BPL
				has_game_rule = { rule = SER_forpol option = SER_FORPOL_BELGRADE_PACT }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				OR = {
					AND = {
						tag = SER
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = SER_forpol option = SER_FORPOL_RANDOM } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = SER_forpol option = SER_FORPOL_RUSSIA } }
					}
					AND = {
						tag = EST
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = EST_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = EST_forpol option = EST_FORPOL_RUSSIA } }
					}

						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GRE_foreign_policy option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GRE_foreign_policy option = GRE_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA } }
					}
					AND = {

						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = LAT_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
						NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = LAT_forpol option = LAT_FORPOL_ALLIANCE } }

country_event = { #Country responds
	id = rusfor.53
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.53" }

	title = {
		text = rusfor.53.t.accept
		trigger = { has_country_flag = RUS_allied_@FROM }
	}
	title = {
		text = rusfor.53.t.refuse
		trigger = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_allied_@FROM } }
	}

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.53.d.accept
		trigger = { has_country_flag = RUS_allied_@FROM }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.53.d.refuse
		trigger = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_allied_@FROM } }
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_diplomacy1

	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		FROM = {
			is_valid_peace_target = yes
			has_capitulated = no
			NOT = { has_war_with = ROOT }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.53.a
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = RUS_allied_@FROM
		}
		FROM = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { is_claimed_by = ROOT }
				remove_claim_by = ROOT
			}
		}		
		if = {
			limit = { 
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored 
				FROM = { is_possible_autonomous_soviet_republic_tag = yes }
			}
			SOV_puppet_FROM_effect = yes
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { FROM = { has_idea = TRK_tashkent_accords } }
				FROM = { get_current_government_type = yes }
				set_autonomy = {
					target = FROM
					autonomous_state = autonomous_territory
					freedom_level = 0.75
				}
				FROM = { restore_previous_government_type = yes }
			}
			else = {
				add_to_faction = FROM
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					FROM = {
						OR = {
							tag = EST
							tag = LAT
							tag = LIT
						}
					}
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_will_liberate_baltic
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					FROM = {
						OR = {
							tag = GEO
							tag = ARM
							tag = AZE
						}
					}
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_will_liberate_caucasus
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.53.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_allied_@FROM }
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_alliance_refused_@FROM
		add_opinion_modifier = {
			target = FROM
			modifier = KR_hates_govt
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = {
					OR = {
						tag = EST
						tag = LAT
						tag = LIT
					}
				}
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_will_annex_baltic
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = {
					OR = {
						tag = GEO
						tag = ARM
						tag = AZE
					}
				}
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_will_annex_caucasus
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Belgrade Pact members get choice to join Russia as well
	id = rusfor.54
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.54" }
	title = rusfor.54.t
	desc = rusfor.54.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_diplomacy3

	is_triggered_only = yes

	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.54.a
		trigger = {
			has_event_target = future_serbian_ally
			NOT = { has_war_with = event_target:future_serbian_ally }
			event_target:future_serbian_ally = { both_socialist_or_both_not_socialist = yes }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					RUS = {
						any_owned_state = { is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes }
					}
					AND = {
						RUS = {
							is_faction_leader = yes
							any_allied_country = {
								any_owned_state = { is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes }
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = GRE
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GRE_foreign_policy option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GRE_foreign_policy option = GRE_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA } }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { is_in_tech_sharing_group = balkan_research }
			remove_from_tech_sharing_group = balkan_research
		}
		event_target:future_serbian_ally = { country_event = { id = rusfor.55 hours = 8 } }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.54.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				OR = {
					RUS = {
						any_owned_state = { is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes }
					}
					AND = {
						RUS = {
							is_faction_leader = yes
							any_allied_country = {
								any_owned_state = { is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes }
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				tag = GRE
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GRE_foreign_policy option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = GRE_foreign_policy option = GRE_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA } }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { is_in_tech_sharing_group = balkan_research }
			remove_from_tech_sharing_group = balkan_research
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_in_faction_with = FROM
				is_subject = no
			}
			leave_faction = yes
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			RUS = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusfor.55
					days = 3
					random_hours = 72
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

	id = rusfor.58
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.58 FROM = [From.GetName]" }

	desc = rusfor.58.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_diplomacy1

	trigger = {
		is_faction_leader = yes
		NOT = { has_war_with = FROM }
		FROM = { is_valid_peace_target = yes }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.58.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
				has_socialist_government = no
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			add_to_faction = FROM

				limit = { is_core_of = FROM }
				transfer_state_to = FROM
			}
			FROM = {
				every_core_state = {
					remove_core_of = ROOT
					remove_claim_by = ROOT
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = { country_event = rusfor.59 }
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.58.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 100

				add = 40
				RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_alliance_refused_@FROM
		add_opinion_modifier = {

			modifier = KR_hates_govt
		}

	}
}

country_event = { #Russia accepts
	id = rusfor.59
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.59 FROM = [From.GetName]" }
	title = rusfor.59.t
	desc = rusfor.59.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_diplomacy1

	trigger = {
		is_valid_peace_target = yes
		NOT = { has_war_with = FROM }
		FROM = { is_faction_leader = yes }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.59.a	
		if = {
			limit = { 
				FROM = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
				is_possible_autonomous_soviet_republic_tag = yes
			}
			FROM = { SOV_puppet_ROOT_effect = yes }
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = TRK_tashkent_accords }
				get_current_government_type = yes
				FROM = {
					set_autonomy = {
						target = ROOT
						autonomous_state = autonomous_territory
						freedom_level = 0.75
					}
				}
				restore_previous_government_type = yes
			}
			else = {
				FROM = { add_to_faction = ROOT }
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					FROM = {
						OR = {
							tag = EST
							tag = LAT
							tag = LIT
						}
					}
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_will_liberate_baltic
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					FROM = {
						OR = {
							tag = GEO
							tag = ARM
							tag = AZE
						}
					}
				}
				set_country_flag = RUS_will_liberate_caucasus
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { is_core_of = ROOT }
				transfer_state_to = ROOT
			}
		}
		every_core_state = {
			remove_core_of = FROM
			remove_claim_by = FROM
		}
		if = { #Used for Right-VST faction
			limit = {
				RUS = {
					OR = {
						has_socialist_government = yes
						nsp_in_power = yes
						rsdrp_in_power = yes
						plsr_in_power = yes
						lpsr_in_power = yes
					}
				}
				ROOT = { has_socialist_government = no }
			}
			add_ideas = RUS_diplo_socialist_influence
		}		
	}
}

		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_UKR_protest
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.515.a
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_idea = local_parliaments }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 40
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_conservative_government = no
				RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = no
				has_authoritarian_government = no
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_ukraine = yes 
				has_resistance = yes
				is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = no
			}
			add_resistance = 30
			add_compliance = -15
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_ukraine = yes 
				has_resistance = yes
				is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = yes
			}
			add_resistance = 20
			add_compliance = -10
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.515.b
		trigger = {
			RUS_is_unitary = no
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_conservative_government = yes
					has_authoritarian_government = yes
					RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { is_ukraine = yes }
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_ukraine_modifier_autonomy }
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_resistance = -5
				add_compliance = 8
			}
		}
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = 137 decision = RUS_crimean_self_rule }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.515.c
		trigger = {
			RUS_is_unitary = no
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				has_conservative_government = no
				RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = no
				has_authoritarian_government = no
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_ukraine = yes
				is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = no
				NOT = { state = 241 }
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_ukraine_modifier_autonomy }
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 5
				add_resistance = 8
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_ukraine = yes
				is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = yes
				NOT = { state = 241 }
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_novorussia_modifier_autonomy }
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 8
			}
		}
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = 137 decision = RUS_crimean_self_rule }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.515.e
		trigger = {
			RUS_is_unitary = no
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_conservative_government = no
				RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = no
				has_authoritarian_government = no
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_ukraine = yes
				is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = no
				NOT = { state = 241 }
				has_resistance = yes
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_ukraine_modifier_autonomy }
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 2
				add_resistance = 8
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_ukraine = yes
				is_russian_majority_in_ukraine = yes
				NOT = { state = 241 }
			}
			add_resistance = 20
			add_compliance = -10
		}
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = 137 decision = RUS_crimean_self_rule }
	}
}

		ai_chance = { 
			base = 90
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = UKR_future option = UKR_FUTURE_HETMAN_DEM  }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		add_opinion_modifier = {
			target = FROM
			modifier = KR_close_allies
		}
		add_ideas = UKR_treaty_with_russia
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
		if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { has_idea = UKR_Vasyl_Zenkovskyi_sec_pau }
			}
			remove_ideas_with_trait = security_minister
			add_ideas = UKR_Vasyl_Zenkovskyi_sec_pau
		}
		UKR_skoropadsky_increase_russophiles = yes

				add_ideas = RUS_treaty_with_ukraine
				country_event = { 
					id = rusfor.531
					months = 2
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.527.b
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = UKR_foreign_policy option = UKR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = UKR_protofis_dismissed
		clr_country_flag = UKR_protofis_influencing
		if = {
			limit = { has_government = paternal_autocrat }
			remove_marlib_from_coalition = yes
		}
		else = {
			set_politics = { ruling_party = paternal_autocrat }
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = UKR_protofis_dismissed_tt
		UKR_increase_ivan_po_idea = yes
		UKR_increase_mikhnovskyi_idea = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = UKR_Borys_Butenko_hog_mli  }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
			add_ideas = UKR_Pavlo_Skoropadsky_hog_pau
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = UKR_Vsevolod_Demchenko_eco_pau 
					has_idea = UKR_Mykhailo_Kovalenko_eco_pau 
				}
			}
			remove_ideas_with_trait = economy_minister
			add_ideas = UKR_Mykola_Sakhno_Ustymovych_eco_pau
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = UKR_Igor_Kistyakovsky_sec_pau 
					has_idea = UKR_Vasyl_Zenkovskyi_sec_pau 
				}
			}
			remove_ideas_with_trait = security_minister
			add_ideas = UKR_Borys_Homzyn_sec_pau
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = { 
				id = rusfor.529
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
}

				NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT }
			}
			add_resistance = -10
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = { has_idea = RUS_Karl_Goppers_cos_npo }
				}
				add_compliance = 10
			}
			else = {
				add_compliance = 5
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_latvia_modifier_autonomy }
		}
		880 = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = BAT_Latgale_autonomous_region }
				}
				remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = BAT_Latgale_autonomous_region }
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_latvia_modifier_autonomy }
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				is_controlled_by = ROOT
				is_core_of = LIT
				NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT }
			}
			add_resistance = -10
			add_compliance = 5
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_lithuania_modifier_autonomy }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				188 = { #Memel
					is_owned_by = ROOT
					is_claimed_by = ROOT
				}
			}
			188 = {
				add_resistance = -10
				add_compliance = 5
				add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_lithuania_modifier_autonomy }
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.545 days = 125 random_days = 20 } #Elections in Latvia
			country_event = { id = rusfor.546 days = 75 } #Dictator of Latvia
			if = {
				limit = { 
					BAT = { has_country_flag = BAT_flight_to_riga }
				}
				country_event = { id = rusfor.548 days = 125 random_days = 20 } #Elections in Estonia
			}
			else = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.547 days = 45 } #Estonian troubles
			}
			country_event = { id = rusfor.543 days = 25 } #Baltic Resistance
			country_event = { id = rusfor.549 days = 125 random_days = 20 } #Elections in Estonia 
		}
	}
	option = { #Pursue full integration
		name = rusfor.538.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 5
				OR = {
					AND = {
						OR = {
							pp_in_power = yes
							rkdp_in_power = yes
						}
						has_a_pp_president = no
						has_a_rkdp_president = no
					}
					has_conservative_government = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_left_democratic_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				206 = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_belarus_modifier_autonomy } }
			}
		}
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_idea = local_parliaments }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				owns_state = 13
				owns_state = 11
				owns_state = 1091
			}
			add_stability = -0.075
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				count_triggers = {
					amount = 2
					owns_state = 13
					owns_state = 11
					owns_state = 1091
				}
			}
			add_stability = -0.05
		}
		else = {
			add_stability = -0.025
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				is_controlled_by = ROOT
				is_core_of = LAT
				is_core_of = EST
				is_core_of = LIT
				NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT }
			}
			add_compliance = -15
			add_resistance = 25
		}
		880 = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = BAT_Latgale_autonomous_region }
				}
				remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = BAT_Latgale_autonomous_region }
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.543 days = 25 } #Baltic Resistance
			country_event = { id = rusfor.546 days = 75 } #Dictator of Latvia
		}
	}
}

				target = ROOT
				autonomy_state = autonomous_territory
				end_wars = no
			}
			country_event = rusfor.541
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					AND = {
						has_authoritarian_government = yes
						RUS = { has_elected_government = yes }
					}
				}
			}
			restore_previous_government_type = yes
		}
	}
	option = { #I have a death wish
		name = rusfor.540.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = EST
				has_game_rule = { rule = EST_FORPOL option = EST_FORPOL_RUSSIA }
			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.05
		leave_faction = yes
		RUS = {
			country_event = rusfor.542
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Forest Brothers in Latvia/Estonia
	id = rusfor.543
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.543"}
	title = rusfor.543.t
	desc = {
		trigger = { #Latvia only
			owns_state = 1091
			NOT = { owns_state = 13 }
		}
		text = rusfor.543.d.latvia
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { #Estonia only
			owns_state = 13
			NOT = { owns_state = 1091 }
		}
		text = rusfor.543.d.estonia
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { #Estonia and Latvia
			owns_state = 1091
			owns_state = 13
		}
		text = rusfor.543.d.both
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_Forest_Brothers

	option = {
		name = rusfor.543.a
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 1091 } #Riga
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					is_core_of = LAT
					NOT = { state = 1091 }
				}
				add_resistance = 15
				add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_forest_brothers_resistance }
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					1091 = { #Riga
						NOT = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_latvia_modifier_autonomy } }
						is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT
					}
				}
				1091 = {
					add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_forest_brothers_resistance }
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_democratic_government = yes
					LAT = {
						OR = {
							has_authoritarian_government = yes
							has_socialist_government = yes
						}
					}
				}
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = { is_core_of = LAT }
					add_compliance = 5
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 13 }
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					is_core_of = EST
				}
				add_resistance = 15
				add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_forest_brothers_resistance }
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					13 = { #Estonia
						NOT = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_estonia_modifier_autonomy } }
						is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT
					}
				}
				13 = { #Estonia
					add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_forest_brothers_resistance }
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_democratic_government = yes
					EST = { has_authoritarian_government = yes }
				}
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						is_core_of = EST
					}
					add_compliance = 5
				}
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_forest_brothers_resistance }
			}
			ROOT = { activate_targeted_decision = { decision = RUS_counter_insurgency target = PREV } }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.544 days = 30 }
		}
	}
}

				}
				add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_dagestan_autonomy }
			}
		}
		1081 = { 
			add_core_of = GEO
			remove_core_of = AZE 
		}
		}
	}
	title = rusfor.550.t
	desc = rusfor.550.d

			is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT
			is_claimed_by = ROOT

				limit = { is_core_of = UKR }

				add_compliance = -5
			}
		}
	}

country_event = { #Germany's Reaction on Russian plans in Caucasus
	id = rusfor.1000
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1000" }
	title = rusfor.1000.t
	desc = rusfor.1000.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_towar
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = { 
		NOT = { has_global_flag = GER_withdrew_from_caucasus } 
	}
		

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1000.a #Threaten Russia and invite the endangered nations into the Völkerbund!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 65
			modifier = {
				factor = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
				NOT = {
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis 
						option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_REICHSPAKT
					}
				}
			}			
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_REICHSPAKT }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_EMBARGO }
				}
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -30
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1005
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1000.b #We don't care about the Caucasus.
		set_global_flag = GER_withdrew_from_caucasus
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 35
			modifier = {
				add = -25
				DKB = { 
					exists = yes
					don_is_pro_german = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				KUB = { 
					exists = yes
					kuban_is_pro_german = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0				
				OR = {
					DKB = {
						don_is_pro_german = yes
						is_ai = no
					}
					KUB = {
						kuban_is_pro_german = yes
						is_ai = no
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_NOT_CARE }
			}
		}
		every_other_country = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					capital_scope = { region = 135 } #Kuban 
					original_tag = MTR
					original_tag = DAG
				}
			}
			clear_relations_with_PREV = yes
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1004 days = 2 random = 48 }
		}
		hidden_effect = { 
			if = {
				limit = { UKR = { is_in_faction_with = GER } }
				KUB = {
					UKR = { clear_relations_with_PREV = yes }
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1001.a #Accept
		trigger = { has_socialist_government = no }
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = DKB
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = DKB_foreign_policy option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = DKB_foreign_policy option = DKB_PATH_REICHSPAKT } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = KUB
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = KUB_foreign option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = KUB_foreign option = KUB_FOREIGN_REICHSPAKT } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = MTR
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MTR_foreign option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MTR_foreign option = MTR_FOREIGN_GER } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = AZE
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = AZE_FOREIGN_GER } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = ABK
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = ABK_foreign option = DEFAULT } }
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_guaranteed = ROOT }
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = guarantee
					active = no
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }
				}
				add_to_faction = ROOT
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1002
				days = 1
				random = 24
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1001.b #Refuse
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				tag = DKB
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = DKB_foreign_policy option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = DKB_foreign_policy option = DKB_PATH_REICHSPAKT } }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				tag = KUB
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = KUB_foreign option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = KUB_foreign option = KUB_FOREIGN_REICHSPAKT } }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				tag = MTR
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MTR_foreign option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MTR_foreign option = MTR_FOREIGN_GER } }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				tag = AZE
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = AZE_FOREIGN_GER } }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				tag = ABK
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = ABK_foreign option = DEFAULT } }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_caucasian_crisis_refused_alliance
	}

country_event = { #FROM accepts
	id = rusfor.1002
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1002" }
	title = rusfor.1002.t
	desc = rusfor.1002.d

		name = rusfor.1002.a

			limit = {  
				country_exists = DKB
				DKB = { 
					is_subject = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					don_is_pro_german = yes
					don_is_pro_russian = no
					NOT = { 
						is_ally_with = RUS

					}

									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}

				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
		}

			limit = {  
				OR = { #for landlocked countries

					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = MTR }
				}
				country_exists = KLY
				KLY = {
					is_subject = no
					is_in_faction = no
					has_socialist_government = no

						}
					}

				}

country_event = { #Germany withdraws
	id = rusfor.1004
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1004" }
	title = rusfor.1004.t
	desc = rusfor.1004.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1004.a
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = GER modifier = KR_hates_govt }
		if = {
			limit = { tag = KUB }
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = KUB_Request_German_Help
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = KUB_Request_German_Help
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
				}
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
					add_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_ask_for_investments }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_infantry }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_support }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_artillery }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_fighters }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_bombers }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_tank }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_motorized }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_Ask_A_Bailout }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { tag = DKB }
			DKB_remove_german_mission = yes
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_progerman_politic
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_progerman_politic
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				complete_national_focus = DKB_distance_ourselves_from_germany
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_The_Enemy_of_my_Enemy
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_The_Enemy_of_my_Enemy
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				complete_national_focus = DKB_Expel_the_German_Admin
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_the_foreigners_coup
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_the_foreigners_coup
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				clr_country_flag = DKB_germans_in_power
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = paternal_autocrat
					name = DKB_authoritarian_democrat_party
					long_name = DKB_authoritarian_democrat_party_long
				}
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Afrikan Bogaewsky"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/DKB/Portrait_DKB_Bogaevskiy.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = pataut_cossack_subtype
				}
				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

			}
		}

			base = 70

					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_EMBARGO }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_NOT_CARE }
				}				
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				UKR = {
					is_in_faction_with = GER
					RUS_dont_attack_if_target_is_stronger = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0

					is_in_faction_with = GER
					RUS_dont_attack_if_target_is_stronger = yes
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = {

				id = rusfor.1006
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1005.a2 #Who cares?
		trigger = {

				has_idea = rus_brest_litovsk

				}
			}
		}
		FROM = {

				id = rusfor.1006
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1005.b #focus on central asia instead
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				408 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes }
				810 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes }
				861 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes }
				405 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_REICHSPAKT }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				date > 1939.6.1
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_GER_blocks_caucasus
		FROM = {

				days = 2

			modifier = {
				add = 100
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_EMBARGO }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -25
				DKB = { 
					exists = yes
					don_is_pro_german = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				KUB = { 
					exists = yes
					kuban_is_pro_german = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0				
				OR = {
					DKB = {
						don_is_pro_german = yes
						is_ai = no
					}
					KUB = {
						kuban_is_pro_german = yes
						is_ai = no
					}
				}
			}			
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				RUS = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
			}
		}	
		set_global_flag = GER_withdrew_from_caucasus
		add_political_power = -100		
		every_other_country = {
			limit = {
				capital_scope = {
					OR = {
						region = 134 #Caucasus
						region = 135 #Kuban
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
				GER = {
					diplomatic_relation = {
						country = PREV
						relation = guarantee
						active = no
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { is_subject_of = GER }
				GER = {
					set_autonomy = {
						target = PREV
						autonomy_state = autonomy_free
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
				leave_faction = yes
			}
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1004 days = 2 random = 48 }
		}
		embargo_FROM = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			for_each_scope_loop = {
				array = ROOT.faction_members
				RUS = { embargo_PREV = yes }
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			add_ideas = rus_ceased_contacts_germany
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1007
				days = 2
			}
		}		
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1006.b #
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_REICHSPAKT }
			}
		}		
		embargo_FROM = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			for_each_scope_loop = {
				array = ROOT.faction_members
				RUS = { embargo_PREV = yes }
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1007
				days = 2
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {  
				country_exists = DKB
				DKB = { 
					is_subject = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					don_is_pro_german = yes
					don_is_pro_russian = no
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			DKB = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {  
				OR = { #for landlocked countries
					is_owner_neighbor_of = KLY
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = KLY }
				}
				country_exists = KLY
				KLY = {
					is_subject = no
					is_in_faction = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					NOT = { has_government = social_democrat }
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			KLY = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
			set_global_flag = GER_invited_KLY
		}
		if = {
			limit = {  
				country_exists = KUB
				KUB = {
					is_subject = no
					KUB_has_bolsheviks = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					kuban_is_pro_german = yes
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			KUB = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = { #for landlocked countries
					is_owner_neighbor_of = MTR
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = MTR }
				}
				country_exists = MTR
				MTR = {
					is_subject = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			MTR = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
			set_global_flag = GER_invited_MTR
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = { #for landlocked countries
					is_owner_neighbor_of = DAG
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = DAG }
				}
				country_exists = DAG
				DAG = {
					is_subject = no
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
					OR = {
						has_war = no
						AND = {
							has_war = yes
							NOT = {
								any_enemy_country = {
									NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			DAG = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1001 days = 2 random = 48 }
			}
			set_global_flag = GER_invited_DAG
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #they betrayed us
	id = rusfor.1015
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1015" }
	title = rusfor.1015.t
	desc = rusfor.1015.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1015.a #there is nothing we can do...
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 40
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			RUS = { 
				country_event = rusfor.1012 
				annex_country = { target = ROOT }
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { tag = KUB }
			if = {
				limit = {

				}

				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
				}
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
					add_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_ask_for_investments }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_infantry }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_support }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_artillery }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_fighters }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_bombers }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_tank }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_motorized }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_Ask_A_Bailout }
			}

			}

				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_The_Enemy_of_my_Enemy
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_The_Enemy_of_my_Enemy
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				complete_national_focus = DKB_Expel_the_German_Admin
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_the_foreigners_coup
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_the_foreigners_coup
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				clr_country_flag = DKB_germans_in_power
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = paternal_autocrat
					name = DKB_authoritarian_democrat_party
					long_name = DKB_authoritarian_democrat_party_long
				}
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Afrikan Bogaewsky"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/DKB/Portrait_DKB_Bogaevskiy.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = pataut_cossack_subtype
				}
				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { original_tag = DKB }
				FROM = { country_event = rusfor.10150 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { original_tag = KUB }
				FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1284 }
			}
			else = {
				FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1289 }
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1015.b #resist
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 95 
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = {
					OR = {
						is_actual_major = yes
						is_neighbor_of = ROOT
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { target = FROM }
		clear_all_relations_with_TARGET = yes
		for_each_scope_loop = {
			array = ROOT.guarantor_array
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = ROOT
				relation = guarantee
				active = no
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { tag = KUB }
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = KUB_Request_German_Help
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = KUB_Request_German_Help
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
				}
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
					add_idea = DKB_german_military_mission
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_ask_for_investments }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_infantry }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_support }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_artillery }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_fighters }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_bombers }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_tank }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_buy_motorized }
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = KUB_Ask_A_Bailout }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { tag = DKB }
			DKB_remove_german_mission = yes
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_progerman_politic
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_progerman_politic
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				complete_national_focus = DKB_distance_ourselves_from_germany
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_The_Enemy_of_my_Enemy
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_The_Enemy_of_my_Enemy
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				complete_national_focus = DKB_Expel_the_German_Admin
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = DKB_the_foreigners_coup
				}
				uncomplete_national_focus = {
					focus = DKB_the_foreigners_coup
					uncomplete_children = no
					refund_political_power = yes
				}
				clr_country_flag = DKB_germans_in_power
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = paternal_autocrat
					name = DKB_authoritarian_democrat_party
					long_name = DKB_authoritarian_democrat_party_long
				}
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Afrikan Bogaewsky"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/DKB/Portrait_DKB_Bogaevskiy.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = pataut_cossack_subtype
				}
				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		RUS = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1016 random_hours = 24 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #The Azerbaijan question
	id = rusfor.1020
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1020" }
	title = rusfor.1020.t
	desc = rusfor.1020.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_azerbaijan
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1020.a #Threaten them with force
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.75
				AZE = { is_valid_peace_target = no }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_country_flag = RUS_will_liberate_caucasus
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				AZE = { RUS_is_in_rostorg = yes }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_AZE_annexation
		if = {
			limit = {
				AZE = { 
					OR = {
						is_guaranteed_by = GER
						is_guaranteed_by = OTT
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					TUR = { has_guaranteed = AZE }
				}
				TUR = {
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
				}
			}
			else = {
				GER = {
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				AZE = { is_subject = yes }
			}
			var:AZE.overlord = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				AZE = { 
					is_in_faction = yes 
					is_faction_leader = no
				}
			}
			var:AZE.faction_leader = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else = {
			AZE = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1020.b #Covert operations will be good enough.
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				add = -20
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				AZE = { RUS_is_in_rostorg = yes }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_AZE_treaty
		if = {
			limit = {
				AZE = { 
					OR = {
						is_guaranteed_by = GER
						is_guaranteed_by = OTT
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					TUR = { has_guaranteed = AZE }
				}
				TUR = {
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
				}
			}
			else = {
				GER = {
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				AZE = { is_subject = yes }
			}
			var:AZE.overlord = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1021 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event

				}
			}

country_event = { #Russian demands AZE
	id = rusfor.1021
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1021" }
	title = rusfor.1021.t
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1021.d
		trigger = { tag = AZE }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1021.d.overlord
		trigger = { NOT = { tag = AZE } }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1021.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_GEO_annexation }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_war = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { both_socialist_or_both_not_socialist = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				AZE = { RUS_is_in_rostorg = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = AZE_FOREIGN_RUS } 
			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.10
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		RUS = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1023 days = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1021.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_AZE_annexation }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				AZE = { AZE_musavat_in_power = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_AZE_treaty }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				has_war = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = DEFAULT }
					has_game_rule = { rule = AZE_forpol option = AZE_FOREIGN_RUS } 
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { tag = AZE }
			}
			set_temp_variable = { target = ROOT }
			AZE = {
				clear_all_relations_with_TARGET = yes
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1024 days = 1 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_AZE_treaty } }
				decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
				effect_tooltip = {
					if = {
						limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored } }
						RUS = { 
							set_temp_variable = { target = AZE }
							SOV_puppet_TARGET_effect = yes 
						}
					}
					else = {
						RUS = {
							set_autonomy = { 
								target = AZE
								autonomy_state = kr_nominal_puppet
							}
						}
						RUS_add_to_rostorg = yes
						add_ideas = rgoc
						give_resource_rights = {
							receiver = RUS
							state = 990
							resources = { oil }
						}
					}
				}
				
				hidden_effect = {
					RUS = {
						country_event = {
							id = rusfor.1030
							days = 200
							random_days = 45
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_AZE_annexation } }
				decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
				effect_tooltip = {
					RUS = { annex_country = { target = AZE } }
				}
			}
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1022 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
}

			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { both_socialist_or_both_not_socialist = yes }
			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.10
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		RUS = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1028 days = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1026.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_GEO_annexation }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				GEO = { 
					OR = {
						is_ally_with = GER
						has_country_flag = GEO_keep_treaty 
						has_government = market_liberal
						has_country_leader = { name = "Ioakhim I" ruling_only = yes } 
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_GEO_treaty }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				has_war = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { tag = GEO }
			}
			set_temp_variable = { target = ROOT }
			GEO = {
				clear_all_relations_with_TARGET = yes
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1029 days = 1 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_GEO_treaty } }
				decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
				effect_tooltip = {
					if = {
						limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored } }
						RUS = { 
							set_temp_variable = { target = GEO }
							SOV_puppet_TARGET_effect = yes 
						}
					}
					else = {
						RUS = {
							set_autonomy = { 
								target = GEO
								autonomy_state = kr_nominal_puppet
							}
						}
					}
				}
				
				hidden_effect = {
					RUS = {
						country_event = {
							id = rusfor.1030
							days = 200
							random_days = 45
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_GEO_annexation } }
				decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
				effect_tooltip = {
					RUS = { annex_country = { target = GEO } }
				}
			}
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1027 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
}

		name = rusfor.1027.a #Hooray
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_GEO_treaty }
			add_political_power = -15
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
				set_temp_variable = { target = GEO }
				SOV_puppet_TARGET_effect = yes 
			}
			else = {
				GEO = { get_current_government_type = yes }
				set_autonomy = { 
					target = GEO
					autonomy_state = kr_nominal_puppet
				}
				GEO = { restore_previous_government_type = yes }
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_stability = -0.04
			annex_country = {
				target = GEO
				transfer_troops = no
			}
		}
	}
}

					OR = {
						is_valid_peace_target = no

			}
		}
	}

		}
	}

			target = FROM

		}

country_event = { #GER Russia demands concessions in the Caucasus
	id = rusfor.1048
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1048" }
	title = rusfor.1048.t
	desc = rusfor.1048.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1048.a #Accept
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 75
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					DKB = {
						is_ai = no
						OR = {
							don_is_pro_german = yes
							is_ally_of_ROOT = yes
						}						
					}
					KUB = {
						is_ai = no
						OR = {
							kuban_is_pro_german = yes
							is_ally_of_ROOT = yes
						}
					}
					GEO = {
						exists = yes
						OR = {
							is_ally_of_ROOT = yes
							has_country_flag = GEO_keep_treaty 
							has_government = market_liberal
							has_country_leader = { name = "Ioakhim I" ruling_only = yes } 
						}
					}
					AZE = {
						exists = yes
						OR = {
							is_ally_of_ROOT = yes
							AZE_musavat_in_power = yes
							has_completed_focus = AZE_Ask_For_German_Bailout
						}
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_caucasus_crisis option = RUS_CAUCASUS_CRISIS_NOT_CARE }
			}
		}	
		FROM = { 
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1050 days = 3 random = 72 }
		}
		add_political_power = -100		
		every_other_country = {
			limit = {
				capital_scope = {
					OR = {
						region = 134 #Caucasus
						region = 135 #Kuban
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
				GER = {
					diplomatic_relation = {
						country = PREV
						relation = guarantee
						active = no
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { is_subject_of = GER }
				GER = {
					set_autonomy = {
						target = PREV
						autonomy_state = autonomy_free
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { is_ally_with = GER }
				leave_faction = yes
				peace_out_non_neighbours_after_leaving_faction = yes
			}
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1004 days = 2 random = 48 }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1048.b #Never!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 25
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1049
				days = 8
			}
		}
	}
}

		RUS_decrease_ruling_party_pop = yes

			array = FROM.faction_members
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_in_europe = yes
						tag = DKB
						tag = GEO
						tag = AZE
						tag = KUB
						tag = KLY
						tag = MTR
					}

						can_declare_war_on = PREV
						is_neighbor_of = PREV
					}
				}
				add_ai_strategy = {
					type = prepare_for_war
					id = ROOT
					value = -1000
				}
				ROOT = {
					clr_country_flag = RUS_prepare_for_war_@PREV
					add_ai_strategy = {
						type = prepare_for_war
						id = PREV
						value = -1000
					}
				}
			}
		}
