country_event = { #Ultimatum to PER
	id = rusfor.1065
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1065" }
	title = rusfor.1065.t
	desc = rusfor.1065.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1065.a #only land
		trigger = {
			PER = {
				any_owned_state = { 
					OR = {
						region = 134 
						region = 136 
						region = 243 
						region = 245 
						is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				PER = { is_subject = yes }
			}
			var:PER.overlord = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1066 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else = {
			PER = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1066 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1065.b #Northern Iran		
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_demands_northern_PER
		if = {
			limit = {
				PER = { is_subject = yes }
			}
			var:PER.overlord = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1066 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else = {
			PER = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1066 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1065.c #Neutrality
		trigger = {
			RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_demands_neutral_PER
		if = {
			limit = {
				PER = { is_subject = yes }
			}
			var:PER.overlord = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1066 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else = {
			PER = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1066 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Russia demands northern iran
	id = rusfor.1066
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1066" }
	title = rusfor.1066.t
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1066.d3
		trigger = { 
			RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_neutral_PER }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1066.d2
		trigger = { 
			RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_northern_PER }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1066.d
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { 
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_neutral_PER }
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_northern_PER }
			}
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1066.a #accept
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 30
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				FROM = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_northern_PER }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -25
				FROM = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_neutral_PER }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				has_war = yes
				surrender_progress > 0.1
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -100
		effect_tooltip = {
			PER = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = { 
						OR = {
							region = 134 
							region = 136 
							region = 243 
							region = 245 
							is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes
						}
					}
					transfer_state_to = ROOT
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_northern_PER }
				PER = {
					every_owned_state = {
						limit = { 
							OR = {
								state = 418
								state = 804
								state = 420
							}
						}
						transfer_state_to = FROM
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_neutral_PER }					
				PER = { 
					clear_all_relations = yes 
					add_ideas = RUS_PER_neutrality
				}
				FROM = { give_guarantee = PER }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_demands_puppet_PER }					
				FROM = { puppet = PER }
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1067
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1066.b #Never!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 70
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FROM = { dont_start_major_faction_wars = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FROM = { default_attack_AI_trigger_FROM = yes }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = 10
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1068
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
}

	id = rusfor.1092
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1092" }
	title = rusfor.1092.t
	desc = rusfor.1092.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1092.a #RUSKIE FACTORIES FOR THE CO PROSPERITY GRINDSET
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 95
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.35
				RUS = {
					any_enemy_country = {
						OR = {
							is_actual_major = yes
							is_chinese_tag = yes
						}
						NOT = { has_war_with = JAP }
					}
					surrender_progress > 0
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.6
				RUS = { surrender_progress > 0.5 }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				RUS = { surrender_progress > 0.8 }
			}
		}
		RUS = { set_country_flag = RUS_allies_JAP_flag }
		TRM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1093
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1092.b #Refuse, Transamur is ours!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = {
					OR = {
						is_actual_major = yes
						is_chinese_tag = yes
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = {
					is_ai = no 
					same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS_is_eurasia = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.1
				OR = {
					surrender_progress > 0.2
					NOT = {
						controls_state = 525
						controls_state = 527
						controls_state = 1345
						controls_state = 137
						controls_state = 536
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				strength_ratio = {
					tag = FROM
					ratio < 1
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = {
					rule = RUS_foreign_policy
					option = RUS_FOREIGN_POLICY_JAPAN
				}
			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.05
		TRM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.10877
				days = 7
			}
		}
	}
}

			modifier = {
				factor = 0.4
				RUS = { surrender_progress > 0.5 }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.4
				RUS = { surrender_progress > 0.8 }
			}
		}
		RUS = {
			set_country_flag = RUS_allies_JAP_flag
			country_event = rusfor.1097
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = RUS
						is_core_of = TRM
					}
					NOT = { is_core_of = JAP }
				}
				transfer_state_to = RUS
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1096.b #Refuse, filthy slavs
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 2
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = {
					OR = {
						is_actual_major = yes
						is_chinese_tag = yes
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = {
					is_ai = no 
					same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS_is_eurasia = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.1
				OR = {
					surrender_progress > 0.2
					NOT = {
						controls_state = 525
						controls_state = 527
						controls_state = 1345
						controls_state = 1347
						controls_state = 536
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				strength_ratio = {
					tag = FROM
					ratio < 1
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = {
					rule = RUS_foreign_policy
					option = RUS_FOREIGN_POLICY_JAPAN
				}
			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.05
		add_political_power = 50
		RUS = { country_event = rusfor.1098 }
	}
}

country_event = { #We get into CPS
	id = rusfor.1097
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1094" }
	title = rusfor.1097.t
	desc = rusfor.1097.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1097.a #yay
		JAP = {
			effect_tooltip = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							is_core_of = RUS
							is_core_of = TRM
						}
						NOT = { is_core_of = JAP }
					}
					transfer_state_to = RUS
				}
			}
		}
		add_timed_idea = {
			idea = RUS_co_prosperity_treaty
			days = 600
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			remove_ideas = RUS_co_prosperity_penalties
			add_to_array = { global.asian_economic_sphere = ROOT }
			JAP_recalculate_economic_integration = yes
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = JAP_asian_economic_sphere_member }
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				is_in_faction_with = RUS
				is_subject = no
			}
			RUS = { remove_from_faction = PREV }
			JAP = { add_to_faction = PREV }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Demands to mongolia
	id = rusfor.1110
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1110" }
	title = rusfor.1110.t
	desc = rusfor.1110.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_MON_mongols
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		MON = {
			owns_state = 329
			NOT = { has_war_with = RUS }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1110.a #Territorial concessions
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_left_democratic_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				MON = { is_ally_with = JAP }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_dem_fp option = MON_CONQUER_NOTHING }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_ISOLATION }
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_demanded_tuva
		hidden_effect = {
			MON = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1111 days = 4 } }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1110.b #Pro-Russian neutrality
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MON_dem_fp option = MON_CONQUER_NOTHING } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_ISOLATION } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_KHAN_WARPATH } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_PAN_MONGOL } }
				has_left_democratic_government = no
				NOT = { MON = { is_ally_with = JAP } }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON
		hidden_effect = {
			MON = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1111 days = 4 } }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1110.c #Join alliance
		trigger = {
			MON = { 
				OR = {
					is_in_faction = no 
					is_faction_leader = yes
				}
				at_peace_or_same_enemies_as_ROOT = yes
				NOT = { 
					has_government = national_populist								
					has_country_leader = {
						name = "Genghis Khan II"
						ruling_only = yes
					}
				}
				both_socialist_or_both_not_socialist = yes
			}
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = northwest_conflict_ended
				MON = { has_country_flag = mon_no_expansion }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				MON = {
					OR = {
						has_country_flag = MON_anfu_in_power_flag 
						has_country_flag = MON_buddhists_in_power_flag
					}
					has_government = paternal_autocrat
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_demanded_alliance
		hidden_effect = {
			MON = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1111 days = 4 } }
		}
	}	
}

country_event = { #Russia's Demands #for MON
	id = rusfor.1111
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1111" }
	title = {
		trigger = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty } }
		text = rusfor.1111.t
	}
	title = {
		trigger = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON } }
		text = rusfor.1111.t2
	}
	title = {
		trigger = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_alliance } }
		text = rusfor.1111.t3
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty } }
		text = rusfor.1111.d
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON } }
		text = rusfor.1111.d2
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_alliance } }
		text = rusfor.1111.d3
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_MON_mongols
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1111.a #If they want a fight, they'll get it!
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_tuva }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_war = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_tuva }
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_dem_fp option = MON_CONQUER_NOTHING }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_ISOLATION }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON }
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_PAN_MONGOL }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_QING }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_JAPAN }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_DIES_ANFU_EMPIRE }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_alliance }
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_PAN_MONGOL }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_DIES_SOYOMBO_TRM }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_DIES_SOYOMBO }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_completed_focus = MON_russia_friendship
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		RUS = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1121 days = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1111.b #Appeal to Transamur
		trigger = {
			RUS = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_alliance } }
			TRM = {
				OR = {
					is_owner_neighbor_of = ROOT
					any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = ROOT }
				}
				is_subject = no
				is_in_faction = no
				NOT = {
					has_war_with = MON
					has_war_with = RUS
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 				
					TRM = { TRM_nra_in_power = yes }
				}
				has_socialist_government = yes
			}
			else = {
				TRM = { TRM_nra_in_power = no }
				has_socialist_government = no
			}
			NOT = {
				has_government = national_populist
				has_country_leader = {
					name = "Genghis Khan II"
					ruling_only = yes
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 5
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_tuva }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON }
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_dem_fp option = MON_CONQUER_NOTHING }
					has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_ISOLATION }
				}
			}
		}
		TRM = { country_event = rusfor.1115 }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1111.c #Accept the demands
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_alliance }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = MON_path option = MON_UNGERN_DIES_SOYOMBO_TRM } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 20
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				has_war = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_government = national_populist
					has_country_leader = {
						name = "Genghis Khan II"
						ruling_only = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_alliance } }
			clear_all_relations_except_wars = yes		
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1113 days = 1 } }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON } }
			decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1112 days = 1 } }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_tuva } }
			decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
			effect_tooltip = { 
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							state = 329
							state = 811
							state = 1293
							state = 654
						}
					}
					transfer_state_to = RUS
				}
			}
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1114 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Friendship treaty with Russia
	id = rusfor.1112
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1112" }
	picture = GFX_report_event_MON_mongols
	title = rusfor.1112.t
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1112.d.mongolia
		trigger = { tag = MON }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1112.d.russia
		trigger = { tag = RUS }
	}
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1112.a #Could have been worse
		trigger = { tag = MON }
		set_country_flag = MON_can_be_invited_to_alliance
		separate_peace_all_wars = yes
		set_global_flag = northwest_conflict_ended
		set_country_flag = mon_no_expansion
		effect_tooltip = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						state = 329
						state = 811
						state = 1293
						state = 654
					}
				}
				transfer_state_to = RUS
			}
			RUS = { give_guarantee = MON }
			give_military_access = ROOT			
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = MON_rus_help }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = MON_rus_help
					add_idea = MON_rus_help_more
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = MON_rus_help_less }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = MON_rus_help_less
					add_idea = MON_rus_help_more
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = MON_russian_eco_aid }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = MON_russian_eco_aid
					add_idea = MON_rus_help_more
				}
			}
			else = {
				add_ideas = MON_rus_help_more
			}
			set_rule = {
				desc = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON
				can_join_factions = no
				can_not_declare_war = yes
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1112.b #Welcome back
		trigger = { tag = RUS }
		RUS_increase_ruling_party_pop = yes
		every_state = {
			limit = {
				is_owned_by = MON
				OR = {
					is_core_of = ROOT
					state = 811
					state = 1293			
					state = 654			
					state = 329			
				}
				NOT = { state = 330 }
			}
			transfer_state_to = ROOT
			add_claim_by = ROOT
			ROOT = { enable_state_integration_50_compliance = yes }
		}
		give_guarantee = MON
		MON = {
			give_military_access = ROOT
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = MON_rus_help }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = MON_rus_help
					add_idea = MON_rus_help_more
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = MON_rus_help_less }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = MON_rus_help_less
					add_idea = MON_rus_help_more
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = MON_russian_eco_aid }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = MON_russian_eco_aid
					add_idea = MON_rus_help_more
				}
			}
			else = {
				add_ideas = MON_rus_help_more
			}
			set_rule = {
				desc = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON
				can_join_factions = no
				can_not_declare_war = yes
			}
			RUS_add_to_rostorg = yes
		}
		hidden_effect = { MON = { country_event = rusfor.1112 } }
	}
}

			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.10
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		RUS = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1121 days = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1116.b #Give in and hand over Tuva

			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_tuva }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2

			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty_MON } }
			decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1112 days = 1 } }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_tuva } }
			decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
			effect_tooltip = { 
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							state = 329
							state = 811
							state = 1293
							state = 654
						}
					}
					transfer_state_to = RUS
				}
			}
			RUS = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1114 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
}

					state = 654			
				}
			}

		}
		TRM = { country_event = rusfor.1119 }
	}
}

country_event = { #Russians refuse
	id = rusfor.1119
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1119" }
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_army2

	title = rusfor.1119.t
	desc = rusfor.1119.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1119.a #Do not attack
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 1
		}
		MON = { country_event = rusfor.1120 }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1119.b #Attack
		trigger = {
			has_idea = TRM_dream
			if = {
				limit = { russian_civil_war = no }
				OR = {
					GER = { has_war_with = RUS }
					INT = { has_war_with = RUS }
					JAP = { has_war_with = RUS }
					ENT = { has_war_with = RUS }
					has_country_flag = TRM_decision_to_attack_russia
				}
			}
			OR = {
				is_owner_neighbor_of = FROM
				any_allied_country = { is_owner_neighbor_of = FROM }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 99
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				russian_civil_war = no
				OR = {
					RUS_dont_attack_if_vulnerable_or_preparing = yes
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_target_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_faction_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_overlord_is_stronger = yes }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				AND = {
					russian_civil_war = yes
					FROM = { tag = RUS }
					TRM_nra_game_rule = yes
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				russian_civil_war = yes
			}
		}
		give_guarantee = MON
		MON = { give_military_access = ROOT }
		declare_war_on = {
			target = RUS
			type = annex_everything
		}
		MON = {			
			declare_war_on = {
				target = RUS
				type = take_core_state
				generator = { 329 }
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			news_event = { id = russianews.7 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

		}
		FROM = {
			add_stability = 0.05
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal
					add_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal_2
				}
			}
			else = {

		}
	}

		name = rusfor.1126.b
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
	}

	id = rusfor.1129
	title = rusfor.1129.t
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1129.desc1
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_postwar_agreement
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1129.desc2
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1129.desc3
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1129.desc4
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
			has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1129.desc5
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_no_agreement
		}
	}

	trigger = {
		is_faction_leader = yes
		FROM = {
			exists = yes
			is_subject = no
			at_war_with_or_justifying_wargoal_against_ROOT = no
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #Cool
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1129 option rusfor.1129.a"
		name = rusfor.1129.a
		trigger = { has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_postwar_agreement }
		diplomatic_relation = {
			country = FROM
			relation = non_aggression_pact
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_chinese_military_mission_idea }
			remove_ideas = RUS_chinese_military_mission_idea
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal
				add_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal_2
			}
			FROM = {
				if = {
					limit = { has_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal }
					swap_ideas = {
						remove_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal
						add_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal_2
					}
				}
				else = {
					add_ideas = RUS_china_trade_deal_2
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = RUS_china_trade_deal
			FROM = { add_ideas = RUS_china_trade_deal }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				country_exists = MON
				MON = {
					is_in_faction = no
					is_subject = no
				}
			}
			FROM = { give_guarantee = MON }
			give_guarantee = MON
		}
		clr_global_flag = RUS_CHN_postwar_agreement
	}
	option = { #Sure
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1129 option rusfor.1129.b"
		name = rusfor.1129.b
		ai_chance = { base = 50 }
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
			}
		}
		diplomatic_relation = {
			country = FROM
			relation = non_aggression_pact
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_chinese_military_mission_idea }
			remove_ideas = RUS_chinese_military_mission_idea
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal }
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal
				add_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal_2
			}
			FROM = {
				if = {
					limit = { has_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal }
					swap_ideas = {
						remove_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal
						add_idea = RUS_china_trade_deal_2
					}
				}
				else = {
					add_ideas = RUS_china_trade_deal_2
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = RUS_china_trade_deal
			FROM = { add_ideas = RUS_china_trade_deal }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
				ETS = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
			}
			ETS = { remove_puppet_and_leave_faction = yes }
			FROM = { puppet = ETS }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
				NOT = { country_exists = ETS }
				617 = { is_owned_by = ROOT } #Dihua
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { region = 221 }
				transfer_state_to = FROM
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
				MON = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
			}
			MON = { remove_puppet_and_leave_faction = yes }
			FROM = { puppet = MON }
			MON = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = { region = 222 }
					transfer_state_to = FROM
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
				NOT = { country_exists = MON }
				330 = { is_owned_by = ROOT } #Mongolia
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { is_mongolia = yes }
				transfer_state_to = FROM
			}
		}
		clr_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
		clr_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
	}
	option = { #Nope
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1129 option rusfor.1129.c"
		name = rusfor.1129.c
		ai_chance = { base = 50 }
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
				has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
			}
		}
		clr_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_mongolia
		clr_global_flag = RUS_CHN_demand_xinjiang
	}
	option = { #China tells us to go away
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1129 option rusfor.1129.d"
		name = rusfor.1129.d
		trigger = { has_global_flag = RUS_CHN_no_agreement }
		clr_global_flag = RUS_CHN_no_agreement
	}
}

country_event = { #Time for a Truce? #CHN offers peace
	id = rusfor.1130
	title = rusfor.1130.t
	desc = rusfor.1130.d
	fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {
		is_chinese_tag = yes #to limit checks a bit
		tag = CHN
		var:566.owner = { #Irkutsk
			has_war_with = ROOT
			is_russian_tag_that_can_integrate = yes
			is_valid_peace_target = yes
		}
		is_valid_peace_target = yes
		var:566.owner = { surrender_progress > 0.15 }
		count_triggers = {
			amount = 2
			408 = { #Vladivostok
				owner = { is_ally_with = 566.owner }
				controller = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
			}
			566 = { #Irkutsk
				owner = { is_ally_with = 566.owner }
				controller = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
			}
			407 = { #Tashkent
				owner = { is_ally_with = 566.owner }
				controller = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
			}
		}
	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {
		days = 14
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1130 option rusfor.1130.a"
		name = rusfor.1130.a
		var:566.owner = { country_event = rusfor.1132 }
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1130 option rusfor.1130.b"
		name = rusfor.1130.b
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
		add_war_support = -0.2
	}
}

country_event = { #Time for a Truce? #RUS receives peace
	id = rusfor.1132
	title = rusfor.1132.t
	desc = rusfor.1132.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1132 option rusfor.1132.a"
		name = rusfor.1132.a
		if = {
			limit = { FROM = { original_tag = JAP } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_lose_to_japan_tt
			FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1133 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { FROM = { original_tag = MON } }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_lose_to_mongolia_tt
			FROM = { country_event = rusfor.11350 }
		}
		else = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_lose_to_china_tt
			FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1135 }
		}
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1132 option rusfor.1132.b"
		name = rusfor.1132.b
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
		add_war_support = -0.2
		FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1134 }
	}
}
country_event = { #End of the Second Russo-Japanese War (can only fire if TRM does not exist)
	id = rusfor.1133
	title = rusfor.1133.t
	desc = rusfor.1133.d
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1133 option rusfor.1133.a"
		name = rusfor.1133.a
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { owns_state = 577 } } #North Sakhalin
			transfer_state = 577
		}
		set_temp_variable = { target = ROOT }
		if = {
			limit = { #Larger TRM if Japan controls China
				var:608.owner = { is_ally_with = ROOT } #Beijing
				var:884.owner = { is_ally_with = ROOT } #Hulunbuir
			}
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					owner = { is_ally_with = FROM }
					OR = {
						is_core_of = ROOT
						is_claimed_by = ROOT
						is_mongolia = yes
						AND = {
							CHN = { is_subject_of = JAP }
							is_claimed_by = CHN
						}
						region = 148 #Primorye
						region = 260 #Amur
						region = 259 #Transbaikal
						region = 149 #Russian Far East
						state = 644 #Northeastern Siberia
					}
				}
				transfer_state_during_war = yes
			}
		}
		else = {
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					owner = { is_ally_with = FROM }
					OR = {
						is_core_of = ROOT
						is_claimed_by = ROOT
						region = 148 #Primorye
						region = 260 #Amur
					}
				}
				transfer_state_during_war = yes
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			FROM = {
				white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
				set_truce = { target = FROM days = 1095 }
			}
			every_enemy_country = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_ally_with = FROM
						has_guaranteed = FROM
						is_guaranteed_by = FROM
					}
					NOT = { tag = FROM }
				}
				white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
				set_truce = { target = FROM days = 1095 }
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			add_state_claim = 577
			FROM = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }
			every_enemy_country = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_ally_with = FROM
						has_guaranteed = FROM
						is_guaranteed_by = FROM
					}
					is_valid_peace_target_against_PREV = yes
				}
				white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
			}
			every_country = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_ally_with = FROM
						has_guaranteed = FROM
						is_guaranteed_by = FROM
					}
				}
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = PREV
					relation = non_aggression_pact
				}
				set_truce = { target = FROM days = 1095 }
			}
		}
	}
}

		army_experience = 15
		add_ideas = RUS_chinese_military_mission_idea

			limit = { FROM = { RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes } }

		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			FROM = {
				add_relation_modifier = {
					target = ROOT
					modifier = volunteer_limit_plus_two
				}
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			FROM = {
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_Send_Equipment_China }
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_Send_Attache }
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = CHN decision = RUS_sino_russian_relations }
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1136 option rusfor.1136.b"
		name = russia_foreign_policy_events.121.b
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
	}

country_event = { #Russian demands ROM
	id = rusfor.1180
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1180" }
	title = rusfor.1180.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1180.d.ROM
		trigger = { original_tag = ROM }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1180.d.ROM_overlord
		trigger = { NOT = { original_tag = ROM } }
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kremlin_1

	trigger = {
		ROM = { owns_state = 78 } #Bessarabia
		OR = {
			FROM = { can_declare_war_on = ROOT }
			ROM = {
				is_subject = yes
				overlord = { is_ally_with = FROM }
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			NOT = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = ROOT }
			NOT = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = ROM }
			NOT = { has_guaranteed = ROOT }
			NOT = { has_guaranteed = ROM }
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1180.a #accept
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 40
				is_in_faction = no
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = ROM
				has_government = national_populist
				has_idea = ROM_great_game
				NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		effect_tooltip = {
			ROM = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							is_core_of = FROM
							is_claimed_by = FROM
							state = 78 #Bessarabia
						}
					}
					transfer_state_to = FROM
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1182 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1180.b #Never!
		trigger = {
			NOT = { is_subject_of = FROM }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 95
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = {
					OR = {
						is_actual_major = yes
						is_neighbor_of = ROOT
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				is_ally_with = FROM
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			if = {
				limit = { is_ally_with = FROM }
				leave_faction = yes
				peace_out_non_neighbours_after_leaving_faction = yes
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		FROM = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1181 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { # Romania refuses!
	id = rusfor.1181
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1181" }
	title = rusfor.1181.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1181.d
		trigger = { NOT = { is_ally_with = FROM } }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1181.d.ally
		trigger = { is_ally_with = FROM }
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_ROM_guards

	trigger = {
		ROM = { owns_state = 78 } #Bessarabia
		OR = {
			can_declare_war_on = FROM
			ROM = {
				is_subject = yes
				overlord = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
			}
		}
		NOT = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = FROM }
		NOT = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = ROM }
		NOT = { has_guaranteed = FROM }
		NOT = { has_guaranteed = ROM }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #Then it is war
		name = rusfor.1181.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				is_ally_with = FROM
			}
		}
		declare_war_on = {
			target = ROM
			type = annex_everything
		}
	}

	option = { #Back down
		name = rusfor.1181.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				is_ally_with = FROM
			}
		}
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROM decision = RUS_Attack_Country_default }
	}
}

country_event = { #Transfer of the territory
	id = rusfor.1182
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1182" }
	title = rusfor.1182.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1182.d
		trigger = { NOT = { is_ally_with = FROM } }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1182.d.ally
		trigger = { is_ally_with = FROM }
	}

	trigger = {
		ROM = { owns_state = 78 } #Bessarabia
		OR = {
			can_declare_war_on = FROM
			ROM = {
				is_subject = yes
				overlord = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
			}
		}
		NOT = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = FROM }
		NOT = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = ROM }
		NOT = { has_guaranteed = FROM }
		NOT = { has_guaranteed = ROM }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #Another victory for Russian diplomacy!
		name = rusfor.1182.a
		remove_decision = RUS_Demand_Bessarabia
		ROM = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = ROOT
						is_claimed_by = ROOT
						state = 78
						state = 1222
						state = 1320
					}
				}
				transfer_state_to = ROOT
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { is_ally_with = ROOT } }
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = non_aggression_pact
				}
			}
			add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = KR_outraged
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = {
					NOT = { original_tag = ROM }
					NOT = { is_ally_with = ROOT }
				}
			}
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = FROM
				relation = non_aggression_pact
			}
			reverse_add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = FROM
				modifier = KR_hates_govt
			}
		}
	}
}

		text = rusfor.1190.d.TUR
		trigger = { tag = TUR }

		text = rusfor.1190.d.TUR_overlord
		trigger = { NOT = { tag = TUR } }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1190.a #accept
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 40
				is_in_faction = no
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		effect_tooltip = {
			TUR = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							is_core_of = FROM
							state = 230 #Yerevan
							state = 1213 #Batumi
							state = 1000 #Kars
							state = 1303 #Gokcha
						}
					}
					transfer_state_to = FROM
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1192 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
		}
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1190 option rusfor.1190.b"
		name = rusfor.1190.b #Never!
		ai_chance = {
			base = 95
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = {
					OR = {
						is_actual_major = yes
						is_neighbor_of = ROOT
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		FROM = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1191 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Transfer of the territory
	id = rusfor.1192
	title = rusfor.1192.t
	desc = rusfor.1192.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1192 option rusfor.1192.a"
		name = rusfor.1192.a #Another victory for Russian diplomacy!
		remove_decision = RUS_Demand_Armenia
		clr_country_flag = RUS_demanding_armenia
		TUR = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { is_core_of = ROOT }
				transfer_state_to = ROOT
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ARM = { is_subject_of = TUR } }
				ROOT = {
					annex_country = {
						target = ARM
						transfer_troops = no
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { owns_state = 230 }
				230 = { transfer_state_to = ROOT }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { owns_state = 1213 }
				if = {
					limit = { is_in_faction_with = GEO }
					1213 = { transfer_state_to = GEO }
				}
				else = {
					1213 = { transfer_state_to = ROOT }
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { owns_state = 1000 }
				if = {
					limit = { is_in_faction_with = ARM }
					1000 = { transfer_state_to = ARM }
				}
				else = {
					1000 = { transfer_state_to = ROOT }
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { owns_state = 1303 }
				if = {
					limit = { is_in_faction_with = AZE }
					1303 = { transfer_state_to = AZE }
				}
				else = {
					1303 = { transfer_state_to = ROOT }
				}
			}
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = ROOT
				relation = non_aggression_pact
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { FROM = { NOT = { original_tag = TUR } } }
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = FROM
				relation = non_aggression_pact
			}
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #Vladivostok is Russian!
	id = rusfor.1208
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1208"}
	title = rusfor.1208.t
	desc = rusfor.1208.d
	#picture = GFX_petain_NFA

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1208.a #We shall seize and convert all of the ships in the harbour!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 20
		}
		add_political_power = -80
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
			type = convoy_1
			amount = 50
			producer = RUS
		}
		add_opinion_modifier = {
			target = JAP
			modifier = RUS_vladivostok_big
		}		
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1208.b #We shall merely use Transamur's old naval designs.
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
		}
		add_political_power = -40
		add_opinion_modifier = {
			target = JAP
			modifier = RUS_vladivostok_small
		}
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
			type = convoy_1
			amount = 30
			producer = RUS
		}		
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1208.c #Sell off Transamur's navy and convert the harbour for civilian purposes.
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 20
		}
		add_political_power = 100
		add_opinion_modifier = {
			target = JAP
			modifier = RUS_vladivostok_sold
		}
		408 = {
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 2
			add_building_construction = {
				type = industrial_complex
				level = 2
				instant_build = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			}
			408 = {
				add_building_construction = {
					type = coastal_bunker
					level = 2
					province = 957
					instant_build = yes
				}
				add_building_construction = {
					type = naval_base
					level = 3
					province = 957
					instant_build = yes
				}
				add_building_construction = {
					type = infrastructure
					level = 2
					instant_build = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1208.e #Sell off Transamur's navy and keep the money.
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 0
		}
		add_political_power = 20
		add_opinion_modifier = {
			target = JAP
			modifier = RUS_vladivostok_sold
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			}
			408 = {
				add_building_construction = {
					type = coastal_bunker
					level = 2
					province = 957
					instant_build = yes
				}
				add_building_construction = {
					type = naval_base
					level = 3
					province = 957
					instant_build = yes
				}
				add_building_construction = {
					type = infrastructure
					level = 2
					instant_build = yes
				}
			}
		}
		add_one_random_military_factory = yes
	}

}

					GAL = { owns_state = 73 }

			}
			set_autonomy = {
				target = GAL
				autonomy_state = autonomy_free
			}
			remove_from_faction = GAL
			GAL = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusfor.1222
					days = 6
				}
			}
		}
		effect_tooltip = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = FROM
						is_claimed_by = FROM

							is_claimed_by = ROM
							ROM = { is_in_faction_with = RUS }
						}
					}
				}
				FROM = { transfer_state = PREV }
			}
		}
		FROM = {

				id = rusfor.1211
				days = 8
			}
		}
	}

		}

						}

### Pressure Finland ###
country_event = { #Demands to Finland
	id = rusfor.1224
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1224" }
	title = rusfor.1224.t
	desc = rusfor.1224.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_finland
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		FIN = {
			owns_state = 1325
			NOT = { has_war_with = var:219.owner }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1224.a #Pro-Russian neutrality
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = FIN_foreign_policy option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = FIN_foreign_policy option = FIN_FOREIGN_POLICY_NEUTRALITY } }
				has_left_democratic_government = no
				NOT = { FIN = { is_ally_with = INT } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					any_core_state = { is_owned_by = FIN }
					country_exists = KAR
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty
		hidden_effect = {
			FIN = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1225 days = 4 } }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1224.b #Territorial concessions
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_left_democratic_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FIN = { is_ally_with = INT }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				FIN = { is_ally_with = GER }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = FIN_foreign_policy option = FIN_FOREIGN_POLICY_NEUTRALITY }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_demanded_karelia
		hidden_effect = {
			FIN = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1225 days = 4 } }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Russia's Demands #for FIN
	id = rusfor.1225
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1225" }
	title = {
		trigger = { var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty } }
		text = rusfor.1225.t.yya
	}
	title = {
		trigger = { var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_karelia } }
		text = rusfor.1225.t.karelia
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty } }
		text = rusfor.1225.d.yya
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_karelia } }
		text = rusfor.1225.d.karelia
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_finland
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1225.a #If they want a fight, they'll get it!
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_karelia }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_war = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty }
				has_game_rule = { rule = FIN_foreign_policy option = FIN_FOREIGN_POLICY_NEUTRALITY }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = FIN_foreign_policy option = FIN_FOREIGN_POLICY_REICHSPAKT }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_completed_focus = FIN_settle_the_russian_issue
					has_completed_focus = FIN_diplomacy
				}
			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.15
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		var:219.owner = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1233 days = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1225.b #Appeal to Germany for diplomatic help
		trigger = {
			GER = {
				exists = yes
				NOT = {
					has_war_with = FIN
					has_war_with = var:219.owner
				}
			}
			has_socialist_government = no
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 50
				is_in_faction_with = GER
				has_war = no
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 5
				var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_karelia }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty }
				has_game_rule = { rule = FIN_foreign_policy option = FIN_FOREIGN_POLICY_NEUTRALITY }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				NOT = {
					has_government = social_conservative
					FIN_is_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_government = social_conservative
					FIN_is_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
			decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
		}
		GER = { country_event = rusfor.1228 }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1225.c #Accept the demands
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_karelia }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = FIN_foreign_policy option = FIN_FOREIGN_POLICY_REICHSPAKT } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 20
				var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				has_war = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_treaty } }
			decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
			var:219.owner = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1226 days = 1 } }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { var:219.owner = { has_country_flag = RUS_demanded_karelia } }
			decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
			effect_tooltip = { 
				1326 = { transfer_state_to = var:219.owner }
				146 = { transfer_state_to = var:219.owner }
				1324 = { transfer_state_to = var:219.owner }
				1325 = { transfer_state_to = var:219.owner }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { KAR = { is_ally_with = ROOT } }
				set_temp_variable = { target = KAR }
				clear_all_relations_with_TARGET = yes
				KAR = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1234 days = 3 } }
			}
			var:219.owner = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1227 days = 1 } }
		}
	}
}

		FIN = {

			give_military_access = ROOT

			}
		}

			FIN = {
				if = {
					limit = { is_in_faction = yes }

				}
				GER = { give_guarantee = FIN }

							state = 1324

							state = 1328

							state = 216
							state = 1327
						}
					}
					transfer_state_to = var:219.owner
				}
				if = {
					limit = { KAR = { is_ally_with = ROOT } }
					set_temp_variable = { target = KAR }
					clear_all_relations_with_TARGET = yes
					KAR = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1234 days = 3 } }
				}
				set_country_flag = FIN_treaty_of_tampere_neutral_status
				set_rule = {
					desc = FIN_treaty_of_tampere_neutral_status
					can_join_factions = no
					can_not_declare_war = yes
				}
			}
		}
		GER = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1231 days = 2 } }
		FIN = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1231 days = 2 } }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1230.b #Forget about it
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 100
		}
		GER = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1232 days = 2 } }
		FIN = { country_event = { id = rusfor.1232 days = 2 } }
	}
}

country_event = { #Finland refuses demands
	id = rusfor.1233
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1233" }
	title = rusfor.1233.t
	desc = rusfor.1233.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_army_1
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1233.a
		trigger = { 
			if = {
				limit = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
				FIN = { FIN_is_monarchy = no }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FIN = { is_in_faction = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
			}
		}
		declare_war_on = {
			target = FIN
			type = take_claimed_state
			generator = { 146 1324 1325 1326 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { KAR = { is_ally_with = FIN } }
			declare_war_on = {
				target = KAR
				type = annex_everything
			}
		}
		activate_mission = RUS_defeat_finland
		hidden_effect = {
			add_ai_strategy = {
				type = prepare_for_war
				id = FIN
				value = -1000
			}
			FIN = {
				activate_mission = FIN_survive_russia
				add_ai_strategy = {
					type = prepare_for_war
					id = PREV
					value = -1000
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1233.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				FIN = { is_in_faction = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
			}
		}
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = FIN decision = RUS_Attack_Country_default }
		if = {
			limit = {
				KAR = { is_ally_with = FIN }
			}
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = KAR decision = RUS_Attack_Country_default }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			add_ai_strategy = {
				type = prepare_for_war
				id = FIN
				value = -1000
			}
			FIN = {
				add_ai_strategy = {
					type = prepare_for_war
					id = PREV
					value = -1000
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

			remove_ideas = KAR_finland_aid
		}

			modifier = KR_outraged
		}
		var:219.owner = {
			declare_war_on = {
				target = KAR
				type = annex_everything
			}
		}
	}
}


country_event = { #ROM-RUS peace deal
	id = rusfor.1236
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1236" }
	title = rusfor.1236.t
	
	title = {
		text = rusfor.1236.t.victory
		trigger = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1236.d.victory
		trigger = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
	}
	
	title = {
		text = rusfor.1236.t.defeat
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1236.d.defeat
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {
		tag = ROM
		has_war_with = 219.owner
		owns_state = 78
		owns_state = 1222
		is_valid_peace_target = yes
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_enemy_tag = 219.owner }
		var:RUS_enemy_tag = {
			is_russian_tag_that_can_integrate = yes
			is_valid_peace_target = yes
		}
		OR = {
			#Romania loses
			var:RUS_enemy_tag = {
				controls_state = 78 #Bessarabia
				controls_state = 1222 # Bujak
				controls_state = 79 #Moldavia
			}
			surrender_progress > 0.15
			#Romania wins
			var:RUS_enemy_tag = { surrender_progress > 0.1 }
			controls_state = 202 #Kiev
			controls_state = 226 #Ekaterinoslav
			AND = {
				controls_state = 192 #Odessa
				controls_state = 791 #Podolia
				OR = {
					controls_state = 197 #Kherson
					controls_state = 198 #Vinnitsa
					controls_state = 1245 #Bratslav
					controls_state = 199 #Proskurov
					controls_state = 1241 #Pobuzhie
					controls_state = 1233 #Elisavetgrad
					controls_state = 1232 #Nikolayev
				}
			}
		}
		NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_ROM_offered_peace }
	}
	
	immediate = {
		set_global_flag = { flag = RUS_ROM_offered_peace days = 90 value = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					surrender_progress > 0.15
					NOT = { controls_state = 78 }
				}
			}
			set_global_flag = { flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM days = 60 value = 1 }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1236.a #We have no choice; send word to Moscow.
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		}
		var:219.owner = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1237 days = 1 random = 24 }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1236.b #We can still win this!
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
			is_ai = no
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1236.c #We prevail!
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM
		}
		var:219.owner = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1237 days = 1 random = 24 }
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1236.d #No, they must be taught a lesson.
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM
			is_ai = no
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
	}
}

			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		}
	}

	title = {
		text = rusfor.1237.t.defeat
		trigger = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1237.d.defeat
		trigger = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	trigger = {
		is_valid_peace_target = yes
		has_war_with = FROM
		FROM = { is_valid_peace_target = yes }
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1237.a #Accept; no point in wasting any more Russian lives.
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		}
		FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1238 }
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1237.b #Refuse; they must be taught a lesson!
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
			is_ai = no
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1239 }
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1237.c #Reach out to the Romanians; this humiliation must end.
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM
		}
		FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1238 }
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1237.b #To hell with them! We will reach Kishinev at all costs!
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM
			is_ai = no
		}
		add_stability = -0.15
		FROM = { country_event = rusfor.1239 }
	}
}

	title = rusfor.1238.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1238.d.victory

			has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1238.d.defeat
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1238.a #United just to be torn asunder again...
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		}
		78 = {
			if = {
				limit = { is_owned_by = ROOT }
				transfer_state_to = FROM
			}
		}
		1320 = {
			if = {
				limit = { is_owned_by = ROOT }
				transfer_state_to = FROM
			}
		}
		1222 = {
			if = {
				limit = { is_owned_by = ROOT }
				transfer_state_to = FROM
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = { owns_state = 89 } #Stanislawow
			}
			80 = {
				if = {
					limit = { is_owned_by = ROOT }
					transfer_state_to = FROM
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = ROOT
				relation = non_aggression_pact
			}
			set_truce = { target = ROOT days = 730 }
		}
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1238.b 
		trigger = { has_global_flag = RUS_defeated_by_ROM }
		FROM = {
			remove_state_claim = 78 #Bessarabia
			remove_state_claim = 1222
			remove_state_claim = 1320
			white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = FROM
				relation = non_aggression_pact
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #WHR question
	id = rusfor.1240
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1240"}
	title = rusfor.1240.t
	desc = rusfor.1240.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_belarus
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1240.a
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
				NOT = { tag = RUS }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_STAY_WITH_GERMAN
					}
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_NEUTRALITY
					}
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA_SECRET_PACT
					}
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_INTERNATIONALE
					}
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_UKRAINE
					}
				}
			}
		}
		WHR = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1241
				days = 5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1240.b
		trigger = {
			RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				WHR = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = { 
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA
					}
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA_SECRET_PACT
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				WHR = {
					OR = {
						is_in_faction = yes
						is_subject = yes
					}
				} 
			}			
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = WHR decision = RUS_Attack_Country_default }
		}
		else = {
			declare_war_on = {
				target = WHR
				type = annex_everything
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1240.c
		trigger = {
			WHR = { same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 90
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				AND = {
					RUS_is_expansionist = yes
					has_game_rule = {
						rule = WHR_foreign_policy
						option = WHR_FOREIGN_POLICY_RUSSIA
					}
				}
			}
		}
		WHR = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1247
				days = 5
			}
		}
	}
}

		}

	}

		name = rusfor.1242.e
		trigger = { 
			WHR = { at_peace_or_same_enemies_as_ROOT = yes }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				add = 50
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				WHR = { is_subject_of = ROOT }
			}
			annex_country = {
				target = WHR
				transfer_troops = yes
			}
			WHR = {
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 191803 }
					set_nationality = ROOT
					if = {
						limit = { is_field_marshal = no }
						promote_leader = yes
					}
				}
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					is_core_of = WHR
					has_resistance = yes
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_resistance = yes }
					add_compliance = 20
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			WHR = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusfor.1245
					days = 2
				}
			}
		}
	}	
}

				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1242.e
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				FROM = { is_subject_of = ROOT }
			}
			annex_country = {
				target = FROM
				transfer_troops = yes
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					is_core_of = FROM
					has_resistance = yes
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_resistance = yes }
					add_compliance = 20
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			WHR = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusfor.1245
					days = 2
				}
			}
		}
	}	
}

			OR = {
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
				NOT = { tag = RUS }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				GER = { has_war_with = FRA }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				WHR = { is_subject = no }
				WHR = { is_in_faction = no }
			}
		}
		add_stability = -0.05
		if = {
			limit = { 
				WHR = {
					OR = {
						is_in_faction = yes
						is_subject = yes
					}
				} 
			}			
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = WHR decision = RUS_Attack_Country_default }
		}
		else = {
			declare_war_on = {
				target = WHR
				type = annex_everything
			}
		}
	}

			factor = 50
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		RUS = { add_opinion_modifier = {

			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Russians are winning
	id = rusfor.1250
	title = rusfor.1250.t
	desc = rusfor.1250.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_army2

	fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {
		tag = FIN
		is_valid_peace_target = yes
		RUS = {
			has_war_with = ROOT
			is_valid_peace_target = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { country_exists = KAR }
			KAR = { has_socialist_government = no }
		}
		surrender_progress > 0.30
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 1325 }
			NOT = { controls_state = 1325 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				RUS = { surrender_progress > 0.20 }
			}
			surrender_progress > 0.40
		}
	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {
		days = 1
	}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1250 option rusfor.1250.a"
		name = rusfor.1250.a #We have no choice
		ai_chance = {
			base = 1
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				GER = { exists = no }
			}
		}
		RUS = { country_event = rusfor.1251 }
	}
	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1250 option rusfor.1250.b"
		name = rusfor.1250.b #Never! We will fight to the last man!
		ai_chance = {
			base = 1
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				GER = { exists = yes }
			}
		}
		add_war_support = -0.20
		add_stability = -0.10
	}
}

		text = rusfor.1251.d2
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_army2
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		has_war_with = FIN
		FIN = {
			exists = yes
			has_capitulated = no
			is_in_faction = no
		}
	}

		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1251 option rusfor.1251.a"

				factor = 0

				GER = { exists = no }
			}
		}

			set_truce = { target = FIN days = 365 }
		}
		FIN = {
			effect_tooltip = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = { 
						OR = {
							AND = {
								is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes
								NOT = { 
									region = 12
									region = 13
								}
							}
							state = 146 #Viipuri
							state = 1324 #Viipuri
							state = 1325 #Viipuri
							state = 1326 #Viipuri
							state = 147 #Kuolajarvi
						}
					}
					ROOT = { transfer_state = PREV }
				}
			}
			country_event = rusfor.1252
		}
	}
	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1251 option rusfor.1251.b"
		name = rusfor.1251.b #Refuse - onwards to Helsinki!
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				GER = {
					is_faction_leader = yes
					NOT = {
						has_war_with = FIN
						has_war_with = ROOT
						has_country_flag = RUS_germany_helped_finland
					}
				}
				GER = { exists = no }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 10
				RUS_russian_monarch = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 10
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FIN = { is_ai = no }
			}
		}
		FIN = { country_event = rusfor.1253 }
	}
}

country_event = { #Finland is winning the war

	title = rusfor.1258.t
	desc = rusfor.1258.d

	fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		is_valid_peace_target = yes
		FIN = {
			has_war_with = ROOT
			is_valid_peace_target = yes
			NOT = { surrender_progress > 0.40 }
			if = {
				limit = { owns_state = 1325 }
				controls_state = 1325
			}
			if = {
				limit = { owns_state = 146 }
				controls_state = 146
			}
			if = {
				limit = { owns_state = 1326 }
				controls_state = 1326
			}
			controls_state = 195
			NOT = { has_cosmetic_tag = FIN_matti_europe }
		}
		surrender_progress > 0.10
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 1328 }
			FIN = { controls_state = 1328 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 1327 }
			FIN = { controls_state = 1327 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 213 }
			FIN = { controls_state = 213 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 215 }
			FIN = { controls_state = 215 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 216 }
			FIN = { controls_state = 216 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { owns_state = 722 }
			FIN = { controls_state = 722 }
		}
	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {
		days = 1
	}

		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1258 option rusfor.1258.a"
		name = rusfor.1258.a

		FIN = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { is_claimed_by = RUS }
				remove_claim_by = RUS
			}
		}
		FIN = { country_event = rusfor.1259 }
		effect_tooltip = {

				limit = { 
					country_exists = KAR 
					KAR = { 
						OR = {
							is_ally_with = FIN
							is_guaranteed_by = FIN
						}
					}
				}
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							is_core_of = KAR
							is_claimed_by = KAR
							state = 1274
							state = 216
						}
						NOT = { 
							state = 1327
							state = 213
						}
					}
					KAR = { transfer_state = PREV }
				}
				KAR = { separate_peace_all_wars = yes }
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = FIN
						is_claimed_by = FIN
						state = 146 #Viipuri
						state = 147
						state = 1326
						state = 1324
						state = 1325
						state = 1328
						state = 215 #Kem
						state = 216
						state = 722 #Petsamo
					}
				}
				FIN = { transfer_state = PREV }
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = FIN
						is_claimed_by = FIN
						is_controlled_by = FIN						
						state = 213 #Murmansk
						state = 1327
						state = 1274
					}
				}
				FIN = { transfer_state = PREV }
			}
		}
	}
}

	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1259 option rusfor.1259.a"
		name = rusfor.1259.a #Unbelievable!
		trigger = {
			RUS = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_winter_war_timeout }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = 100
		RUS = {
			white_peace_with_ROOT = yes			
			if = {
				limit = { 
					country_exists = KAR 
					KAR = { 
						OR = {
							is_ally_with = FIN
							is_guaranteed_by = FIN
						}
					}
				}
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							is_core_of = KAR
							is_claimed_by = KAR
							state = 1274
							state = 216
						}
						NOT = { 
							state = 1327
							state = 213
						}
					}
					KAR = { transfer_state = PREV }
				}
				KAR = { separate_peace_all_wars = yes }
				hidden_effect = {
					FIN = {
						country_event = {
							id = kar.39
							days = 5
						}
					}
				}
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = FIN
						is_claimed_by = FIN
						state = 146 #Viipuri
						state = 147
						state = 1326
						state = 1324
						state = 1325
						state = 1328
						state = 215 #Kem
						state = 216
						state = 722 #Petsamo
					}
				}
				FIN = { transfer_state = PREV }
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = FIN
						is_claimed_by = FIN
						is_controlled_by = FIN						
						state = 213 #Murmansk
						state = 1327
						state = 1274
					}
				}
				FIN = { transfer_state = PREV }
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		log = "[GetLogInfo]: event rusfor.1259 option rusfor.1259.b"
		name = rusfor.1259.b #A great day for Finland
		trigger = {
			RUS = { has_country_flag = RUS_winter_war_timeout }
		}
		add_political_power = 50
		RUS = {
			clr_country_flag = RUS_winter_war_timeout
			white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
		}
	}
}

				transfer_state_to = MON

country_event = { #War with Caucasus times out
	id = rusfor.1264
	title = rusfor.1264.t
	desc = rusfor.1264.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_army2

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1264.a
		RUS_decrease_ruling_party_pop = yes
		add_political_power = -100
		set_country_flag = RUS_lost_caucasus_war
		every_other_country = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					original_tag = AZE
					original_tag = GEO
					original_tag = ARM
					original_tag = MTR
					original_tag = DAG
					original_tag = ABK
				}
				is_in_faction_with = ROOT
				is_subject = no
			}
			leave_faction = yes
			set_country_flag = @PREV_refused_alliance
		}
		if = {
			limit = { ABK = { has_capitulated = yes } }
			annex_country = { target = ABK }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAG = { has_capitulated = yes } }
			annex_country = { target = DAG }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { MTR = { has_capitulated = yes } }
			annex_country = { target = MTR }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { country_exists = MTR }
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					is_core_of = MTR
					is_owned_by = RUS
				}
				MTR = { transfer_state = PREV }
			}
		}
		ABK = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }
		DAG = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }
		MTR = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }
		AZE = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }
		GEO = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }
		ARM = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }
		TUR = { white_peace_with_ROOT = yes }

		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		hidden_effect = {
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					region = 134
					NOT = { is_owned_by = RUS }
				}
				teleport_armies = {
					limit = { is_ally_with = RUS }
				}
				if = {
					limit = { is_core_of = RUS }
					remove_core_of = RUS
				}
			}
		}
		set_global_flag = RUS_caucasus_victorious
		clr_global_flag = GER_withdrew_from_caucasus
	}
}

country_event = { #The Ottomans are Collapsing!
	id = rusfor.12810
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.12810" }
	title = rusfor.12810.t
	desc = rusfor.12810.d
	
	trigger = {
		OR = {
			1000 = {
				OR = {
					is_owned_by = TUR
					is_owned_by = TUR
				}
				is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes
				any_neighbor_state = {
					is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_subject = yes
				}
			}
			1001 = {
				OR = {
					is_owned_by = TUR
					is_owned_by = TUR
				}
				is_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes
				any_neighbor_state = {
					is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_subject = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.12810.a #Seize Greater Armenia!
		TUR = {
			country_event = rusfor.12810
			hidden_effect = {
				every_enemy_country = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							tag = EGY
							tag = PER
						}
					}
					country_event = rusfor.1281
				}
			}
		}
		transfer_state = 1000
		transfer_state = 1001
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.12810.b #It's too risky.
		trigger = { is_ai = no }
	}
}

country_event = { #What to do with KUB
	id = rusfor.1280
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1280" }
	title = rusfor.1280.t
	desc = rusfor.1280.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_kuban
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1280.a #
		ai_chance = {
			base = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				KUB = {
					is_subject = yes
					NOT = { is_subject_of = RUS }
				}
			}
			var:KUB.overlord = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1281 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				KUB = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
			}
			GER = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1281 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				KUB = { is_guaranteed_by = UKR }
			}
			UKR = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1281 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else = {
			KUB = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1281 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1280.b #Start sending agitators
		trigger = {
			NOT = { 
				has_country_flag = RUS_cossack_hosts_dissolved 
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			}
			KUB = {
				is_subject = no
				KUB_has_bolsheviks = no
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 99
		}
		KUB = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1013 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Russian demands KUB
	id = rusfor.1281
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1281" }
	title = rusfor.1281.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1281.d.KUB
		trigger = { original_tag = KUB }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1281.d.KUB_overlord
		trigger = { NOT = { original_tag = KUB } }
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kremlin_1

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1281.a #accept
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 40
				is_in_faction = no
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 20
				NOT = { tag = KUB }
				KUB = { 
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					is_guaranteed_by = ROOT
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				tag = KUB
				OR = {
					kuban_is_pro_german = yes
					KUB_has_chernomortsy = yes
					has_socialist_government = yes
					RUS = { 
						has_country_flag = RUS_cossack_hosts_dissolved 
						RUS_tends_to_ally_cossacks = no
					}
				}
				NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = KUB_foreign option = DEFAULT }
					has_game_rule = { rule = KUB_foreign option = KUB_FOREIGN_RUSSIA } 
				}
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		effect_tooltip = {
			FROM = {
				annex_country = { target = KUB }
			}
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = { has_guaranteed = KUB }
			KUB = { 
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1015 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			FROM = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1283 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1281.b #Never!
		trigger = {
			NOT = { is_subject_of = FROM }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 95
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = {
					OR = {
						is_actual_major = yes
						is_neighbor_of = ROOT
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				is_ally_with = FROM
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = KUB_foreign option = KUB_FOREIGN_RUSSIA }
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		FROM = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1282 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { # Don refuses!
	id = rusfor.1282
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1282" }
	title = rusfor.1282.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1282.d
		trigger = { FROM = { original_tag = KUB } }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1282.d.KUB_overlord
		trigger = { FROM = { NOT = { original_tag = KUB } } }
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_cossacks_2

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #Then it is war
		name = rusfor.1282.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				KUB = { 
					OR = {
						is_in_faction = yes 
						is_guaranteed_by = GER
						AND = {
							is_guaranteed_by = UKR
							UKR = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
						}
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FROM = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
			}
		}
		declare_war_on = {
			target = FROM
			type = annex_everything
		}
	}

	option = { #Back down
		name = rusfor.1282.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				KUB = { 
					OR = {
						is_in_faction = yes 
						is_guaranteed_by = GER
						AND = {
							is_guaranteed_by = UKR
							UKR = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
						}
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				FROM = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
			}
		}
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = KUB decision = RUS_Attack_Country_default }
		hidden_effect = {
			add_ai_strategy = {
				type = prepare_for_war
				id = KUB
				value = -1000
			}
			KUB = {
				add_ai_strategy = {
					type = prepare_for_war
					id = RUS
					value = -1000
				}
			}
		}
	}
}
