country_event = { #What to do with KLY
	id = rusfor.1285
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1285" }
	title = rusfor.1285.t
	desc = rusfor.1285.d
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1285.a #
		ai_chance = {
			base = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				KLY = {
					is_subject = yes
					NOT = { is_subject_of = RUS }
				}
			}
			var:KLY.overlord = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1286 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				KLY = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
			}
			GER = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1286 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
		else = {
			KLY = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1286 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1285.b #Start sending agitators
		trigger = {
			NOT = { 
				has_country_flag = RUS_cossack_hosts_dissolved 
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
			}
			KLY = {
				is_subject = no
				has_cosmetic_tag = KLY_cossack
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 99
		}
		KLY = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1013 days = 2 random_days = 2 } #warning event
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Russian demands KLY
	id = rusfor.1286
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1286" }
	title = rusfor.1286.t

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1286.d.KLY
		trigger = { original_tag = KLY }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1286.d.KLY_overlord
		trigger = { NOT = { original_tag = KLY } }
	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kremlin_1

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1286.a #accept
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
			modifier = {
				factor = 40
				is_in_faction = no
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 20
				NOT = { tag = KLY }
				KLY = { 
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					is_guaranteed_by = ROOT
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				tag = KLY
				OR = {
					has_government = social_liberal
					has_government = social_conservative
					has_government = paternal_autocrat
				}
				NOT = { is_ally_with = RUS }
			}
		}
		add_political_power = -50
		effect_tooltip = {
			FROM = {
				annex_country = { target = ROOT }
			}
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = { has_guaranteed = KLY }
			KLY = { 
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1015 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
			}
		}
		else = {
			FROM = {
				country_event = { id = rusfor.1288 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1286.b #Never!
		trigger = {
			NOT = { is_subject_of = FROM }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 95
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				any_enemy_country = {
					OR = {
						is_actual_major = yes
						is_neighbor_of = ROOT
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -15
				RUS = {
					NOT = {
						surrender_progress > 0
						any_enemy_country = { is_actual_major = yes }
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				is_ally_with = FROM
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				FROM = { same_government_type_as_ROOT_authoritarian = no }
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_will_declare_war_on_ROOT
		FROM = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1287 days = 2 random_days = 2 }
		}
	}
}

				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1411.b
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				add = -20
				has_country_flag = Russia_Supports_Us
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 10
				FROM = { RUS_is_expansionist = yes }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					country_is_in_dangerous_war = yes
					FROM = { default_attack_AI_trigger_FROM = yes }
				}
			}
		}
		FROM = { incoming_war_notification_effect = yes }
		set_country_flag = CHN_war_over_manchuria
		clr_country_flag = Russia_Supports_Us
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_chinese_military_mission_idea }
			remove_ideas = RUS_chinese_military_mission_idea
			hidden_effect = {
				FROM = {
					remove_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_Send_Equipment_China }
					remove_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_Send_Attache }
					remove_targeted_decision = { target = CHN decision = RUS_sino_russian_relations }
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { any_unit_leader = { has_trait = RUS_chinese_officer } }			
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = RUS_chinese_officer }
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			FROM = {
				hidden_effect = {
					remove_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_Recall_Attache }
					every_unit_leader = {
						limit = { has_trait = RUS_chinese_officer }
						remove_unit_leader_trait = RUS_chinese_officer
					}
				}
				army_experience = 50
			}
		}
	}
}

		name = rusfor.14120.a
		trigger = { NOT = { owns_state = 883 } }

			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = ROOT
				relation = non_aggression_pact
			}
			give_military_access = ROOT 
			set_country_flag = CHN_refuse_war_over_manchuria
			clr_country_flag = CHN_war_over_manchuria
		}
		if = {
			limit = { var:883.owner = { has_country_flag = CHN_manchuria_deal_2 } }
			add_ideas = RUS_kvzhd_trade_deal2
			var:883.owner = { add_ideas = RUS_CHN_kvzhd_treaty2 }
		}
		else = {
			add_ideas = RUS_kvzhd_trade_deal
			var:883.owner = { add_ideas = RUS_CHN_kvzhd_treaty1 }
		}
		var:883.owner = { country_event = rusfor.14120 }
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.14120.a
		trigger = { owns_state = 883 }
		effect_tooltip = {
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = FROM
				relation = non_aggression_pact
			}
			give_military_access = FROM 
			set_country_flag = CHN_refuse_war_over_manchuria
			clr_country_flag = CHN_war_over_manchuria
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = CHN_manchuria_deal_2 }
				FROM = { add_ideas = RUS_kvzhd_trade_deal2 }
				add_ideas = RUS_CHN_kvzhd_treaty2
			}
			else = {
				FROM = { add_ideas = RUS_kvzhd_trade_deal }
				add_ideas = RUS_CHN_kvzhd_treaty1
			}
			FROM = { country_event = rusfor.14120 }
		}
	}

	id = rusfor.1413
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1413"}
	title = rusfor.1413.t
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1413.d
		trigger = {				
			country_exists = FNG
			FNG_JAP_hostile = no
			NOT = {
				has_global_flag = JAP_Fading_Sun
			}
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1413.d2
		trigger = {				
			OR = {
				AND = {
					883 = { is_owned_by = FNG }
					OR = {
						FNG_JAP_hostile = yes
						has_global_flag = JAP_Fading_Sun
					}
				}
				883 = {
					NOT = { is_owned_by = FNG }
				}
			}
		}
	}
	
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_kvzhd
	
	trigger = {
		OR = {
			AND = {
				country_exists = FNG
				FNG_JAP_hostile = no
				NOT = {
					has_global_flag = JAP_Fading_Sun
				}
			}
			AND = {
				883 = { is_owned_by = FNG }
				OR = {
					FNG_JAP_hostile = yes
					has_global_flag = JAP_Fading_Sun
				}
			}
			883 = {
				NOT = { is_owned_by = FNG }
			}
		}
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1413.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 2
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:883.owner = { is_subject_of = ROOT }
			}
			var:883.owner = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							state = 885
							state = 884
							state = 883
							state = 714
							state = 717
						}
					}
					add_claim_by = ROOT
					transfer_state_to = ROOT
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				country_exists = FNG
				FNG_JAP_hostile = no
				NOT = {
					has_global_flag = JAP_Fading_Sun
				}
			}			
			set_country_flag = RUS_approached_japan
			FNG = { country_event = rusfor.1415 }
			JAP = { country_event = rusfor.1414 }
		}
		else = {
			var:883.owner = { country_event = rusfor.1401 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1413.b
		trigger = {
			883 = {
				NOT = { is_owned_by = FNG }
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
			}
		}
		var:883.owner = { country_event = rusfor.1402 }
		custom_effect_tooltip = if_manchuria_agrees
		effect_tooltip = {
			add_ideas = RUS_kvzhd_trade_deal
			var:883.owner = { 
				give_military_access = ROOT 
				add_ideas = RUS_china_trade_deal
			}

				limit = { RUS_is_in_rostorg = yes }

						id = rusfor.7
						days = 2
						random = 72
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	id = rusfor.1420

		trigger = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_treaty_1 }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1420.d2
		trigger = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_treaty_2 }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1420.d3
		trigger = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_treaty_3 }
	}
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_sakhalin

		name = rusfor.1420.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				add = -20
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
				has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_treaty_3
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
				NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_treaty_3 }
			}	
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_treaty_2 }
			FROM = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							is_claim_or_core_of_FROM = yes
							state = 537
							state = 555 
						}
					}
					transfer_state_to = ROOT
				}
			}
			555 = { add_claim_by = ROOT }
			add_ideas = RUS_JAP_treaty_maritime
			add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = JAP
				modifier = KR_trade_agreement
			}
			reverse_add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = JAP
				modifier = KR_trade_agreement
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_treaty_1 }
			FROM = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							is_claim_or_core_of_FROM = yes
							state = 537
						}
						NOT = { state = 555 }
					}
					transfer_state_to = ROOT
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			FROM = {
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = {
						is_claim_or_core_of_FROM = yes
						NOT = { state = 537 }
						NOT = { state = 555 }
					}
					transfer_state_to = ROOT
				}
			}
			add_ideas = RUS_FNG_JAP_kvzhd_treaty
			FNG = {
				add_ideas = RUS_FNG_kvzhd_treaty
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = ROOT
					relation = non_aggression_pact
					active = yes
				}
			}
			add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = JAP
				modifier = KR_trade_agreement
			}
			reverse_add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = JAP
				modifier = KR_trade_agreement
			}
			add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = FNG
				modifier = KR_trade_agreement
			}
			reverse_add_opinion_modifier = {
				target = FNG
				modifier = KR_trade_agreement
			}
		}

		set_country_flag = RUS_JAP_agreement

			country = JAP
			relation = non_aggression_pact
			active = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				TRM = {

			JAP = { news_event = rusfor.1421 }

			random_other_country = {

					id = rusfor.1421
					days = 1
				}
			}

		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50

				add = 20
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes

	title = rusfor.1422.t
	desc = rusfor.1422.d
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		tag = RUS
		controls_state = 408
		has_war_with = TRM
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1422.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				TRM = { is_subject_of = JAP }
			}
			TRM = {
				TRM_remove_japanese_influence = yes
				set_temp_variable = { target = JAP }
				clear_all_relations_with_TARGET = yes
			}
			white_peace = JAP
		}
		TRM = { force_capitulate = yes }
	}
}

				name = "Russian Administration"
				desc = "POLITICS_RUSSIAN_ADMIN_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/ALA/Portrait_Alaska_Russian_Administration.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = syndicalist_subtype
				traits = {  }
			}
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Russian Administration"
				desc = "POLITICS_RUSSIAN_ADMIN_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/ALA/Portrait_Alaska_Russian_Administration.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = totalist_subtype
				traits = {  }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = ALA_Canada_Concessions_CAN}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Canada_Concessions_CAN
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					CAN = {
						has_idea = ALA_Canada_Concessions_ALA
					}
				}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Canada_Concessions_ALA
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = ALA_Defense_Against_JAP}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Defense_Against_JAP
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					CAN = {
						has_idea = CAN_Defense_Against_JAP
					}
				}
				remove_ideas = CAN_Defense_Against_JAP
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = ALA_Japan_Concessions_JAP}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Japan_Concessions_JAP
			}
			if = {
				limit = { 
					JAP = {
						has_idea = ALA_Japan_Concessions_ALA
					}
				}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Japan_Concessions_ALA
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = ALA_japanese_publications}
				remove_ideas = ALA_japanese_publications
			}
		}
	}
}

			}

				target = FROM
				type = annex_everything
			}

					id = rusfor.1438
					days = 1
				}
			}
		}
	}

	desc = rusfor.1429.d

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1439.a #Let them decide but we won't back them up militarily.
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				add = 30
				has_war = yes
			}
		}
		ALA = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1440
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1429.e #We're keeping it.
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				add = -30
				has_war = yes
			}
		}
		var:219.owner = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1441
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Surrender
		name = rusfor.1429.a
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 50
			modifier = {
				add = 30
				has_war = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_war_with = var:219.owner
			}
		}
		var:219.owner = {
			set_autonomy = {
				target = ALA
				autonomous_state = kr_autonomous_puppet
				freedom_level = 0.75
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1442
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
}

		}

			}
		}

		}

					id = rusfor.1438

				}
			}

			}

				limit = {

					}
				}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Canada_Concessions_ALA
			}

				limit = { has_idea = ALA_Defense_Against_JAP}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Defense_Against_JAP

			if = {
				limit = {

						has_idea = CAN_Defense_Against_JAP

				}

					}
				}
				remove_ideas = ALA_Japan_Concessions_ALA
			}

		}

	id = rusfor.1443

	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1443.d.united
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1443.d.notunited
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united }
		}
	}	
	picture = GFX_report_event_turkestan
	is_triggered_only = yes
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1443.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 3
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 50
				has_democratic_government = yes
			}
		}
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united
			UTR = { 
				same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes 
				is_subject = no
			}
		}
		UTR = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1444
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1443.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 5
		}
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united
			UTR = { 
				same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes 
				is_subject = no
			}
			RUS_is_expansionist = yes
		}
		UTR = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1447
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1443.c
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				add = 25
				has_dictatorship_government = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 25
				has_government = totalist
			}
		}
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RUS_is_expansionist = yes
				has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored
				has_socialist_government = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united
			}
			UTR = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusfor.1453
					days = 3
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					country_exists = TRK
				}
				TRK = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1453
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					country_exists = KHI
				}
				KHI = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1453
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					country_exists = UZB
				}
				UZB = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1453
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1443.e
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
		trigger = {
			has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united
			UTR = { 
				same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes 
				is_subject = no
			}
			RUS_is_expansionist = yes
			RUS_russian_monarch = no
		}
		UTR = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1456
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1443.g
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united }
			OR = {
				TRK = { same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes }
				KHI = { same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes }
				UZB = { same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes }
				KYR = { same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes }
			}
			RUS_russian_monarch = no
			}
		every_other_country = {
				limit = {
				OR = {
					tag = KYR
					tag = KHI
					tag = UZB
					tag = TRK
				}
				exists = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					same_government_type_as_ROOT = yes
					is_subject = no
				}
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1444
						days = 3
					}
				}
			else = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1453
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1443.f
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
		trigger = {
			RUS_russian_monarch = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_flag = global_turkestan_united
			}
			UTR = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusfor.1459
					days = 3
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

				limit = {
					country_exists = KYR
				}
				KYR = {

						id = rusfor.1453
						days = 3
					}
				}

				}

						id = rusfor.1453
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
			if = {

				}

					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1456
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					country_exists = UZB
				}
				UZB = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1456
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1443.h
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
		}
		every_other_country = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					tag = KYR

					tag = UZB
					tag = TRK
			}
				exists = yes
		}

				limit = { is_subject = yes }

				}

			}

	}

	title = rusfor.1445.t
	desc = rusfor.1445.d
	is_triggered_only = yes

		name = rusfor.1445.a
		FROM = { get_current_government_type = yes }
		set_autonomy = {
			target = FROM
			autonomous_state = kr_autonomous_puppet
			freedom_level = 0.75
		}
		FROM = { restore_previous_government_type = yes }
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_socialist_government = no
			}
			FROM = { set_cosmetic_tag = UTR_autonomy } 
		}
	}
}

		}
	}

	id = rusfor.1462
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1462" }
	title = rusfor.1462.t
	desc = rusfor.1462.d
	trigger = {
		tag = JAP
		is_subject = no
		OR = {
			is_faction_leader = yes
			is_in_faction = no
		}
		has_war_with = RUS
		NOT = { country_exists = TRM }
		408 = { is_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes }
		1246 = { is_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes }
		409 = { is_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes }
	}
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1462.a
		if = {
			limit = { 408 = { owner = { is_russian_tag = yes } } }
			408 = {
				owner = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1463
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 409 = { owner = { is_russian_tag = yes } } }
			409 = {
				owner = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1463
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 219 = { owner = { is_russian_tag = yes } } }
			219 = {
				owner = {
					country_event = {
						id = rusfor.1463
						days = 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_war_with = RUS }
			RUS = {
				country_event = {
					id = rusfor.1463
					days = 3
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1462.b
		trigger = { is_ai = no }
	}
}

	id = rusfor.1463
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1463" }
	title = rusfor.1463.t
	desc = rusfor.1463.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1462.a
		save_event_target_as = peace_country
		every_enemy_country = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					tag = JAP
					is_in_faction_with = JAP
				}
			}
			event_target:peace_country = { white_peace = PREV }
		}
		JAP = { transfer_state = 408 }
		JAP = { transfer_state = 1246 }
		JAP = { transfer_state = 409 }
		JAP = { transfer_state = 637 }
		JAP = { transfer_state = 562 }
		637 = { add_claim_by = JAP }
		562 = { add_claim_by = JAP }
		every_other_country = {
			limit = {
				is_chinese_tag = yes
				is_subject_of = ROOT
			}
			release = PREV
		}
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
		add_stability = -0.2
		add_war_support = -0.5
		set_truce = {
			target = FROM
			days = 900
		}
		diplomatic_relation = {
			country = FROM
			relation = non_aggression_pact
			active = yes
		}
	}
}

country_event = { # Peaceful unification with Transamur
	id = rusfor.1480
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1480" }
	title = rusfor.1480.t
	desc = rusfor.1480.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1480.a
		set_country_flag = RUS_TRM_peaceful_integration
		set_country_flag = TRM_integration_with_russia
		# if tag is TRM	- means TRM initiated unification	
		if = {
			limit = { original_tag = TRM }
			# if TRM is player and expansionist - annex Russia
			if = {
				limit = { 
					is_ai = no 
					has_idea = TRM_dream
				}
				FROM = {
					every_unit_leader = { set_nationality = ROOT }
					every_subject_country = { set_country_flag = was_russian_puppet }
				}
				annex_country = {
					target = FROM
					transfer_troops = yes
				}
				every_other_country = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = was_russian_puppet }
					get_current_government_type = yes
					ROOT = { puppet = PREV }
					restore_previous_government_type = yes
					clr_country_flag = was_russian_puppet
				}
				TRM_become_russia_effect = yes
			}
			else = {
				# annex transbaikal puppet
				if = {
					limit = {
						TRB = { 
							exists = yes 
							is_subject_of = TRM
						}
					}
					TRM = { annex_country = { target = TRB } }
				}
				# give transbaikal and yakutia to Russia
				every_owned_state = {
					limit = { 
						NOT = {
							region = 247
							region = 148
							state = 537
						}
					}
					add_claim_by = FROM
					transfer_state_to = FROM
				}
				# become transitional autonomy
				if = {
					limit = { FROM = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored } }
					FROM = { SOV_puppet_ROOT_effect = yes }
					TRM = { set_cosmetic_tag = TRM_SOV }
				}
				else = {
					get_current_government_type = yes
					FROM = {
						set_autonomy = {
							target = ROOT
							autonomy_state = kr_autonomy_russian_general_governorate
						}
						add_collaboration = {
							target = ROOT
							value = 0.05
						}
					}
					restore_previous_government_type = yes
					drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
					add_timed_idea = {
						idea = TRM_integration_of_economy
						days = 180
					}
				}
				remove_ideas = TRM_dream
				if = {
					limit = { 
						408 = {
							has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = TRM_japanese_vladivostok_modifier }
						}
					}
					408 = { set_demilitarized_zone = yes }
				}
				every_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_unit_leader_flag = CAN_TRM_expedition_leader }
					set_nationality = CAN
					add_unit_leader_trait = GBR_british_exile_trait
					remove_unit_leader_trait = TRM_british_expeditionary
				}
				random_unit_leader = { 
					limit = { has_id = 1514 }
					set_nationality = JAP
				}
				if = { 
					limit = { has_country_leader = { name = "Radola Gajda" ruling_only = yes } }
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = paternal_autocrat
						elections_allowed = no
					}
				}
				else_if = { 
					limit = { TRM_kolchak_in_power = yes }
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Viktor Pepelyaev"
						picture = "gfx/leaders/TRM/Portrait_TRM_Victor_Pepelyaev.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = pataut_authoritarian_liberalism_subtype
					}
				}
				else_if = { 
					limit = { TRM_semyenov_in_power = yes }
					create_country_leader = {
						name = "Aleksey Baksheyev"
						picture = "gfx/leaders/TRM/Portrait_TRM_Aleksey_Baksheev.png"
						expire = "1.1.1"
						ideology = pataut_cossack_subtype
					}
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					random_unit_leader = { 
						limit = { has_id = 243910 }
						set_nationality = TRB
					}
					RUS = {
						country_event = { id = rusfor.1490 days = 5 }
						country_event = { id = rusfor.1491 days = 10 }
						country_event = { id = rusfor.1492 days = 30 }
						country_event = { id = rusfor.1493 days = 20 }
						country_event = { id = rusfor.1494 days = 45 }
						country_event = { id = rusfor.1495 days = 15 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		# if tag is not TRM	- means RUS initiated unification	
		else = {
			# if TRM is player - annex Russia
			if = {
				limit = { 
					FROM = { 
						is_ai = no 
						has_idea = TRM_dream
					}						
				}
				every_unit_leader = { set_nationality = FROM }
				every_subject_country = { set_country_flag = was_russian_puppet }
				every_other_country = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = was_russian_puppet }
					get_current_government_type = yes
					FROM = { puppet = PREV }
					restore_previous_government_type = yes
					clr_country_flag = was_russian_puppet
				}
				FROM = {
					annex_country = {
						target = ROOT
						transfer_troops = yes
					}
					TRM_become_russia_effect = yes
				}
			}
			else = {
				# annex transbaikal puppet
				if = {
					limit = {
						TRB = { 
							exists = yes 
							is_subject_of = TRM
						}
					}
					TRM = { annex_country = { target = TRB } }
				}
				# give transbaikal and yakutia to Russia
				FROM = {
					every_owned_state = {
						limit = { 
							NOT = {
								region = 247
								region = 148
								state = 537
							}
						}
						add_claim_by = ROOT
						transfer_state_to = ROOT
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
					SOV_puppet_FROM_effect = yes
					TRM = { set_cosmetic_tag = TRM_SOV }
				}
				else = {
					# become transitional autonomy
					FROM = { get_current_government_type = yes }
					set_autonomy = {
						target = FROM
						autonomy_state = kr_autonomy_russian_general_governorate
					}
					FROM = {
						restore_previous_government_type = yes
						drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
						add_timed_idea = {
							idea = TRM_integration_of_economy
							days = 180
						}
					}
				}
				add_collaboration = {
					target = FROM
					value = 0.05
				}
				FROM = {
					remove_ideas = TRM_dream
					drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
					if = {
						limit = { 
							408 = {
								has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = TRM_japanese_vladivostok_modifier }
							}
						}
						408 = { set_demilitarized_zone = yes }
					}
					every_unit_leader = {
						limit = { has_unit_leader_flag = CAN_TRM_expedition_leader }
						set_nationality = CAN
						add_unit_leader_trait = GBR_british_exile_trait
						remove_unit_leader_trait = TRM_british_expeditionary
					}
					random_unit_leader = { 
						limit = { has_id = 1514 }
						set_nationality = JAP
					}
					if = { 
						limit = { has_country_leader = { name = "Radola Gajda" ruling_only = yes } }
						set_politics = {
							ruling_party = paternal_autocrat
							elections_allowed = no
						}
					}
					else_if = { 
						limit = { TRM_kolchak_in_power = yes }
						create_country_leader = {
							name = "Viktor Pepelyaev"
							picture = "gfx/leaders/TRM/Portrait_TRM_Victor_Pepelyaev.png"
							expire = "1.1.1"
							ideology = pataut_authoritarian_liberalism_subtype
						}
					}
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					FROM = {
						random_unit_leader = { 
							limit = { has_id = 243910 }
							set_nationality = TRB
						}
					}
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1490 days = 5 }
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1491 days = 10 }
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1492 days = 30 }
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1493 days = 20 }
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1494 days = 45 }
					country_event = { id = rusfor.1495 days = 15 }
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { # Integration of Transamur
	id = rusfor.1490
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1490" }
	title = rusfor.1490.t
	desc = rusfor.1490.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		TRM = { 
			TRM_nra_in_power = no
			OR = {
				has_unit_leader = 505058
				has_unit_leader = 404
				has_unit_leader = 505053
				has_unit_leader = 50004
				has_unit_leader = 505060
				has_unit_leader = 505059
			}
		}
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_TRM_pepelyaev
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1490.a
		ai_chance = { base = 80 }
		set_country_flag = RUS_TRM_save_generals
		TRM = {
			disband_one_to_three_divisions = yes
			reduce_conscription_to_disarmed = yes
			add_timed_idea = { idea = TRM_integration_of_army days = 90 }
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Veteranskaya Diviziya"
				disband = yes
			}
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Chekhoslovatskiy Korpus"
				disband = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { TRM_do_rovs_in_power = no }
				# Diterikhs
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 505058 }
					demote_if_marshal = yes
					set_nationality = ROOT
				}
				# Kappel
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 404 }
					demote_if_marshal = yes
					set_nationality = ROOT
				}
			}
			# Smolin
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505053 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Khanzhin
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 50004 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Berens
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = air_controller }
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Bogoslovsky
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505078 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				if = {
					limit = { RUS = { has_completed_focus = RUS_Rally_The_Republicans } }
					add_unit_leader_trait = RUS_denikin_officer
				}
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			if = {
				limit = { TRM_Pepelyaev_coup = no }
				# Pepelyaev
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 505060 }
					if = {
						limit = { RUS = { has_completed_focus = RUS_Rally_The_Republicans } }
						add_unit_leader_trait = RUS_denikin_officer
					}
					set_nationality = ROOT
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { TRM_czech_legion_in_power = no }
				# Voitsekhovsky
				random_unit_leader = {
					limit = { has_id = 505059 }
					demote_if_marshal = yes
					if = {
						limit = { RUS = { has_completed_focus = RUS_Rally_The_Republicans } }
						add_unit_leader_trait = RUS_denikin_officer
					}
					set_nationality = ROOT
				}
			}
		}
		RUS_Aleksandr_Andogsky = { set_nationality = ROOT }
		RUS_increase_rovs_pop = yes
		add_war_support = 0.03
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1490.b
		ai_chance = { base = 20 }
		add_stability = 0.05
		TRM = {
			disband_one_to_three_divisions = yes
			reduce_conscription_to_disarmed = yes
			add_timed_idea = { idea = TRM_integration_of_army days = 90 }
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Veteranskaya Diviziya"
				disband = yes
			}
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Chekhoslovatskiy Korpus"
				disband = yes
			}
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_unit_leader_flag = CAN_TRM_expedition_leader }
				set_nationality = CAN
				add_unit_leader_trait = GBR_british_exile_trait
				remove_unit_leader_trait = TRM_british_expeditionary
			}
			random_unit_leader = { 
				limit = { has_id = 1514 }
				set_nationality = JAP
			}
			effect_tooltip = {
				every_unit_leader = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							has_id = 505058
							has_id = 404
							has_id = 505053
							has_id = 50004
							has_id = 505078
							has_id = 505060
							has_id = 505059
						}
					}
					demote_if_marshal = yes
					retire = yes
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				every_unit_leader = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							has_id = 505058
							has_id = 404
							has_id = 505053
							has_id = 50004
							has_id = 505078
							has_id = 505060
							has_id = 505059
						}
					}
					demote_if_marshal = yes
					set_unit_leader_flag = TRM_original_leader
					set_nationality = XXA
				}
			}
		}
	}
}
country_event = { # Integration of Transamur
	id = rusfor.1491
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1491" }
	title = rusfor.1491.t
	desc = rusfor.1491.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		TRM = { 
			OR = {
				has_unit_leader = 505054
				has_unit_leader = 243912
				has_unit_leader = 243911
			}
		}
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_TRM_semyonov
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1491.a
		ai_chance = { base = 80 }
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					state = 563
					state = 657
				}
				has_resistance = yes
			}
			add_resistance = 5
		}
		TRM = {
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Kazatskaya Diviziya"
				disband = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505054 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 243912 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 243911 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1491.b
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_cossack_hosts_dissolved } 
		}
		ai_chance = { base = 20 }
		add_command_power = -50
		every_state = {
			limit = { 
				state = 563 
				is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 3
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_cossack_host_TRB_modifier }
		}
		every_state = {
			limit = { 
				state = 657 
				is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 3
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_cossack_host_AMU_modifier }
		}
		every_state = {
			limit = { 
				state = 409 
				is_owned_and_controlled_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 3
			}
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_cossack_host_USU_modifier }
		}
		clr_country_flag = Pavel_Ivanov_Rinov_dead
		custom_effect_tooltip = will_become_available_as_cos
		show_ideas_tooltip = TRM_Pavel_Ivanov_Rinov_cos_ade
		TRM = {
			set_country_flag = Pavel_Ivanov_Rinov_dead
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Kazatskaya Diviziya"
				disband = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505054 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 243912 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 243911 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1491.c
		trigger = { 
			has_country_flag = RUS_cossack_hosts_dissolved
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
		}
		ai_chance = { base = 20 }
		RUS_bop_increase_monarchists_small = yes
		RUS_increase_rovs_pop_small = yes
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = 563 decision = RUS_restore_the_transbaikal_cossack_host }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = 657 decision = RUS_restore_the_amur_cossack_host }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = 1246 decision = RUS_restore_the_ussuri_cossack_host }
		TRM = {
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Kazatskaya Diviziya"
				disband = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505054 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 243912 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 243911 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				retire = yes
			}
		}
	}

country_event = { # Integration of Transamur
	id = rusfor.1492
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1492" }
	title = rusfor.1492.t
	desc = rusfor.1492.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	trigger = {
		OR = {
			owns_state = 574
			owns_state = 564
		}
	}
	picture = GFX_yakutia_celebration
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1492.a
		trigger = {
			NOT = { 
				has_idea = one_and_indivisible 
				has_idea = RUS_russification_policies 
				has_global_flag = SOV_unitary_state
			}
			RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = no
			has_authoritarian_government = no
		}
		ai_chance = { base = 30 }
		add_political_power = -35
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line 
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { state = 574 }
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_yakut_autonomy }
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 15
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_decrease_federalists_pop_large_tt
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_permanent_increase_of_autonomists_pop_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_federalists_condition_pop = -0.10 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_autonomists_condition_pop = 0.10 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = -0.1 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rsdrp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vns_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ep_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ndm_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nrpr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsnp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_independent_temp_pop = 0.02 }
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { state = 564 }
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_buryat_autonomy }
			if = {
				limit = { has_resistance = yes }
				add_compliance = 15
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_decrease_federalists_pop_large_tt
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_permanent_increase_of_autonomists_pop_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_federalists_condition_pop = -0.10 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_autonomists_condition_pop = 0.10 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = -0.1 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rsdrp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vns_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ep_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ndm_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nrpr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsnp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_independent_temp_pop = 0.02 }
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1492.b
		ai_chance = { base = 70 }
		add_stability = -0.02
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					state = 564 
					state = 574 
				}
				has_resistance = yes
			}
			add_compliance = -3
			add_resistance = 10
		}
	}
}

country_event = { # Integration of Transamur
	id = rusfor.1493
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1493" }
	title = rusfor.1493.t
	desc = rusfor.1493.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_TRM_merkulovs
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1493.a
		ai_chance = { base = 90 }
		add_political_power = 35
		add_collaboration = { target = TRM value = 0.05 }
		TRM = { 
			add_popularity = { ideology = social_conservative popularity = -0.1 }
			every_owned_state = {
				custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_decrease_vns_pop_large_tt
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vns_temp_pop = -0.1 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rsdrp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ep_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ndm_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nrpr_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsnp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_independent_temp_pop = 0.02 }
			}
			add_two_random_civilian_factories = yes
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1493.b
		trigger = { 
			has_socialist_government = no
			has_left_democratic_government = no
		}
		ai_chance = { base = 10 }
		add_political_power = -35
		add_collaboration = { target = TRM value = 0.07 }
		TRM = { 
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { lkdp_in_power = yes } }
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = kdp_united }
					RUS_increase_kdp_pop = yes
				}
				else = {
					RUS_increase_lkdp_pop = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { pp_in_power = yes } }
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = kdp_united }
					RUS_increase_kdp_pop = yes
				}
				else = {
					RUS_increase_pp_pop = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { rkdp_in_power = yes } }
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = kdp_united }
					RUS_increase_kdp_pop = yes
				}
				else = {
					RUS_increase_rkdp_pop = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { vns_in_power = yes } }
				RUS_increase_vns_pop = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { ep_in_power = yes } }
				RUS_increase_ep_pop = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { nsnp_in_power = yes } }
				RUS_increase_nsnp_pop = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { RUS_savinkov_pm = yes } }
				RUS_increase_nrpr_pop = yes
			}	
			add_popularity = { ideology = social_conservative popularity = 0.05 }
		}
	}
}

	}

		every_state = {
			limit = { 
				is_core_of = TRM 
				is_owned_by_ROOT_or_ally = yes
			}
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_New_Economic_Policy_modifier }	
			}
			TRM = { add_ideas = TRM_nra_nep }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				TRM = { TRM_nra_in_power = yes }
			}
			TRM = { add_ideas = TRM_nra_sr_economy }
		}
		add_collaboration = { target = TRM value = 0.03 }
	}
}

		}

			base = 80

				set_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations

				}
			}
		}

		}
	}
}

country_event = { # Integration of Transamur

		text = rusfor.1497.t
		trigger = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations }
	}
	title = {
		text = rusfor.1497.t2
		trigger = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations } }
	}

		text = rusfor.1497.d
		trigger = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations }

		text = rusfor.1497.d2
		trigger = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations } }
	}
		
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1497.a
		trigger = { 
			has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations 
			537 = { is_owned_by_ROOT_or_ally = no }
		}
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no
			}
		}
		add_political_power = 15
		FROM = { 
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1498
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1497.b
		trigger = { 
			has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations 
		}
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 75
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					RUS_dont_attack_if_vulnerable_or_preparing = yes
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_target_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_faction_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_overlord_is_stronger = yes }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes
			}
		}
		add_stability = 0.05
		RUS_increase_ruling_party_pop = yes
		FROM = { 
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1499
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1497.c
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_JAP_negotiations }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				408 = { is_demilitarized_zone = yes }
			}
			408 = { 
				set_demilitarized_zone = no
			}
		}
		TRM = { 
			TRM_remove_japanese_influence = yes 
		}
	}
}
country_event = { # Integration of Transamur
	id = rusfor.1498
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1498" }
	title = rusfor.1498.t
	desc = rusfor.1498.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1498.a
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_5 = yes
		add_war_support = -0.05
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_claim_or_core_of_FROM = yes
					state = 537 
				}
				NOT = { state = 555 }
			}
			FROM = {
				transfer_state = PREV
				add_to_array = { global.RUS_integration_state_array = 537 }
			}
		}
		TRM = { 
			TRM_remove_japanese_influence = yes 
			give_resource_rights = { receiver = JAP state = 408 }
			give_resource_rights = { receiver = JAP state = 409 }
			give_resource_rights = { receiver = JAP state = 1246 }
		}
		FROM = { 
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1500
				days = 2
			}
		}
		
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1498.b
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 0
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				FROM = { RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = no }
			}
		}
		add_war_support = 0.05
		add_command_power = 5
		if = {
			limit = { 
				408 = { has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = TRM_japanese_vladivostok_modifier } }
			}
			408 = { 
				transfer_state_to = ROOT
				add_claim_by = ROOT
				set_demilitarized_zone = no
			}
		}
		TRM = { 
			TRM_remove_japanese_influence = yes 
		}
		FROM = { 
			set_country_flag = RUS_prepare_for_war_JAP
			country_event = rusfor.1499
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #
	id = rusfor.1600
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1600" }
	title = rusfor.1600.t
	desc = rusfor.1600.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { has_global_flag = GER_withdrew_from_caucasus }
		tag = GER
		RUS = {
			OR = {
				has_idea = rus_brest_litovsk
				has_idea = rus_brest_litovsk_1
				has_idea = rus_brest_litovsk_renegotiated
			}
			NOT = { is_in_faction_with = GER }
		}
		OR = {
			AND = {
				RUS = { has_war_with = UKR }
				UKR = { 
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
				}
			}
			AND = {
				RUS = { has_war_with = WHR }
				WHR = { 
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
				}
			}
			AND = {
				RUS = { has_war_with = FIN }
				FIN = { 
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
				}
			}
			AND = {
				RUS = { has_war_with = LIT }
				LIT = { 
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
				}
			}
			AND = {
				RUS = { has_war_with = BAT }
				BAT = { 
					has_socialist_government = no
					is_ally_of_ROOT = no
					NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
				}				
			}
		}	
	}	

	option = {
		name = rusfor.1600.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
		}
		RUS = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1601
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1600.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
		add_stability = -0.1
	}	
}
country_event = { #
	id = rusfor.1601
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1601" }
	title = rusfor.1601.t
	desc = rusfor.1601.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1601.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.5
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_target_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_faction_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_overlord_is_stronger = yes }
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = rus_brest_litovsk }
			remove_ideas = rus_brest_litovsk
		}
		else = {
			remove_ideas = rus_brest_litovsk_1
		}
		RUS_remove_riga_accords = yes
		add_named_threat = { 
			threat = 7
			name = RUS_minsk_treaty_threat
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1602
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1600.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 3
				RUS_is_open_to_diplomacy = yes
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 5
				OR = {
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_target_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_faction_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_overlord_is_stronger = yes }
				}
			}
		}
		every_enemy_country = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					original_tag = UKR
					tag = FIN
					tag = LIT
					tag = BAT
					tag = WHR
					is_ally_with = UKR
					is_ally_with = FIN
					is_ally_with = LIT
					is_ally_with = BAT
					is_ally_with = WHR
				}
			}
			white_peace_with_ROOT = yes
			set_truce = { target = ROOT days = 100 }
		}
		add_war_support = -0.1
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_10 = yes
	
	}	
}
country_event = { #
	id = rusfor.1602
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1602" }
	title = rusfor.1602.t
	desc = rusfor.1602.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1602.a #Cease all contacts between the Völkerbund and Russia!
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 75
		}
		set_global_flag = GER_withdrew_from_caucasus
		embargo_FROM = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			for_each_scope_loop = {
				array = ROOT.faction_members
				RUS = { embargo_PREV = yes }
			}
		}
		FROM = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1603
				days = 1
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1602.b #Back down, we cannot afford a conflict with Russia.
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 15
		}
		trigger = {
			country_exists = FRA
		}
		set_global_flag = GER_withdrew_from_caucasus
		add_political_power = -100		
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1602.c
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = {
				factor = 3
				RUS = { 
					OR = {
						has_war_with = UKR
						has_war_with = FIN
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0.1
				OR = {
					date < 1938.1.1
					enemies_strength_ratio > 0.8
					surrender_progress > 0
					strength_ratio = { tag = FROM ratio < 1.0 }
					FROM = {
						is_subject = yes
						overlord = {
							strength_ratio = { tag = ROOT ratio > 0.8 }
						}
					}
					FROM = {
						is_in_faction = yes
						faction_leader = {
							strength_ratio = { tag = ROOT ratio > 0.8 }
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		declare_war_on = {
			target = FROM
			type = annex_everything
		}
	}	
}

	is_triggered_only = yes

		name = rusfor.1700.a
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 100  
			modifier = {
				add = -50
				TRM = { has_country_flag = TRM_entente_partial_support }
			} 
			modifier = {
				add = -100
				TRM = { has_country_flag = TRM_entente_full_support }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = -20
				FROM = { same_government_type_as_ROOT = no }
			}
		}
		every_other_country = {
			limit = { is_in_faction_with = FROM }
			set_country_flag = was_in_faction_with_RUS
		}
		FROM = { dismantle_faction = yes }
		ROOT = { add_to_faction = FROM }
		every_other_country = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = was_in_faction_with_RUS }
			ROOT = { add_to_faction = PREV }
		}	
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1700.b
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 0  
			modifier = {
				add = 50
				TRM = { has_country_flag = TRM_entente_partial_support }
			} 
			modifier = {
				add = 100
				TRM = { has_country_flag = TRM_entente_full_support }
			}
			modifier = {
				add = 20
				FROM = { same_government_type_as_ROOT = no }
			}
		}
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = KR_factional_rivalry }
		FROM = { 
			country_event = {
				id = rusfor.1701
				days = 5
			}
		}
	}

country_event = { #

				}

			}

		}
	}

		}

			NFA = { 
				is_in_faction_with = ENT 
				is_subject = no
			}

			}
		}
		NFA = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1702 days = 2 }
		}
	}

country_event = { #
	id = rusfor.1702
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1702" }
	title = rusfor.1702.t
	desc = rusfor.1702.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_franco_russian_alliance
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1702.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 85
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = NFA_foreign_policy option = DEFAULT } }
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_global_flag = ENT_france_agree_alsace
					has_global_flag = ENT_france_agree_mittel
					has_global_flag = ENT_agree_colonies
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_global_flag = ENT_france_agree_alsace
			}
			clr_global_flag = ENT_france_agree_alsace
			if = {
				limit = { 28 = { is_not_claim_or_core_of_ROOT = yes } }
				28 = { add_claim_by = NFA }
			}
		}
		clr_global_flag = ENT_france_agree_mittel
		clr_global_flag = ENT_agree_colonies
		leave_faction = yes
		#Step one: peace out with any faction leaders who aren't neighbours of/invading PREV or claiming PREV territory
		every_enemy_country = {
			limit = {
				is_faction_leader = yes
				OR = {
					capital_scope = { is_island_region = yes }
					same_continent_as_PREV = no
				}
				NOT = {
					civilwar_target = PREV #do not peace out civil wars
					PREV = {
						OR = {
							any_home_area_neighbor_country = { is_in_faction_with = PREV.PREV } #== invading
							any_owned_state = {
								OR = {
									is_core_of = PREV.PREV
									is_claimed_by = PREV.PREV
								}
							}
						}
					}
					any_allied_country = {
						PREV.PREV = {
							any_owned_state = {
								OR = {
									is_core_of = PREV.PREV
									is_claimed_by = PREV.PREV
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				NOT = {
					tag = INT
					is_in_faction_with = INT
				}
			}
			white_peace = PREV
		}

		#Step two: peace out with any factionless non-neighbours not on the same continent who aren't invading PREV or claiming PREV territory
		every_enemy_country = {
			limit = {
				is_in_faction = no
				is_subject = no
				has_capitulated = no
				OR = {
					capital_scope = { is_island_region = yes }
					same_continent_as_PREV = no
				}
				NOT = {
					civilwar_target = PREV #do not peace out civil wars
					PREV = {
						OR = {
							any_home_area_neighbor_country = { #== invading
								OR = {
									tag = PREV.PREV
									is_subject_of = PREV.PREV
								}
							}
							any_owned_state = {
								OR = {
									is_core_of = PREV.PREV
									is_claimed_by = PREV.PREV
								}
							}
						}
					}
					any_subject_country = {
						PREV.PREV = {
							any_owned_state = {
								OR = {
									is_core_of = PREV.PREV
									is_claimed_by = PREV.PREV
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				NOT = {
					tag = INT
					is_in_faction_with = INT
				}
			}
			white_peace = PREV
		}
		CAN_remove_from_iedc = yes
		GER_remove_from_mitteleuropa = yes
		remove_from_all_tech_sharing_groups = yes
		ENT = { 
			country_event = rusfor.1705
		}
		FROM = { 
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1703 days = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1701.b

country_event = { #
	id = rusfor.1720
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusfor.1720" }
	title = rusfor.1720.t
	desc = rusfor.1720.d
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_POL_royal_castle
	
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1720.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = yes
					has_idea = one_and_indivisible 
					has_idea = RUS_russification_policies 
				}
			}
		}
		set_autonomy = {
			target = POL
			autonomous_state = kr_autonomy_russian_imperial_autonomy
			freedom_level = 0.75
		}
		POL = {
			POL_setup_janusz = yes
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = paternal_autocrat
				long_name = POL_paternal_autocrat_russian_party_long
				name = POL_paternal_autocrat_russian_party
			}
			if = {
				limit = { ROOT = { has_authoritarian_government = yes } }
				set_politics = {
					ruling_party = paternal_autocrat
					elections_allowed = no
				}
				set_political_party = {
					ideology = paternal_autocrat
					popularity = 60
				}
			}
			add_opinion_modifier = { target = ROOT modifier = KR_liberated_us }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1720.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
		}
		set_autonomy = {
			target = POL
			autonomous_state = kr_autonomy_russian_imperial_autonomy
			freedom_level = 0.75
		}
		POL = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						RUS_is_absolute_monarchy = yes
					}
				}
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = paternal_autocrat
					long_name = POL_paternal_autocrat_russian_party_long
					name = POL_paternal_autocrat_russian_party
				}
				set_politics = {
					ruling_party = paternal_autocrat
					elections_allowed = no
				}
				set_political_party = {
					ideology = paternal_autocrat
					popularity = 60
				}
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Tsar of All-Russia"
					desc = "POLITICS_TSAR_OF_ALL_RUSSIA_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Imperial_Administration.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = absolute_monarchy_subtype
				}
			}
			else = {
				RUS_install_puppet_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
	}	
}

	id = rusfor.1722

		}
	}
	desc = {

			RUS_russian_monarch = yes
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusfor.1722.d.savinkov
		trigger = { 
			RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
		}
	}
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes

		controls_state = 10
		NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_russia_restored }
	}
	picture = GFX_report_event_POL_sejm

			RUS_savinkov_in_power = no 
			RUS_is_unitary = no
		}
		add_political_power = -15
		add_stability = 0.05
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				is_controlled_by = ROOT
				is_core_of = POL
			}
			add_compliance = 5
			add_resistance = -10
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_poland_modifier_autonomy }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_permanent_increase_of_federalists_pop_tt
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_federalists_condition_pop = 0.20 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_autonomists_condition_pop = -0.10 }
			RUS_randomize_state_plsr_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_nsp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_psr_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_rsdrp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_lkdp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_pp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_rkdp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_vns_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_rovs_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_ep_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_ndm_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_nrpr_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_nsnp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_independent_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_monarchists_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 86 = { is_owned_by = RUS } }
			86 = {
				add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_poland_modifier_autonomy }
				add_compliance = 5
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 776 = { is_owned_by = RUS } }
			776 = {
				add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_poland_modifier_autonomy }
				add_compliance = 5
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				RUS_russian_monarch = yes
				NOT = { country_exists = POL }
			}
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1721 days = 20 }
		}
		else = {
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1723 days = 80 random_days = 30 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1722.b
		trigger = { 
			RUS_savinkov_in_power = no 
			NOT = { has_idea = local_parliaments }
		}
		add_political_power = -35
		add_stability = -0.05
		every_owned_state = {
			limit = {
				is_controlled_by = ROOT
				is_core_of = POL
			}
			add_resistance = -10
			add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = RUS_poland_modifier_autonomy }
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_permanent_increase_of_autonomists_pop_tt
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_autonomists_condition_pop = 0.20 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_federalists_condition_pop = -0.10 }
			RUS_randomize_state_plsr_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_nsp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_psr_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_rsdrp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_lkdp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_pp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_rkdp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_vns_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_rovs_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_ep_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_ndm_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_nrpr_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_nsnp_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_independent_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
			RUS_randomize_state_monarchists_temp_pop_minus_02 = yes
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusfor.1722.c
		trigger = { RUS_savinkov_in_power = no }

		if = {

news_event = { #Vozhd Takes Power in Russia!
	id = russianews.1
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russianews.1" }
	title = russianews.1.t
	desc = russianews.1.d
	picture = GFX_news_event_RUS_savinkov

	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_for_sender = no
	major = yes
	
	trigger = { wants_world_news = yes } #Global news event

	option = {
		name = russianews.1.a
		trigger = { original_tag = GER }
	}
	option = {
		name = russianews.1.b
		trigger = {
			is_in_faction_with = GER
			NOT = { original_tag = GER }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russianews.1.c
		trigger = { has_socialist_government = yes }
	}
	option = {
		name = russianews.1.e
		trigger = {
			original_tag = ROM
			has_country_flag = ROM_selectczc
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russianews.1.f
		trigger = {
			original_tag = ROM
			has_country_flag = ROM_selectcarol
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russianews.1.g
		trigger = {
			original_tag = SER
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russianews.1.h
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				is_in_faction_with = GER
				has_socialist_government = yes
				original_tag = ROM
				original_tag = SER
			}
		}
	}
}

# The Fall of Russia
news_event = {
	id = russia.1902
	immediate = { log = "[GetLogInfo]: event russia.1902" }
	title = russia.1902.t
	desc = russia.1902.d
	picture = GFX_news_event_RUS_collapse

	trigger = {
		wants_world_news = yes
	}

	major = yes
	fire_for_sender = no
	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = russia.1902.a
		trigger = { is_ally_with = GER }
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.b
		trigger = {
			is_ally_with = INT
			NOT = { has_war_with = GER }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.c
		trigger = {
			is_ally_with = INT
			has_war_with = GER
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.e
		trigger = {
			is_ally_with = ENT
			INT = { is_faction_leader = yes }
			NOT = { has_war_with = INT }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.f
		trigger = {
			is_ally_with = ENT
			INT = { is_faction_leader = yes }
			has_war_with = INT
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.g
		trigger = {
			is_ally_with = ENT
			INT = { is_faction_leader = no }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.h
		trigger = { original_tag = JAP }
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.i
		trigger = { is_chinese_tag = yes }
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1902.j
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				is_ally_with = GER
				is_ally_with = INT
				is_ally_with = ENT
				original_tag = JAP
				is_chinese_tag = yes
			}
		}
	}
}
country_event = { #force RUS to collapse if the war drags on too long
	id = russia.1919
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.1919 FROM = [From.GetName]" }

	is_triggered_only = yes
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		is_ai = yes
		RRF = { is_ai = yes }
		surrender_progress > 0
	}

	option = {
		force_capitulate = yes
	}
}
country_event = { #force RVA and RRF to collapse if the war drags on too long
	id = russia.1920
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.1919 FROM = [From.GetName]" }

	is_triggered_only = yes
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		is_ai = yes
		controls_state = 195
		controls_state = 219
	}

	option = {
		if = {
			limit = { 
				country_exists = RVA
				RVA = { is_ai = yes }
			}
			RVA = { force_capitulate = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				country_exists = RRF
				RRF = { is_ai = yes }
			}
			RRF = { force_capitulate = yes }
		}		
	}
}
country_event = { #force TRM to collapse if the war drags on too long
	id = russia.1921
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.1919 FROM = [From.GetName]" }

	is_triggered_only = yes
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		is_ai = yes
		WRA = { is_ai = yes }
		surrender_progress > 10
	}

	option = {
		force_capitulate = yes
	}
}

unit_leader_event = { #soviet generals
	id = russia.1924
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.1924"}
	title = russia.1924.t
	desc = russia.1924.d
	fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes
	option = {
		name = russia.1924.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
		add_war_support = 0.05
		add_stability = -0.05
		add_popularity = {
			ideology = totalist
			popularity = 0.03
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { 
					has_unit_leader_flag = SOV_italian_clique 
					NOT = { has_id = 1954 }
				}
				demote_if_marshal = yes
			}
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 1954 }
			promote_to_marshal = yes
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = russia.1924.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
		}
		add_stability = 0.05
		add_political_power = 15
		if = {
			limit = {
				SRI = { is_in_faction_with = INT }
			}
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_unit_leader_flag = SOV_italian_clique }
				set_nationality = SRI
			}
		}
		else = {
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_unit_leader_flag = SOV_italian_clique }
				set_nationality = FRA
			}
		}
	}
}

	id = russia.2006
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.2006"}
	title = russia.2006.t
	desc = russia.2006.d
	picture = GFX_rus_gorod_na_neve

	fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #a great idea!
		name = russia.2006.a
		set_province_name = { id = 6174 name = VICTORY_POINTS_6174_IMPERIAL }
		195 = { 
			set_state_name = STATE_195_IMPERIAL
			set_state_flag = renamed_state_imperial 
			hidden_effect = { rename_state_effect = yes }
		}
	}
	option = { #
		name = russia.2006.b


	}
}

		set_province_name = { id = 9097 name = VICTORY_POINTS_9097_IMPERIAL }
		set_province_name = { id = 3529 name = VICTORY_POINTS_3529_IMPERIAL }
		set_province_name = { id = 7274 name = VICTORY_POINTS_7274_IMPERIAL }
		set_province_name = { id = 9402 name = VICTORY_POINTS_9402_IMPERIAL }
		set_province_name = { id = 3134 name = VICTORY_POINTS_3134_IMPERIAL }
		213 = { set_state_name = STATE_213_IMPERIAL }
		217 = { set_state_name = STATE_217_IMPERIAL }
		570 = { set_state_name = STATE_570_IMPERIAL }
		hidden_effect = { 
			195 = { set_state_flag = renamed_petrodvorets }
			570 = { set_state_flag = renamed_state_imperial }
			217 = { set_state_flag = renamed_state_imperial }
			1193 = { set_state_flag = renamed_state_imperial }	
			213 = { set_state_flag = renamed_state_imperial }	
			every_controlled_state = { rename_state_effect = yes }
		}
	}
	option = { #
		name = russia.2008.b
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
	}
}

country_event = {
	id = russia.3000
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.3000" }
	title = russia.3000.t
	desc = russia.3000.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_KSV_helicopters

	trigger = { NOT = { has_country_flag = flag_heli_stop_repeat } }

	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	fire_only_once = yes	

	option = {
		name = russia.3000.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_dlc_got = yes }
			complete_special_project = sp:sp_air_helicopter
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = helicopter_equipment_1 amount = 100 }
		}
		else = {
			set_technology = {
				helicopter = 1
			}
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = helicopter_1 amount = 100 }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			set_country_flag = flag_heli_stop_repeat
			every_country = {
				limit = {
					is_in_faction_with = RUS
					NOT = { 
						is_special_project_completed = sp:sp_air_helicopter
						has_tech = helicopter
					}
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = russia.3001
				days = 15
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = {
	id = russia.3001
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.3001" }
	title = russia.3001.t
	desc = russia.3001.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_KSV_helicopters

	trigger = { NOT = { has_country_flag = flag_heli_stop_repeat } }

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = russia.3001.a
		if = {
			limit = { has_dlc_got = yes }
			add_breakthrough_progress = {
				specialization = specialization_air
				value = 0.25
			}
		}
		else = {
			set_technology = {
				helicopter = 1
			}

			}
		}
	}

			has_global_flag = RUS_FIN_GER_treaty_of_tampere_CA
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rus_karelian_crisis.26.d4

			has_global_flag = RUS_FIN_GER_treaty_of_tampere_CB
		}
	}

			}

		}

				has_global_flag = RUS_FIN_GER_treaty_of_tampere_CA

				transfer_state_to = RUS
				add_claim_by = RUS

				add_claim_by = RUS

			}
			RUS = {

					limit = { is_claimed_by = FIN }
					remove_claim_by = FIN
				}
			}
			FIN = {
				set_country_flag = FIN_treaty_of_tampere_neutral_status
				set_rule = {
					desc = FIN_treaty_of_tampere_neutral_status
					can_join_factions = no
					can_not_declare_war = yes
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_global_flag = RUS_FIN_GER_treaty_of_tampere_BA 
					has_global_flag = RUS_FIN_GER_treaty_of_tampere_BB
				}
			}

				transfer_state_to = RUS
				add_claim_by = RUS
				enable_state_integration_80_compliance = yes
			}
			722 = { transfer_state_to = FIN }
		}

		}
	}

		trigger = {

country_event = { #Karelian crisis
	id = rus_karelian_crisis.27
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rus_karelian_crisis.27" }
	immediate = { 
		hidden_effect = { 
			FIN = { 
				remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = FIN_request_german_mediation }
			}
		}
	}
	title = rus_karelian_crisis.27.t
	desc = rus_karelian_crisis.27.d
			
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes 
	trigger = {
		has_global_flag = RUS_Karelian_Crisis_global
		russian_civil_war = no
		FIN = {
			is_valid_peace_target = yes
			has_war_with = RUS
		}
		RUS = { is_valid_peace_target = yes }
		OR = {
			#Finland loses
			OR = {
				surrender_progress > 0.2
				RUS = {
					count_triggers = {
						amount = 3
						controls_state = 1324
						controls_state = 146
						controls_state = 1326
						controls_state = 147
						controls_state = 1325
					}	
				}
			}
			#Finland wins
			OR = {
				AND = {
					RUS = { surrender_progress > 0.1 }
					controls_state = 195 #Petrograd
				}
				count_triggers = {
					amount = 3
					controls_state = 1328
					controls_state = 1327
					controls_state = 215
					controls_state = 216
					controls_state = 1274
					controls_state = 213
					controls_state = 195
					controls_state = 722
				}
			}
		}
	}

	option = { #
		name = rus_karelian_crisis.27.a
		trigger = { original_tag = FIN }
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					#Finland loses
					OR = {
						surrender_progress > 0.2
						RUS = {
							count_triggers = {
								amount = 3
								controls_state = 1324
								controls_state = 146
								controls_state = 1326
								controls_state = 147
								controls_state = 1325
							}	
						}
					}
				}				
				if = {
					limit = { 
						RUS = { controls_state = 1324 }
					}
					1324 = { 
						transfer_state_to = RUS 
						add_claim_by = RUS
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { 
						RUS = { controls_state = 1325 }
					}
					1325 = { 
						transfer_state_to = RUS 
						add_claim_by = RUS
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { 
						RUS = { controls_state = 1326 }
					}
					1326 = { 
						transfer_state_to = RUS 
						add_claim_by = RUS
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { 
						RUS = { controls_state = 147 }
					}
					147 = { 
						transfer_state_to = RUS 
						add_claim_by = RUS
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { 
						RUS = { controls_state = 146 }
					}
					146 = { 
						transfer_state_to = RUS 
						add_claim_by = RUS
					}
					1326 = { 
						transfer_state_to = RUS 
						add_claim_by = RUS
					}
				}
				FIN = { 
					if = {
						limit = { has_government = social_democrat }
						add_popularity = { ideology = social_democrat popularity = -0.15 }
						add_to_variable = { FIN_sdp_strength = -15 }
					}
					else = {
						add_to_variable = { FIN_kokoomus_strength = -15 }
					}
					#country_event = rus_karelian_crisis.29 
					#country_event = rus_karelian_crisis.30 
					#country_event = rus_karelian_crisis.31 
					#country_event = rus_karelian_crisis.32 
				}
			}	
			else = {
				every_state = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							state = 722
							state = 215
							state = 216
							state = 1327
							state = 1328
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = { 
							FIN = { controls_state = PREV }
						}
						transfer_state_to = FIN
					}
				}				
			}
		}				
		RUS = { 
			white_peace_with_ROOT = yes 
			set_truce = { target = ROOT days = 730 }
		}
	}
	option = { #
		name = rus_karelian_crisis.27.a
		trigger = { original_tag = RUS }
		effect_tooltip = {
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						state = 722
						state = 215
						state = 216
						state = 1327
						state = 1328
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { 
						is_owned_by = RUS 
						is_controlled_by = FIN
					}
					transfer_state_to = FIN
				}
			}		
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						state = 1324
						state = 1325
						state = 146
						state = 1326
						state = 147
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { 
						is_owned_by = FIN 
						is_controlled_by = RUS
					}
					transfer_state_to = RUS
					add_claim_by = RUS
				}
			}		
			FIN = { 
				white_peace_with_ROOT = yes 
				set_truce = { target = ROOT days = 730 }
			}
		}
	}
}

	option = { #
		name = rus_karelian_crisis.28.a
		ai_chance = { 
			base = 99
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					RUS_dont_attack_if_vulnerable_or_preparing = yes
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_target_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_faction_is_stronger = yes }
					FROM = { RUS_dont_attack_if_overlord_is_stronger = yes }
				}
			}
		}
		add_stability = -0.05
		RUS_increase_ruling_party_pop_small = yes
		declare_war_on = {
			target = FROM
			type = annex_everything
		}
	}
	option = { #
		name = rus_karelian_crisis.28.b
		ai_chance = { base = 1 }
		add_political_power = 15
	}	
}
