country_event = { #Karelian crisis
	id = rus_karelian_crisis.32
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rus_karelian_crisis.32" }
	title = {
		text = rus_karelian_crisis.32.t2
		trigger = { has_government = national_populist }
	}
	title = {
		text = rus_karelian_crisis.32.t
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { has_government = national_populist }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rus_karelian_crisis.32.d2
		trigger = { has_government = national_populist }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rus_karelian_crisis.32.d
		trigger = { 
			NOT = { has_government = national_populist }
		}
	}
	
	is_triggered_only = yes	
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	trigger = {
		tag = FIN
		OR = {
			AND = {
				has_country_flag = FIN_lapua_movement_victory
				NOT = { has_completed_focus = FIN_crack_down_on_socialism }
			}
			AND = {
				has_government = totalist
				NOT = { has_completed_focus = FIN_second_red_terror }
			}
		}
	}

	option = { #
		name = rus_karelian_crisis.30.a
		decrease_ruling_party_popularity_by_20 = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = FIN_lapua_movement_victory }
			clr_country_flag = FIN_lapua_movement_victory
			set_country_flag = FIN_socialist_victory_flag
			add_political_power = -100			
			add_popularity = { ideology = totalist popularity = 0.35 }
			set_politics = { ruling_party = totalist elections_allowed = no }
			drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
			remove_all_ministers = yes
			add_ideas = {
				FIN_Tuomas_Hyrskymurto_hog_tot
				FIN_Arvo_Tuominen_for_tot
				FIN_Eero_Haapalainen_eco_tot
				FIN_Akseli_Anttila_sec_tot
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				if = {
					limit = { country_exists = KAR }
					KAR = {
						country_event = {
							id = kar.26
							days = 1
						}
						country_event = {
							id = kar.72
							days = 60
							random_days = 40
						}
					}
				}
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = INT decision = fin_join_internationale }
				activate_targeted_decision = { target = RUS decision = fin_join_internationale }
			}
		}
		else = {
			clr_country_flag = FIN_socialist_victory_flag
			remove_targeted_decision = { target = INT decision = fin_join_internationale }
			remove_targeted_decision = { target = RUS decision = fin_join_internationale }			
			set_country_flag = FIN_lapua_movement_victory
			add_popularity = { ideology = national_populist popularity = 0.4 }
			set_politics = { ruling_party = national_populist elections_allowed = no }
			drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
			remove_all_ministers = yes
			add_ideas = {
				FIN_Bruno_Salmiala_hog_npo
				FIN_Arne_Somersalo_for_npo
				FIN_Jussi_Muilu_eco_npo
				FIN_Vihtori_Kosola_sec_npo
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = { id = finland.14 days = 6 }
			}
		}		
		effect_tooltip = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 311 }
				remove_unit_leader = yes
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 311 }
				set_nationality = NSW
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = FIN_mounting_dissent_idea }
			remove_ideas = FIN_mounting_dissent_idea
		}
		if = {
			limit = { gives_military_access_to = GER }
			GER = {
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = FIN
					relation = military_access
					active = no
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_military_access_to = GER }
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = GER
				relation = military_access
				active = no
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { is_guaranteed_by = GER }
			GER = {
				diplomatic_relation = {
					country = FIN
					relation = guarantee
					active = no
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = GER }
			diplomatic_relation = {
				country = GER
				relation = non_aggression_pact
				active = no
			}
		}
		remove_opinion_modifier = {
			target = GER
			modifier = KR_approves_of_govt
		}
		GER = {
			remove_opinion_modifier = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = KR_approves_of_govt
			}
		}
		remove_targeted_decision = { target = GER decision = FIN_join_reichspakt }
		remove_targeted_decision = { target = SCA decision = fin_join_sdu }
		remove_targeted_decision = { target = SWE decision = fin_join_sdu }
		hidden_effect = {
			GER_leave_mitteleuropa = yes
			leave_faction = yes
			drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
			random_other_country = { news_event = worldnews.415 }
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Juho Kusti Paasikivi"
				desc = "POLITICS_JUHO_KUSTI_PAASIKIVI_DESC"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/FIN/Portrait_FIN_Juho_Kusti_Paasikivi_KX.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = pataut_national_conservative_subtype
			}
		}
	}	
}

country_event = { #Kornilov coup
	id = rusd.3036
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3036"}
	title = rusd.3036.t 
	desc = rusd.3036.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kutepov
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3036.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_elections = yes
					NOT = { has_government = paternal_autocrat }
				}
			}
			set_politics = { ruling_party = paternal_autocrat elections_allowed = no }			
		}
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Aleksandr Kutepov"
			desc = "POLITICS_ALEKSANDR_KUTEPOV_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Aleksander_Kutepov.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = junta_subtype
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 411 }
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_trait = politically_connected }
				}
				add_unit_leader_trait = politically_connected
			}
			promote_to_marshal = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				check_variable = { RUS_rev_ferment > 50 }
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3043
				days = 2
			}
		}
		else = {
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3044
				days = 2
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Kornilov coup
	id = rusd.3041
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3041"}
	title = rusd.3041.t 
	desc = rusd.3041.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_Savinkov_rally
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3041.a
		remove_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance }
		set_politics = { ruling_party = national_populist }
		remove_all_ministers = yes
		add_ideas = {
			RUS_Boris_V_Savinkov_hog_npo
			RUS_Aleksandr_Dikgof_Derental_for_npo
			RUS_Aleksandr_Antonov_eco_npo
			RUS_Emma_Dikgof_Derental_sec_npo
		}
		set_cosmetic_tag = RUS_vozhdct
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Boris Savinkov"
			desc = "POLITICS_BORIS_SAVINKOV_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Boris_Savinkov_President.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = savinkovism_subtype
			traits = { vozhd }
		}		
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_half_of_rovs_pop_to_nrpr
		hidden_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = 2 }
			
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_natpop = RUS.party_popularity_100@national_populist }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_natpop = RUS_new_pataut }

			set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_natpop }

			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_natpop = sum } #avoid rounding errors

			set_popularities = {
				totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
				syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
				radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
				social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
				social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
				market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
				social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
				authoritarian_democrat = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat
				paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
				national_populist = RUS_new_natpop
			}
			
			if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_Pyetr_N_Vrangel_cos_ade }
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Pyotr Wrangel"
					desc = "POLITICS_PYOTR_WRANGEL_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Pyotr_Wrangel.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = RUS_Anton_I_Denikin_cos_ade }
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Anton Denikin"
					desc = "POLITICS_ANTON_DENIKIN_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Anton_Denikin.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}	
			}
			else = {
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Abram Dragomirov"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Abram_Dragomirov.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}	
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
			set_country_flag = disable_duma
			set_country_flag = make_savinkov_tree_visible
			mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.60
				days = 5
			}
			random_other_country = {
				news_event = {
					id = russianews.1
					days = 1
				}
			}
		} 
	}		
}

			limit = { has_country_flag = VNS_aristocratic }
			set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat elections_allowed = yes }
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
		}
		else = {
			set_politics = { ruling_party = social_conservative elections_allowed = yes }
			add_authdem_to_coalition = yes
		}
		RUS_setup_vns_government = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_half_of_rovs_pop_to_natcenter
		hidden_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = 2 }
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut_to_divide = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut_to_divide = 6 }

			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = RUS.party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = RUS_new_pataut_to_divide }
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS.party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS_new_pataut_to_divide }
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_marlib = RUS.party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_marlib = RUS_new_pataut_to_divide }

			set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_marlib }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_soccon }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = sum } #avoid rounding errors

			set_popularities = {
				totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
				syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
				radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
				social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
				social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
				market_liberal = RUS_new_marlib
				social_conservative = RUS_new_soccon
				authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
				paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
				national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
			}
			
			mp_support_calc = yes
			senators_support_calc = yes
			mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
			
			clr_country_flag = RUS_death_penalty_restored
			clr_country_flag = RUS_savinkov_governor
			
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { has_state_flag = RUS_increased_military_presence }
				clr_state_flag = RUS_increased_military_presence
			}
		}		
	}

	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3051"}
	title = rusd.3051.t 
	desc = rusd.3051.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_UKR_skoropadsky_2
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3051.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_WRANGEL_SUPREME_RULER }
					has_country_flag = RUS_wrangel_supreme_ruler_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_wrangel_change = 1 }
		RUS_change_wrangels_ambitions = yes
		RUS_bop_increase_monarchists_small = yes
		hidden_effect = {
			country_event = { id = rusd.3083 days = 50 random_days = 70 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3051.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_WRANGEL_TSAR }					
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_ABSOLUTE_MONARCHY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_CLERICS }
					has_country_flag = RUS_wrangel_tsar_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_blackhundred_ai
					has_country_flag = RUS_clerics_ai
				}
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { RUS_wrangel_change = -1 }
		RUS_change_wrangels_ambitions = yes
		RUS_bop_increase_republicans_small = yes
	}
}

		}
	}

country_event = { #Kornilov coup
	id = rusd.3054
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3054"}
	title = rusd.3054.t 
	desc = rusd.3054.d
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen }
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3054.a
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = Kirill_Romanov_dead }
			TRM = {
				NOT = {
					has_country_leader = {
						ruling_only = yes
						name = "Kirill I"
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_DMITRIY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_ANDREI }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_MIKHAIL }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_ROMAN }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_VSEVOLOD }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_WRANGEL_TSAR }
					has_country_flag = RUS_wrangel_tsar_ai
				}
			}
		}
		RUS_bop_increase_monarchists_large = yes
		RUS_increase_monarchists_pop = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen
		set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_KIR
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_TSAR_KIR_TT	
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3054.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = Dmitri_Pavlovich_Romanov_dead }
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_KIRILL }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_ANDREI }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_MIKHAIL }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_ROMAN }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_VSEVOLOD }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_WRANGEL_TSAR }
					has_country_flag = RUS_wrangel_tsar_ai
				}
			}
		}
		RUS_bop_increase_monarchists = yes
		RUS_increase_vns_pop_large = yes
		RUS_increase_monarchists_pop_small = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen
		set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_DMI
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_TSAR_DMI_TT
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3054.c		
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_DMITRIY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_ANDREI }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_MIKHAIL }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_KIRILL }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_VSEVOLOD }
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {

					has_country_flag = RUS_wrangel_tsar_ai
				}
			}
		}
		RUS_bop_increase_monarchists_large = yes
		RUS_increase_rovs_pop_small = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen
		set_country_flag = RUS_TSAR_ROMAN
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_TSAR_ROMAN_TT
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3054.e	
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_DMITRIY }
					has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_Monarch option = RUS_MONARCH_TSAR_KIRILL }

			}
		}

unit_leader_event = { #Kornilov coup
	id = rusd.3059
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3059"}
	title = rusd.3059.t 
	desc = rusd.3059.d
	
	is_triggered_only = yes
	trigger = {
		is_power_balance_in_range = {
			id = RUS_rovs_balance
			range > RUS_rovs_monarchist_side_1
		}
		has_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance }
		has_country_flag = RUS_activate_republican_officer_retire
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3059.a
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_general_retire_once_in_a_row }
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_general_retire_once_in_a_row
		set_country_flag = RUS_general_retire_once_in_a_row
		RUS_bop_increase_republicans_small = yes
		add_command_power = 5
		hidden_effect = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { 
					RUS_is_irrelevant_republican_officer = yes
				}
				unit_leader_event = {
					id = rusd.3059
					days = 120
					random_days = 30
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3059.b
		clr_country_flag = RUS_general_retire_once_in_a_row
		add_command_power = -5
		RUS_decrease_rovs_pop_small = yes
		THIS = { retire = yes }
		hidden_effect = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { 
					RUS_is_irrelevant_republican_officer = yes
				}
				unit_leader_event = {
					id = rusd.3059
					days = 120
					random_days = 30
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Kornilov coup
	id = rusd.3090
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3090"}
	title = rusd.3090.t 
	desc = rusd.3090.d
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_kornilov_troops
	
	trigger = {
		RUS = { RUS_kornilov_in_power = yes  }
		country_exists = TRM
		TRM = {
			TRM_kolchak_in_power = yes
			NOT = { has_war_with = ROOT }
			is_valid_peace_target = yes
		}
	}
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3090.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
		add_stability = 0.1
		every_owned_state = {
			TRM_Decrease_NRA_Resistance = yes
			TRM_Increase_Kolchak_Support = yes
		}
		TRM_clamp_spheres_of_influence = yes
		TRM_recalculate_kolchak_variables = yes
		FROM = { 
			add_collaboration = {
				target = ROOT
				value = 0.05
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3092
				days = 7
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3090.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
		}
		add_political_power = 50
		add_stability = -0.05
		FROM = { 
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3091
				days = 3
			}
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Kornilov coup
	id = rusd.3092
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3092"}
	title = rusd.3092.t 
	desc = rusd.3092.d
	
	fire_only_once = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	picture = GFX_report_event_DKB_kolchak
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3092.a		
		set_country_flag = RUS_TRM_peaceful_integration
		set_country_flag = TRM_integration_with_russia	
		set_country_flag = RUS_TRM_save_generals
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = rus_divided_marine }
			remove_ideas = rus_divided_marine
		}
		FROM = {
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = TRM_admiral_kolchak_trait }
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea_with_trait = chief_of_navy }
			remove_ideas_with_trait = chief_of_navy
		}
		add_ideas = TRM_Aleksandr_Kolchak_cnav_pau
		# annex transbaikal puppet
		if = {
			limit = {
				TRB = { 
					exists = yes 
					is_subject_of = TRM
				}
			}
			TRM = { annex_country = { target = TRB } }
		}
		# give transbaikal and yakutia to Russia
		FROM = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = { 
					NOT = {
						region = 247
						region = 148
						state = 537
					}
				}
				add_claim_by = ROOT
				transfer_state_to = ROOT
			}
		}
		# become transitional autonomy
		FROM = { get_current_government_type = yes }
		set_autonomy = {
			target = FROM
			autonomy_state = kr_autonomy_russian_general_governorate
		}
		FROM = {
			restore_previous_government_type = yes
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Viktor Pepelyaev"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/TRM/Portrait_TRM_Victor_Pepelyaev.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = pataut_authoritarian_liberalism_subtype
			}
			drop_cosmetic_tag = yes
			remove_ideas = TRM_dream
			disband_one_to_three_divisions = yes
			reduce_conscription_to_disarmed = yes
			add_timed_idea = {
				idea = TRM_integration_of_economy
				days = 180
			}
			add_timed_idea = { idea = TRM_integration_of_army days = 90 }
			if = {
				limit = { 
					408 = {
						has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = TRM_japanese_vladivostok_modifier }
					}
				}
				408 = { set_demilitarized_zone = yes }
			}
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Veteranskaya Diviziya"
				disband = yes
			}
			delete_unit_template_and_units = {
				division_template = "Chekhoslovatskiy Korpus"
				disband = yes
			}
			# Diterikhs
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505058 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Kappel
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 404 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Smolin
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505053 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Khanzhin
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 50004 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Berens
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_trait = air_controller }
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Bogoslovsky
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505078 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Pepelyaev
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505060 }
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			# Voitsekhovsky
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 505059 }
				demote_if_marshal = yes
				set_nationality = ROOT
			}
			every_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_unit_leader_flag = CAN_TRM_expedition_leader }
				set_nationality = CAN
				add_unit_leader_trait = GBR_british_exile_trait
				remove_unit_leader_trait = TRM_british_expeditionary
			}
			random_unit_leader = { 
				limit = { has_id = 1514 }
				set_nationality = JAP
			}
		}
		RUS_increase_rovs_pop = yes
		add_war_support = 0.03
		hidden_effect = {
			RUS_Aleksandr_Andogsky = { set_nationality = ROOT }
			FROM = {
				random_unit_leader = { 
					limit = { has_id = 243910 }
					set_nationality = TRB
				}
			}
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1491 days = 10 }
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1492 days = 30 }
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1493 days = 20 }
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1494 days = 45 }
			country_event = { id = rusfor.1495 days = 15 }
			complete_national_focus = RUS_Treaty_With_Admiral
			clr_country_flag = Aleksandr_Kolchak_dead
		}
	}

				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rsdrp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_temp_pop = -0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = -0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vns_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ep_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nrpr_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsnp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_independent_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			}
		}	
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { 
					state = 219 
					has_state_flag = RUS_increased_military_presence
				}
				region = 133
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_increase_rovs_pop_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = 0.05 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rsdrp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_temp_pop = -0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = -0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vns_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ep_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nrpr_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsnp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_independent_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			}
		}	
		random_owned_controlled_state = {

				}
				region = 133

	title = rusd.3114.t 
	desc = rusd.3114.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_trade_unions
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3114.a		
		country_event = { id = rusd.3115 days = 10 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_idea = RUS_general_strike_big
					has_country_flag = RUS_had_general_strike_big
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.13
				days = 4
			}
		}
		else = {
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_rev_ferment_change = 15 }
			RUS_change_rev_ferment = yes
		}
	}
}

	is_triggered_only = yes

		RUS_change_rev_ferment = yes
		set_country_flag = rsdrp_banned
		RUS_decrease_rsdrp_pop = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_rsdrp_is_radsoc
		hidden_effect = {			
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = psr_banned } }
				set_party_name = { 
					ideology = social_democrat
					name = RUS_social_liberal_party
					long_name = RUS_social_liberal_party_long
				}
			}
			else = {
				set_party_name = { 
					ideology = social_democrat
					name = RUS_rrdp_party
					long_name = RUS_rrdp_party_long
				}
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Nikolay Nekrasov"
					desc = "POLITICS_NIKOLAY_NEKRASOV_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Nikolay_Nekrasov.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = social_democrat_subtype
				}
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { Duma_Party_Seats^17 = Duma_Party_Seats^4 }
		set_variable = { Duma_Party_Seats^4 = 0 }
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_General_Seats^17 = Senate_Party_General_Seats^4 }
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_General_Seats^4 = 0 }
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_Regional_Seats^17 = Senate_Party_Regional_Seats^4 }
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_Regional_Seats^4 = 0 }
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^17 = Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^4 }
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_Presidential_Seats^4 = 0 }
		add_to_variable = { Senate_Party_Total_Seats^17 = Senate_Party_Total_Seats^4 }
		set_variable = { Senate_Party_Total_Seats^4 = 0 }		
		mp_support_calc = yes 
		senators_support_calc = yes	
		RUS_Get_Lower_House_Array = yes
		RUS_Get_Senate_Elections_Array = yes
	}
}

		trigger = {
			OR = {
				RUS_denikin_in_power = yes
				RUS_wrangel_tree_unlocked = yes
				RUS_levitov_in_power = yes
				RUS_drozdovites_in_power = yes
				RUS_boldyrev_in_power = yes
				RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes
				has_authoritarian_government = yes
				has_right_democratic_government = yes
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = RUS_ilyin_leader
		clr_country_flag = RUS_levitov_leader
		clr_country_flag = RUS_arkhangelsky_leader
		if = {
			limit = { has_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance } }
			remove_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { RUS_savinkov_in_power = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					RRF = { has_unit_leader = 15016 }
				}
				RRF = {
					random_unit_leader = {
						limit = { has_id = 15016 }
						set_nationality = ROOT
						promote_to_marshal = yes
					}					
				}
			}
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 15016 }
				promote_to_marshal = yes
			}
			create_country_leader = {
				name = "Karl Goppers"
				picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_LAT_Karlis_Goppers.png"
				expire = "1.1.1"
				ideology = junta_subtype
			}
			add_pataut_to_coalition = yes
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = paternal_autocrat
				name = RUS_army_party
				long_name = RUS_army_party_long
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { RUS_denikin_in_power = yes }			
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = paternal_autocrat
				name = RUS_denikin_party
				long_name = RUS_denikin_party_long
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_rovs_is_sd
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { RUS_wrangel_tree_unlocked = yes }
			add_political_power = 30
			set_country_flag = RUS_rovs_black_baron
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { RUS_levitov_in_power = yes }			
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = paternal_autocrat
				name = RUS_army_party
				long_name = RUS_army_party_long
			}
			set_country_flag = rovs_banned
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					RUS_drozdovites_in_power = no
					RUS_boldyrev_in_power = no
					NOT = { has_government = paternal_autocrat }
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { 
						has_country_flag = RUS_monarchy_restored 
						has_country_flag = rnsma_evolves
						RUS_drozdovites_in_power = yes
					}
				}
				set_party_name = {
					ideology = paternal_autocrat
					name = RUS_army_party
					long_name = RUS_army_party_long
				}
			}
			set_country_flag = rovs_banned
			set_country_flag = RUS_rovs_dissolved
		}
		RUS_decrease_rovs_pop = yes
	}
}

country_event = { #Kornilov coup
	id = rusd.3131
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3131"}
	title = rusd.3131.t 
	desc = rusd.3131.d
	
	hidden = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	trigger = {
		OR = {
			has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_1
			has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_2
			has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_3
			has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_angry_1
			has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_angry_2
			has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_angry_3
			has_idea = RUS_furious_democratic_opposition
		}
	}
	
	option = {
		if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_angry_3 
					has_idea = RUS_furious_democratic_opposition 
				}
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = 0.05 }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_angry_2 }
			every_owned_state = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = 0.04 }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { 
				OR = {
					has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_angry_1 
					has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_1 
				}
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = 0.03 }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_democratic_opposition_2 }
			every_owned_state = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_lkdp_temp_pop = 0.01 }
			}
		}
		every_owned_state = {
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_plsr_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rsdrp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_psr_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vns_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ep_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ndm_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nrpr_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_nsnp_temp_pop = -0.01 }
			add_to_variable = { RUS_state_independent_temp_pop = -0.01 }
		}
		country_event = { id = rusd.3131 days = 90 random_days = 30 }
	}
}

		}
	}

country_event = { 
	id = rusd.3356
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3356"}
	title = rusd.3356.t 
	desc = rusd.3356.d
	
	picture = GFX_rus_droz1_event
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3356.a
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_DROZDOVSKY_ALONE }
			}
		}
		RUS_drozd_absolutist_state = yes
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = national_populist
			name = RUS_rons_party
			long_name = RUS_rons_party_long
		}
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = paternal_autocrat
			name = RUS_rons_party
			long_name = RUS_rons_party_long
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_rons_popularity
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Mikhail Drozdovsky"
			desc = "POLITICS_MIKHAIL_DROZDOVSKY_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Mikhail_Drozdovsky.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = militarism_subtype
			traits = { RUS_supreme_ruler }
		}
		set_politics = { ruling_party = national_populist }
		add_pataut_to_coalition = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchists_rons
		hidden_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
			divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = 2 }

			set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_natpop = RUS.party_popularity_100@national_populist }
			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_natpop = RUS_new_pataut }

			set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_natpop }

			add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_natpop = sum } #avoid rounding errors

			set_popularities = {
				totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
				syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
				radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
				social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
				social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
				market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
				social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
				authoritarian_democrat = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat
				paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
				national_populist = RUS_new_natpop
			}
		}
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_drozd_ally_vns }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = TRM decision = RUS_drozd_ally_vonsyatsky }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = TRM decision = RUS_drozd_ally_diterikhs }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_drozd_ally_black_hundred }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_drozd_ally_nsnp }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = DKB decision = RUS_drozd_ally_brp }
		activate_mission = RUS_drozd_zemsky_sobor
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { 
					NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen }
				}
			}
			country_event = { id = rusd.3376 days = 14 }
			country_event = { id = rusd.3357 days = 3 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3356.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_DROZDOVSKY_MONARCHY }
			}
		}
		RUS_drozd_officer_state = yes
		add_stability = -0.05
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = national_populist
			name = RUS_rons_party
			long_name = RUS_rons_party_long
		}
		create_country_leader = {
			name = "Mikhail Drozdovsky"
			desc = "POLITICS_MIKHAIL_DROZDOVSKY_DESC"
			picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Mikhail_Drozdovsky.png"
			expire = "1.1.1"
			ideology = militarism_subtype
			traits = { RUS_supreme_ruler }
		}
		RUS_increase_ruling_party_pop = yes
		add_natpop_to_coalition = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchists_rons
		custom_effect_tooltip = RUS_rnsuv_pataut
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_drozd_ally_vns }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = TRM decision = RUS_drozd_ally_vonsyatsky }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = TRM decision = RUS_drozd_ally_diterikhs }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_drozd_ally_black_hundred }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_drozd_ally_nsnp }
		activate_targeted_decision = { target = DKB decision = RUS_drozd_ally_brp }
		activate_mission = RUS_drozd_zemsky_sobor
		hidden_effect = {

country_event = { 
	id = rusd.3374
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3374"}
	title = rusd.3374.t 
	desc = rusd.3374.d
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_TRM_zemsky_sobor
	is_triggered_only = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3374.a
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi > RUS_monarch_romanovs }
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi > RUS_monarch_senators }
				}
				AND = {
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_senators > RUS_monarch_romanovs }
					check_variable = { RUS_monarch_senators > RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi }
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_senators < RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi }
			}
			RUS_setup_tsar_vladimir = yes
		}
		else = {
			RUS_setup_tsar_dmitriy = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_government = national_populist }
			set_country_leader_ideology = militarism_subtype		
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		add_ideas = RUS_Mikhail_Drozdovsky_hog_pau
		unlock_national_focus = RUS_Crown_And_Sword
		set_cosmetic_tag = RTS
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchy
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchy_restored
		hidden_effect = {
			news_event = { id = russianews.8 days = 1 }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3374.b
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_romanovs > RUS_monarch_senators }
				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_romanovs = RUS_monarch_senators }
			}
			OR = {
				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_romanovs > RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi }
				check_variable = { RUS_monarch_romanovs = RUS_monarch_vladimirovichi }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen
		RUS_setup_tsar_roman = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_government = national_populist }
			set_country_leader_ideology = militarism_subtype		
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		add_ideas = RUS_Mikhail_Drozdovsky_hog_pau
		unlock_national_focus = RUS_Crown_And_Sword
		set_cosmetic_tag = RTS
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchy
		set_country_flag = RUS_monarchy_restored
		hidden_effect = {
			news_event = { id = russianews.8 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

country_event = { #Tsar Nicholas II and his family are canonized
	id = rusd.3391
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3391"}
	title = rusd.3391.t 
	desc = rusd.3391.d 
	
	picture = GFX_rus_droz8_event
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	trigger = { 
		original_tag = RUS
		has_socialist_government = no
		has_left_democratic_government = no
		NOT = {
			has_country_leader = {
				name = "Anastasia I"
				ruling_only = yes
			}
			has_country_leader = {
				name = "Nicholas II"
				ruling_only = yes

					days = 20
				}
				country_event = { #nsnp primaries
					id = rusdem.58
					days = 23
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem }
				set_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem
				set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat }

					set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS.party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
					add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS_new_pataut }

					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

					add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

					set_popularities = {
						totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
						syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
						radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
						social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
						social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
						market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
						social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
						authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
						paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
						national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
					}
				}
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				country_event = rusdem.62
			}
		}

	}

		trigger = { has_idea = RUS_Pavel_N_Milyukov_hog_sli }
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.3210.d2
		trigger = { NOT = { has_idea = RUS_Pavel_N_Milyukov_hog_sli } }
	}
	
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_denikin4
	is_triggered_only = yes

		name = rusd.3210.a
		set_country_flag = rus_president_elections_1936_over
		hidden_effect = { 
			remove_add_presidential_senators = yes 
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_LAW_IMPEACH_PRESIDENT_initialize }
			activate_targeted_decision = { target = ROOT decision = RUS_allow_socialist_parties }
		}
		RUS_remove_democratic_opposition = yes
		custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_Pavel_N_Milyukov_hog_sli }
			set_country_flag = RUS_marlibs_vps
			clr_country_flag = rkdp_banned
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = market_liberal
				name = RUS_vps_party
				long_name = RUS_vps_party_long
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = social_conservative
				name = RUS_vps_party
				long_name = RUS_vps_party_long
			}
			set_country_flag = VNS_aristocratic
			clr_country_flag = rkdp_banned
			set_politics = { ruling_party = market_liberal elections_allowed = no }
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_marlib = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_marlib = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat  }

				set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_marlib }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_marlib = sum } #avoid rounding errors

				set_popularities = {
					totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
					syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
					radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
					social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
					social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
					market_liberal = RUS_new_marlib
					social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
					authoritarian_democrat = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat
					paternal_autocrat = 0
					national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
				}
				
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_marlib = RUS.party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
				divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_marlib = 2 }

				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = RUS.party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = RUS_new_marlib }

				set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_marlib }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_soccon }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_soccon = sum } #avoid rounding errors

				set_popularities = {
					totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
					syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
					radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
					social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
					social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
					market_liberal = RUS_new_marlib
					social_conservative = RUS_new_soccon
					authoritarian_democrat = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat
					paternal_autocrat = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat
					national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = authoritarian_democrat
				name = RUS_vps_party
				long_name = RUS_vps_party_long
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = social_conservative
				name = RUS_vps_party
				long_name = RUS_vps_party_long
			}
			set_country_flag = RUS_authdems_vps
			clr_country_flag = VNS_aristocratic
			set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat elections_allowed = no }
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat}
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat  }

				set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

				set_popularities = {
					totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
					syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
					radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
					social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
					social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
					market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
					social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
					authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
					paternal_autocrat = 0
					national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_osvag_idea }
			remove_ideas = RUS_osvag_idea
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance } }
			remove_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_rovs_is_sd } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_ilyin_leader }
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Ivan Ilyin"
					desc = "POLITICS_IVAN_ILYIN_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Ivan_Ilyin.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = pataut_national_conservative_subtype
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_levitov_leader }
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Mikhail Levitov"
					desc = "POLITICS_MIKHAIL_LEVITOV_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Mikhail_Levitov.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_arkhangelsky_leader }
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Aleksey Arkhangelsky"
					desc = "POLITICS_ALEKSEY_ARKHANGELSKY_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Aleksey_Arkhangelsky_military.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}
			}
			else = {
				create_country_leader = {
					name = "Ivan Romanovsky"
					desc = "POLITICS_IVAN_ROMANOVSKIY_DESC"
					picture = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Ivan_Romanovsky.png"
					expire = "1.1.1"
					ideology = junta_subtype
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_pp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rkdp_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_vns_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_temp_pop = 0.02 }
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_ep_temp_pop = 0.02 }

				country_event = { #vns primaries
					id = rusdem.56
					days = 20
				}
				country_event = { #nsnp primaries
					id = rusdem.58
					days = 23
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
			RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
			random_unit_leader = {
				limit = { has_id = 401 }
				remove_unit_leader_trait = politically_connected
			}
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				country_event = rusdem.62
			}
		}
	}

	}

			retire = yes
		}

			limit = { has_id = 411 }
			retire = yes
		}
		every_unit_leader = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_id = 496
					has_id = 411
				}

			}
			remove_unit_leader_trait = RUS_drozdovsky_officer
			add_unit_leader_trait = RUS_wrangel_officer
		}
		RUS_decrease_monarchists_pop = yes
	}
}

country_event = { 
	id = rusd.3251
	immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3251"}
	title = rusd.3251.t 
	desc = rusd.3251.d
		
	is_triggered_only = yes	
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3251.c
		ai_chance = { base = 0 }
		add_stability = -0.1
		add_war_support = -0.2
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3251.b	
		effect_tooltip = { retire_country_leader = yes }		
		clr_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_empowered_president }
			RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_six_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 125 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				set_country_flag = RUS_president_elections_campaign
				RUS_calculate_polling_presidential_averages = yes
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_president_mission
				country_event = { #rsdrp primaries
					id = rusdem.53
					days = 7
				}
				country_event = { #psr primaries
					id = rusdem.54
					days = 10
				}
				country_event = { #kdp primaries
					id = rusdem.55
					days = 14
				}
				country_event = { #rkdp primaries
					id = rusdem.5501
					days = 17
				}
				country_event = { #vns primaries
					id = rusdem.56
					days = 20
				}
				country_event = { #nsnp primaries
					id = rusdem.58
					days = 23
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem }
				set_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem
				set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat }
				add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
				custom_effect_tooltip = authdem_authdem_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt
				set_country_leader_ideology = authdem_national_conservative_subtype
				hidden_effect = {
					set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
					divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = 2 }
					
					set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS.party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
					add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS_new_pataut }

					set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

					add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

					set_popularities = {
						totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
						syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
						radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
						social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
						social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
						market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
						social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
						authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
						paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
						national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
					}
				}
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				country_event = rusdem.62
			}
		}
		mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3251.a
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { RUS_rovs_wrangel > 9 }
			has_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance }
		}
		effect_tooltip = { retire_country_leader = yes }
		RUS_setup_russian_monarch = yes
		set_country_flag = psr_banned
		set_country_flag = rsdrp_banned
		set_country_flag = nsp_banned
		set_country_flag = bolsheviks_banned
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem }
			set_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem
			set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat }
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
			custom_effect_tooltip = authdem_authdem_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt
			set_country_leader_ideology = authdem_national_conservative_subtype
			hidden_effect = {
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
				divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = 2 }
				
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS.party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS_new_pataut }

				set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

				set_popularities = {
					totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
					syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
					radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
					social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
					social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
					market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
					social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
					authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
					paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
					national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
				}
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
		custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
		hidden_effect = {			
			RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
			RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
			set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
			activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
			country_event = rusdem.62
		}
		mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
	}

	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.3320.d2
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen }
			check_variable = { RUS_rovs_wrangel > 10 }
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.3320.d3
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen }
			check_variable = { RUS_rovs_wrangel < 11 }
		}
	}

		}

			limit = {
				NOT = { has_idea = RUS_Pyetr_N_Vrangel_hog_pau }
			}

			add_ideas = RUS_Pyetr_N_Vrangel_hog_pau
		}
		add_stability = 0.12
		RUS_increase_rkdp_pop_large = yes
		RUS_increase_vns_pop_large = yes
		RUS_increase_monarchists_pop = yes
		set_country_flag = RUS_rovs_is_rms
		set_party_name = {
			ideology = paternal_autocrat
			long_name = RUS_tsar_party_long2
			name = RUS_tsar_party
		}
		set_country_leader_ideology = pataut_national_conservative_subtype
		custom_effect_tooltip = pataut_pataut_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt

			set_country_flag = rsdrp_banned
			clr_country_flag = monarchists_banned
			hidden_effect = {
				every_owned_state = {
					add_to_variable = { RUS_state_monarchists_popularity = RUS_state_rovs_popularity }
					set_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_popularity = 0 }
				}
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3322 
				days = 21 
				random_days = 14
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3320.b
		trigger = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = RUS_monarchist_heir_chosen }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { RUS_rovs_wrangel > 10 }
				AND = {
					is_ai = yes
					OR = {
						has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_WRANGEL_TSAR }
						has_country_flag = RUS_wrangel_tsar_ai
					}
				}
			}
		}
		remove_power_balance = { id = RUS_rovs_balance }

		RUS_decrease_rkdp_pop_large = yes
		RUS_increase_vns_pop = yes

			portrait = "gfx/leaders/RUS/Portrait_RUS_Pyotr_Wrangel_Tsar.png"
		}
		add_country_leader_trait = RUS_tsar_of_all_russia
		remove_country_leader_trait = RUS_supreme_ruler
		set_country_leader_ideology = pataut_bonapartism_subtype
		custom_effect_tooltip = pataut_pataut_bonapartism_subtype_swap_tt
		country_event = { id = rusd.153 days = 7 }

				limit = { has_id = 400 }
				set_leader_name = "Pyotr IV "
				set_leader_portrait = GFX_decision_Pyotr_portrait
			}

			clr_country_flag = monarchists_banned
			every_owned_state = {
				add_to_variable = { RUS_state_monarchists_popularity = RUS_state_rovs_popularity }
				set_variable = { RUS_state_rovs_popularity = 0 }
			}
			country_event = {
				id = rusd.3322 
				days = 21 
				random_days = 14

country_event = { 
	id = rusd.3321
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3321" }
	title = rusd.3321.t 
	desc = {
		text = rusd.3321.d
		trigger = {
			RUS_russian_monarch = no
		}
	}
	desc = {
		text = rusd.3321.d2
		trigger = {
			RUS_russian_monarch = yes			
		}
	}
		
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_wrangel4
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3321.a
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		RUS_remove_democratic_opposition = yes
		RUS_remove_kornilov_legacy = yes
		clr_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 400 }
			retire = yes
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 403 }
			promote_to_marshal = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_idea = RUS_empowered_president }
			effect_tooltip = { retire_country_leader = yes }
			RUS_setup_acting_president_senate = yes
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_six_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 125 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				set_country_flag = RUS_president_elections_campaign
				RUS_calculate_polling_presidential_averages = yes
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_president_mission
				country_event = { #rsdrp primaries
					id = rusdem.53
					days = 7
				}
				country_event = { #psr primaries
					id = rusdem.54
					days = 10
				}
				country_event = { #kdp primaries
					id = rusdem.55
					days = 14
				}
				country_event = { #rkdp primaries
					id = rusdem.5501
					days = 17
				}
				country_event = { #vns primaries
					id = rusdem.56
					days = 20
				}
				country_event = { #nsnp primaries
					id = rusdem.58
					days = 23
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem }
				set_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem
				set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat }
				add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
				custom_effect_tooltip = authdem_authdem_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt
				set_country_leader_ideology = authdem_national_conservative_subtype
				hidden_effect = {
					set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
					divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = 2 }
					
					set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS.party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
					add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS_new_pataut }

					set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
					subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

					add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

					set_popularities = {
						totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
						syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
						radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
						social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
						social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
						market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
						social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
						authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
						paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
						national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
					}
				}
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				country_event = rusdem.62
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3321.b
		trigger = { 
			RUS_russian_monarch = no 
			country_exists = INT
		}
		add_political_power = -100
		RUS_decrease_ruling_party_pop = yes
		swap_ruler_traits = { remove = RUS_black_baron add = RUS_black_baron_1 }
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_idea = rus_state_revanchism }
			}
			add_ideas = rus_state_revanchism
		}
	}
}

						social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
						social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
						market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
						social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
						authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
						paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
						national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
					}
				}
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
			hidden_effect = {			
				RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
				RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
				set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
				activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
				country_event = rusdem.62
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3327.c
		trigger = { 
			RUS_wrangel_in_power = yes 
			RUS_russian_monarch = yes
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		add_ideas = RUS_Vasiliy_V_Shulgin_hog_sco
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 400 }
			retire = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem }
			set_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem
			set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat }
			custom_effect_tooltip = authdem_authdem_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt
			set_country_leader_ideology = authdem_national_conservative_subtype
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
			add_pataut_to_coalition = yes
		}
		else = {
			set_politics = { ruling_party = social_conservative }
			add_authdem_to_coalition = yes
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3327.e
		trigger = { 
			RUS_wrangel_in_power = yes 
			OR = {
				has_country_leader = { name = "Kirill I" ruling_only = yes }
				has_country_leader = { name = "Vladimir III" ruling_only = yes }
				has_country_leader = { name = "Dmitry III" ruling_only = yes }
				has_country_leader = { name = "Andrei IV" ruling_only = yes }
				has_country_leader = { name = "Roman I" ruling_only = yes }
				has_country_leader = { name = "Boris II" ruling_only = yes }
			}
		}
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		add_ideas = RUS_Aleksandr_S_Lukomskiy_hog_pau
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 400 }
			retire = yes
		}
		random_unit_leader = {
			limit = { has_id = 398 }
			promote_to_marshal = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { 
				NOT = { has_government = paternal_autocrat }
			}
			set_politics = { ruling_party = paternal_autocrat }
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
			add_authdem_to_coalition = yes			
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = pataut_absolute_monarchy_subtype_swap_tt
		set_country_leader_ideology = absolute_monarchy_subtype
		set_country_flag = make_absolute_monarchy_tree_visible
		mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
	}
}

country_event = { 
	id = rusd.3334
	immediate = { log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event rusd.3334" }
	title = rusd.3334.t 
	desc = rusd.3334.d
			
	picture = GFX_report_event_RUS_wrangel4
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	
	option = {
		name = rusd.3334.a
		remove_ideas_with_trait = head_of_government
		RUS_remove_democratic_opposition = yes
		RUS_remove_kornilov_legacy = yes
		clr_country_flag = RUS_duma_dissolved
		if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem }
			set_country_flag = RUS_rms_is_authdem
			set_politics = { ruling_party = authoritarian_democrat }
			add_soccon_to_coalition = yes
			custom_effect_tooltip = authdem_authdem_national_conservative_subtype_swap_tt
			set_country_leader_ideology = authdem_national_conservative_subtype
			hidden_effect = {
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = RUS.party_popularity_100@paternal_autocrat }
				divide_temp_variable = { RUS_new_pataut = 2 }
				
				set_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS.party_popularity_100@authoritarian_democrat }
				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = RUS_new_pataut }

				set_temp_variable = { sum = 100 }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@totalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@syndicalist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_democrat }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@market_liberal }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@social_conservative }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_authdem }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = RUS_new_pataut }
				subtract_from_temp_variable = { sum = party_popularity_100@national_populist }

				add_to_temp_variable = { RUS_new_authdem = sum } #avoid rounding errors

				set_popularities = {
					totalist = party_popularity_100@totalist
					syndicalist = party_popularity_100@syndicalist
					radical_socialist = party_popularity_100@radical_socialist
					social_democrat = party_popularity_100@social_democrat
					social_liberal = party_popularity_100@social_liberal
					market_liberal = party_popularity_100@market_liberal
					social_conservative = party_popularity_100@social_conservative
					authoritarian_democrat = RUS_new_authdem
					paternal_autocrat = RUS_new_pataut
					national_populist = party_popularity_100@national_populist
				}
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = elections_in_three_months
		hidden_effect = {			
			RUS_clear_all_preelection_coalitions = yes
			RUS_calculate_polling_averages = yes
			set_variable = { RUS_early_elections_mission_timeout = 90 }
			activate_mission = RUS_early_elections_mission
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = rusd.3321.b
		trigger = { 
			country_exists = INT
		}
		add_political_power = -100
		RUS_decrease_ruling_party_pop = yes
	}
}

	id = russia.800
	hidden = yes
	is_triggered_only = yes
	fire_only_once = yes
	trigger = {
		is_ai = yes
	}

	option = { # Revolution
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.800 option 1"
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_post_assassination option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_post_assassination option = RUS_POST_ASSASSINATION_REVOLUTION } }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_revolution_ai
		country_event = { id = russia.801 hours = 6 }
	}

	option = { # Elections

			base = 60
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_post_assassination option = DEFAULT } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_post_assassination option = RUS_POST_ASSASSINATION_ELECTIONS } }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_democracy_ai
		country_event = { id = russia.804 hours = 6 }
	}

	option = { # Kornilov
		log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event russia.800 option 3"

			base = 30
			modifier = {
				factor = 0

				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_DROZDOVSKY_ALONE } }
				NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = RUS_aftermath_of_kornilov option = RUS_AFTERMATH_OF_KORNILOV_DROZDOVSKY_MONARCHY } }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = RUS_drozdovsky_ai
		country_event = { id = russia.815 hours = 6 }
	}
}
